Name: Al-Enjaz Company
Description:
The Company was founded in 1398 Hijri
corresponding to1978 by Sheikh / Finjal Bin Sultan Elotibi.

Working in fields of road construction and maintenance, bridges, dams, tunnels, water tank pipes, sanitation, telephone, electrical works, and rock fragmentation.

We are one of the leading and initial company in the field of contracting.

Enjazco has worked with governmental institutions and other agencies including but not limited to, The Ministry of Transportation, Ministry of Municipal, Rural Affairs and Housing, Water and Electricity Regulatory Authority, Ministry of Higher Education , Saudi Authority for Industrial Cities and Technology Zones, and Others .

Name: Rezayat Group
Description:
The Rezayat Group has developed over several generations from its original trading roots in the Orient into a major diversified international enterprise with truly global horizons.

Led by family principles, it has repeatedly demonstrated its ability to respond flexibly and adapt effectively to the rapid changes and opportunities which have marked the international business environment over the past three quarters of a century.

The Group's outlook has always been international, and its interests and operations extend widely across different industries, with a focus on trading, construction, support services, manufacturing, financial services and investment.

Group Overview

The Rezayat Group has been trading for over fifty years with operations in 13 countries. Of its 25 companies, 14 are wholly owned, 11 joint ventures with major international partners, with a total of over 17,000 worldwide.

Group Activities:

Trading
Engineering & Construction
Investment & Insurance
Industrial Services
Food, Facilities & Travel
Logistics & Transportation
Life Support Services
Manufacturing
Marine Services
IT & Telecommunications

Primary Target Markets:

Oil, Gas and Petrochemicals
Water
Electricity
Insurance
Information Technology

Name: CoopCulture
Description: La Società Cooperativa Culture, in breve CoopCulture, è  in Italia tra le aziende leader nel settore della valorizzazione del patrimonio culturale per dimensioni, know how e mercato. Gestisce servizi per musei ed esposizioni (progettazione e realizzazione di sistemi evoluti di accesso e fruizione, biglietteria, accoglienza e assistenza di sala, prenotazione, prevendita, didattica, marketing comunicazione) per biblioteche e archivi (reference, catalogazione, didattica, promozione) e servizi al territorio (progetti di marketing, sistemi di rete, card turistiche territoriali).

Name: Apache Industrial
Description: Apache is a leader in the industrial services industry and is recognized for keeping people safe. Apache is an integrated fabrication, manufacturing, and services business with a 400,000 square-foot fabrication facility and 40 locations across the United States and Canada.

Name: GTEL - GRUPO TÉCNICO DE ELETROMECÂNICA S.A.
Description:
Since 1975, GTEL has been providing services regarding assembly, installation and maintenance in the electrical, mechanical, utilities and fire protection areas. Acting within the entire national territory, GTEL performs services for light and heavy industry sector, commercial and power plant industries.

In order to conquer and sustain its leading position in a high competitiveness and ongoing innovation market, GTEL has been developing a partnership policy with its clients, offering technology, quality and efficiency.

Engineers and technicians, specialized in every single working area, keep following up every job execution from GTEL, demanding from ourselves and from the procedures a very demanding quality control.

As proof of its competence, GTEL has an excellent market reputation, qualified by various certificates of technical capability.

9001 ISO CERTIFICATED COMPANY.

Name: Facility Solutions Group
Description:
Founded in 1982, FSG thrives on hard work, dedication to excellence, and continuous learning, believing in positive outcomes for all.

From its origin as a small lighting distributor in San Antonio, TX, FSG has evolved into one of the country's leading commercial electrical contractors (ENR Top 25 in 2024). FSG offers a wide range of services including large new electrical construction, electrical service and specialty projects, lighting, solar, EV charging, smart buildings, prefabrication, telecom, technology, and sign fabrication.

With over 3,200 employees across the country, FSG operates in all 50 states and collaborates with major general contractors on diverse and high-profile projects in the healthcare, hospitality, transportation, municipality, education, and commercial sectors.

FSG's unique people-first approach to business seamlessly blends the capabilities of a national service provider with the personalized touch of a local business.

Name: GEOCEAN
Description:
GEOCEAN is a marine work contractor, based near Marseille, in the south of France, with 30 years experience worldwide.

Our primary experience, offshore soil investigations, has been transmitted to all our teams. They have the know-how to analyze a natural marine site, evaluate the difficulties, and design and adapt your facilities to the particularities of your site. This expertise is more particularly focused on nearshore sites, where offshore gradually become onshore.

GEOCEAN has carried out its first marine renewable energy project : synergies with past projects have been and will be beneficial on this growing market.

GEOCEAN routinely controls and performs all aspects of your project to offer turnkey project services. We specialize in engineering and installation of subsea pipelines coastal works, such as wharves, jetties, quays, or any type of submarine work, when special and difficult situations have to be resolved.

Name: Elite Prime Electromechanical Services W.L.L.
Description:
Elite Prime is an electromechanical engineering specialist company undertaking the Design, Engineering, Supply, Installation, Testing, Commissioning and Maintenance of Fire Protection, Fire Alarm, Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing services for commercial and residential projects.

We deal in contracting and maintenance services where we cover the diverse needs of our clients in different kinds of sectors such as commercial, residential, healthcare, and education. 

Our team, consists of talented professionals, and is one of the best in the industry with expertise and knowledge to serve our clients' requirements of Fire Protection & M.E.P. business.

ELITE is committed to continuous improvements in order to ensure the delivery & provision of the highest standards of services at all times. We ensure personnel proficiency through product and system training.

Economic growth around the world has brought new industrial technologies, increased competition, and hazardous working environments. This, in turn, has resulted in tighter regulations and a new worldwide legislation is being brought into force to protect lives, environment and property. 

In view of the above, the objective of ELITE is to provide and recommend optimal solutions for all fire risks and to also fully engineer the electromechanical services in the construction projects.

We at ELITE, take pride in our reputation, technical expertise, and business excellence. 

We feel proud to be associated with many of the leading companies and to provide solutions and services to prestigious & important clients in Qatar that we have been serving over the years.

Name: GRUPO CCR
Description: O Grupo CCR administra um portefólio diversificado de empresas com operações em setores diversos, tais como construção, engenharia, metalomecânica, instalações elétricas e hidráulicas, carpintaria, imobiliário, entre outros.

Name: Conorte Serviços Industriais
Description:
Acreditamos no poder das realizações — das grandes obras aos sonhos individuais de cada pessoa que veste nosso uniforme.

Somos a Conorte Serviços Industriais, referência em montagem, manutenção, construção e serviços especializados para a indústria — com base operacional no Polo Industrial de Barcarena (PA) e atuação em projetos por todo o Brasil.

O que nos move
Segurança inegociável. Já superamos 5,9 milhões de horas-humanas sem acidentes com afastamento

Gente em primeiro lugar. Fomos certificados como “Lugar Incrível para Trabalhar” pela FIA. Estimulamos liderança inspiradora, respeito e protagonismo, porque sabemos que carreiras sólidas constroem resultados consistentes.


Inovação e excelência operacional. De grandes paradas industriais a contratos contínuos de manutenção, combinamos tecnologia, engenharia de ponta e processos enxutos para entregar valor com prazo e qualidade — sempre alinhados às melhores práticas de HSE e ESG.


Compromisso com a comunidade. Geramos empregos, investimos em capacitação profissional e atuamos de forma ética e sustentável para promover desenvolvimento regional.


Vem crescer com a Conorte
Se você quer evoluir em um ambiente onde segurança, respeito e desenvolvimento caminham juntos, seu lugar é aqui. Cadastre-se em nosso portal de carreiras (Gupy) e acompanhe as oportunidades que impulsionam trajetórias e fortalecem a indústria brasileira.

conorte.com.be/vagas

Conecte-se, acompanhe nossas histórias de realização e descubra como podemos transformar o futuro juntos.

Name: Infranord AB
Description: With 1,600 employees, Infranord is the largest railway engineering contractor in Sweden and a major operator in Norway. We build and maintain the railways and create future-proof infrastructure through innovation, professionalism and a high level of expertise.

Name: CLIM+ - SGDB France
Description:
Clim+ enseigne de Saint Gobain Distribution Bâtiment France est un réseau national d’agences commerciales et de magasins libre-service, réservée aux professionnels, spécialisée en PAC air/air climatisation, PAC air/eau chauffage et ventilation. 

En tant qu’apporteur de solutions globales en génie climatique, Clim+ offre un accompagnement personnalisé aux professionnels, en leur fournissant des conseils et une expertise technique pour répondre à toutes leurs problématiques du quotidien.

Promesse : proposer la gamme de produits la plus complète du marché, comprenant plus de 5 000 références stockées. Mettre à disposition un panel de services pour faciliter le quotidien des professionnels et leur permettre de gagner du temps et de nouveaux business.

Name: Infrakraft Sverige
Description:
Vi bygger Sveriges infrastruktur.
Inom Infrakraftkoncernen har vi har samlat drygt 600 av Sveriges främsta experter inom järnvägs- och vägbyggnad samt anläggningsarbeten, vilket gjort oss till en av branschens mest anlitade aktörer.

Name: Maison Cadiou
Description: Implantée à Locronan (29) depuis 1973, la Maison Cadiou a développé son expertise sur le marché des portails, clôtures, garde-corps, pergolas et carports de jardin en Aluminium. Elle est aujourd’hui le n°1 français sur ce marché. L'entreprise de 700 collaborateurs est reconnue et appréciée pour son savoir-faire, son expérience et son dynamisme.

Name: Cherry Coatings
Description:
Established in 1968, Cherry Coatings proudly partners on meaningful projects that impact our communities. We are a family-owned business that provides architectural, industrial, and maintenance coating services to commercial facilities.

Our large workforce and specialized teams help us provide accuracy, speed, and safety. With offices across Texas, Arizona, Tennessee, Colorado, and Georgia, Cherry Coatings is one of the largest paint contractors in the United States.

Name: Mannai - Energy & Industrial Markets Group
Description:
E&IM Group have an excellent track record of catering to International manufacturers, suppliers and contractors by providing local expertise and "know-How" to the Oil & Gas, Building Construction, Infrastructure & Utilities sectors of the Qatari Economy. Our supply & services portfolio includes World-Class products, services and brands within the following business segments:
- Infrastructure & Utilities
- Oil & Gas
- Heating, Ventilation & Air-Conditioning (HVAC)
- Electrical, Mechanical & Construction Materials
- Specialised Building Materials (Waterproofing, construction chemicals)
- Industrial Supplies & Machineries
- Power Generation

For more details, please visit our website @ www.mannaiindustrial.com

Name: GO Porto - Gestão e Obras do Porto
Description:
A GO Porto é a empresa municipal responsável pela gestão das grandes obras públicas na cidade. 
Em pouco mais de 20 anos, somamos no nosso portfólio mais de 650 empreitadas, num volume de investimento superior a 350 milhões de euros. As intervenções a cargo da GO Porto acontecem em áreas tão distintas como a Cultura, o Ambiente, a Educação, o Desporto, o Urbanismo, o Espaço Público ou a Mobilidade. 

Criada em 2000, passou a incluir, desde 2016, a gestão e exploração de equipamentos, domínio no qual se destaca o Mercado do Bolhão. Neste caso concreto, a GO Porto geriu a empreitada, assim como toda a operação relacionada com a transferência dos comerciantes e a gestão diária do mercado temporário (até setembro de 2022). 

Depois de 15 anos com uma média de 8 milhões de orçamento anual – exceção feita para o ano do Euro 2004 -, temos vindo a registar um aumento exponencial do volume de investimento nos últimos anos.

Na componente de gestão e exploração de equipamentos, somos responsáveis, além do Bolhão, pela gestão do Edifício São Dinis (sede da GO Porto e da Porto Ambiente). Temos também um papel importante na gestão do antigo Matadouro Industrial do Porto, em Campanhã (ainda em obra).

Name: Creative Solutions Contracting
Description:
Creative Solutions also known as CS, is a leading company in specialized contracting registered in Saudi as a contracting company since 2021. The company operations span of Saudi, CS Proofed from the first year is present in the market and become one of the most famous names in the contracting industry, Project management, patient experience, RF Cage, and Fabric Duct Provider, with a partnership of multiple international brand such as Interflex, Fabric Air and Comfort Health Solutions.
Our vision is to be the region's top Solutions Provider and to incorporate state-of-the-art technologies and solutions from the world into the regional market.
Creative Solutions mission is to become the primarily preferred solutions provider and contractor for industrial, warehouses, medical, entertainment, and retail customers who are looking for agile management, innovative technologies, and a reliable team. Seeking to provide the most innovative product and futuristic technology and expand our market to more diverse industries, including the entertainment sector, in line with vision 2030.
We value our business partners the most. Our model depends on building trust and credibility with our clients for an everlasting & sincere integrated service. 
We do not consider our company as a different entity from our clients, we consider them as an extension of our company. 
Commitment, trust, credibility, professional conduct, and approach are what we are thriving for.
A major factor behind our success is the strong partnership of Creative Solutions with its worldwide suppliers and partners from all around the world, adding to our journey the successful operations that built the company and satisfied repetitive clientele over time. 
Creative Solutions Provide 8 primary Services
Fabric Duct & HVAC
Turnkey contracting
Medical Contracting
Patient Experience
Customer & marketing Experience
UV Products
Digital Transformation and RPA Services

Name: Western Specialty Contractors
Description:
Western Specialty Contractors has been family-owned and operated since 1915, proudly serving clients nationwide with over 30+ branch offices. As America's largest building envelope restoration specialist, we specialize in concrete, masonry, waterproofing, facade restoration, and roofing.*

Renowned for our blend of traditional craftsmanship and innovative technologies, we offer unique solutions tailored to each project. Our skilled craftsmen are dedicated to delivering cost-effective measures that extend the lifespan of your structures.

With expertise in problem analysis, strategy development, and solution implementation, we cater to building owners, engineers, architects, and property managers. Trust Western Specialty Contractors for all your exterior building maintenance and restoration needs.

*Western Specialty Contractors does not provide licensed design, engineering, or architectural services. However, we can recommend a design professional or collaborate with one provided by the client when necessary.

Name: Aramsco
Description:
Aramsco supports the livelihoods of specialty contractors and service professionals across the U.S. and Canada. We equip each of our customers, who do important work for their communities—including restoration, remediation, environmental services, surface preparation, countertop fabrication, facility maintenance, and professional cleaning—with a wide range of mission-critical products and services, along with plenty of support, training, and know-how.

We provide our customers the equipment, chemicals and consumables they need to do their work. We sell a portfolio of over 60,000 products and stand ready to help source hard-to-find items. Our staff is highly trained on the environments in which our customers operate, and we provide technical support before, during, and after the sale. With over 70 locations across North America we can deliver the product where and when it is needed—our customers are on call 24/7 and so are we.

In addition to distributing products, we offer a variety of services to help our customers succeed including: training and education, equipment rentals, equipment repair and equipment financing. Our goal is to do whatever takes to help our customers!

Aramsco is part of a family of companies dedicated to helping specialty contractors, service professionals, and others with similar needs. We consider our customers to be part of our family. As such, we are an organization rooted in a culture of making our customers’ lives better. So we vow to do one thing a little better every day. To work as hard to keep their business as we do to earn it. To be active stewards of their goals and growth. To always hold ourselves accountable. And since their success is our success, to continue expanding on the products and services they rely on every day.

Name: Daaz Group
Description:
PT Daaz Bara Lestari Tbk was founded as a commodities trading firm, focusing on the trade of minerals and other resources. Over the years, we have significantly expanded and grown into a leading player in the industry. Our services now span across commodities trading, shipping, and mining services, enabling us to provide comprehensive solutions throughout the mineral industry value chain.

Our journey is a testament to strategic growth and diversification, as we have continually adapted to meet the ever-evolving demands of the market. Despite our expansion, we remain committed to our core values of integrity, innovation, and customer satisfaction. These values guide us in every aspect of our business and ensure that we maintain the highest standards of excellence.

Through our integrated approach, we are able to deliver unparalleled value across all our business segments. We pride ourselves on setting new standards in the industries we serve, whether it be in providing high-quality commodities, efficient shipping solutions, or top-notch mining services. Our goal is to create lasting partnerships with our clients by offering solutions that are not only effective but also sustainable.

As we look to the future, Daaz Group remains dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the mineral industry. We are constantly exploring new opportunities for growth and innovation, ensuring that we stay at the forefront of the industry while continuing to deliver exceptional value to our clients.

Name: Infinity Home Services
Description:
Welcome to Infinity Home Services (IHS), where we are redefining the home exterior remodeling industry and "Saving our Communities from Unscrupulous Contractors!"
Our 25 Brands lead the industry in exterior remodeling services including roofing, doors, windows, siding and more.
We empower our Brands' growth and success by enhancing their breadth of services, improving customer recognition and local market share, and laying a foundation for strong organic growth.
Our Brands employ the highest quality installation techniques using the industry’s most reliable and proven materials. We guarantee everything we do in writing and stand behind our work.
Our story is one of relentless dedication to customers and employees, and an unwavering commitment to the communities we serve as we practice the boundless pursuit of excellence.

Name: Black Bear Seamless Flooring
Description:
Black Bear Coatings & Concrete is a partner you can trust. Our experts have over 30 years of industry combined experience designing, installing, repairing, and maintaining concrete floors. We value engineer solutions for Decorative & Designer Epoxy, Urethane Mortars, Mitigation Systems, Surface Restoration, Cementitious Coatings, and Concrete Polishing.

Our comprehensive approach is all-encompassing. Black Bear invests the time to work with clients to understand the environmental conditions of each particular area. We are unique in that we don’t install flooring, we value engineer longer-lasting solutions for our clients through a start-to-finish approach that results in a more durable, easily maintained, and cost-effective system.

Name: NRC Group Sverige
Description:
NRC Group är en expansiv järnvägs- och markentreprenör som arbetar med infrastruktur i Sverige, Finland och Norge. Vi bygger vägar, broar samt tunnelbana och är Nordens ledande järnvägsspecialist. Företaget är börsnoterat på Oslo Børs och har cirka 2 450 anställda, varav cirka 500 medarbetare i Sverige.
NRC Group har kapacitet och kompetens arbeta med både omfattande och komplexa anläggnings- och järnvägsprojekt. Genom konsolidering och organisk tillväxt har vi skaffat oss en unik position som totalleverantör av infrastruktur. Vår styrka är bland annat att vi har spetskompetens inom alla teknikgrenar för järnvägsutbyggnad, mark-, ban-, el-, signal- och telearbeten, under samma tak. 

Just nu driver projekt från Gällivare i norr till Ystad i söder. Vårt huvudkontor ligger i Stockholm och vi har regionkontor i bland annat Karlstad, Göteborg och Örebro. Vi har en tydlig vision om att bli den ledande privatägda anläggnings- och järnvägsspecialisten i Norden. Vi är ständigt på jakt efter kvalificerade personer till våra dynamiska team som vill vara med och utveckla framtidens infrastruktur.

Name: Black Bear Seamless Flooring
Description:
Black Bear Coatings & Concrete is a partner you can trust. Our experts have over 30 years of industry combined experience designing, installing, repairing, and maintaining concrete floors. We value engineer solutions for Decorative & Designer Epoxy, Urethane Mortars, Mitigation Systems, Surface Restoration, Cementitious Coatings, and Concrete Polishing.

Our comprehensive approach is all-encompassing. Black Bear invests the time to work with clients to understand the environmental conditions of each particular area. We are unique in that we don’t install flooring, we value engineer longer-lasting solutions for our clients through a start-to-finish approach that results in a more durable, easily maintained, and cost-effective system.

Name: Elixir Engineering Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Elixir Engineering Pvt. Ltd. (EEPL) was established in 1997 as an Engineering, procurement & construction ( EPC ) company focusing industrial utility system. The company offer services for management, engineering, selection, procurement, fabrication, installation, operation, maintenance of Fire and Industrial Utility Systems.

From complex Plant Piping system, Fire fighting system & Technical Manpower Supply, the company can offer solutions across wide spectrum of Industries. The company has established itself as most preferred FIRE and UTILITY EPC Contractor for many a multinational organization. We execute projects and provide services on-time with a high standard of Quality, safety.
 
The company is ISO 9001:2008 certified.

Name: Ginco Electrical & Sanitary Contracting Co. LLC (GESCO)
Description: Ginco Electrical & Sanitary Contracting Co. LLC (GESCO) is a full-fledged electromechanical company with 25 years of industry experience, employing more than 700 employees with SEWA and DEWA unlimited license.

Name: Technology Experts Company
Description:
In October 2001 Technology Experts started as a small Establishment with a number of employees not exceeding two (2). The clearness of aims and mission enabled its Administration to exert more effort and time, eventually leading to a fast expansion and development of the company in more specialized activities. Where new divisions and departments have been established to meet the size of development in the company, the Radiation Protection Department was founded, followed by other departments which include Safe Transport of Radioactive Material, Radiation Analysis, Radiation Instrument Supply, and a Training Center. 

Fields of Expertise:
Mining
Radiation Protection
Environmental studies
Chemical laboratories
Professional training
Hazmat transportation
O&M Water plants
Well logging

Name: Worth & Company, Inc
Description:
Superior Customer Service. Innovative Solutions. 
The award-winning Worth & Company, Inc. is one of the most respected, full-service mechanical contractors in the Mid-Atlantic region. The company’s size, advanced technology, excellent safety record, and resources provide a significant advantage to our customers. Worth & Company is experienced in Mechanical (HVAC/Plumbing) Construction, Design-Build Construction, Design-Assist, Industrial Construction, and Preventative Maintenance Service /Repairs. Worth & Company serves Pennsylvania, New Jersey, Delaware, and Maryland.  The offices are located in Bucks County, PA, and New Castle, DE.

Name: CPR Construction Cleaning (PCB Holdings LLC)
Description:
CPR Construction Cleaning is a specialized construction trade focused exclusively on high-precision cleaning for all construction verticals, with strong expertise in mission-critical environments.

We are not a janitorial company. Our technicians are professionally trained, certified, and equipped to meet the strict demands of fast paced construction sites, from daily safety maintenance cleaning (interior and exterior) to our 3 phase cleaning - rough, final & touch-up cleans.

We support general contractors and developers who require:

Mission-critical & data center cleaning
Controlled-environment & protocol-driven cleaning
Large-scale commercial project turnover
Reliable, schedule-aligned site maintenance
OSHA10 & OSHA30 Certification 

Our standards are built on safety, precision, and performance.

When your project requires a partner you can trust at every stage, CPR delivers the clean that construction depends on.

Name: Intercare Hygiene
Description:
Intercare Hygiene has become the leading and most respected supplier of hygiene products and solutions in Qatar Since its establishment in 1987.

By providing environmentally friendly products, service training and chemical control systems; we ensure the highest standards of cleanliness and hygiene and minimize the environmental effects.

Name: EverGreene Architectural Arts, Inc.
Description:
Since 1978 EverGreene Architectural Arts has been providing pre-construction, construction and new design services for some of the world's most memorable buildings. From historic landmarks to contemporary public spaces, we deeply respect the traditional trades, the art and science of historic preservation, restoration and conservation as well as the innovative and creative landscape of new construction.  

At EverGreene we believe that the work we do humanizes the built environment and changes the way people experience architecture.  From the largest cities to the most remote towns, the architectural arts influence how we feel about our most beloved buildings and forges deeper connections to the communities which we call home. 

As the nation's largest specialty contractor of architectural arts, our success at EverGreene Architectural Arts is a result of our dedication to excellence, profound care of each buildings history and architectural heritage and the commitment to always put quality and craftsmanship at the heart of our work.

Headquartered in Brooklyn with offices in Chicago, Washington DC, and Los Angeles, our team of conservators, designers, plasterers, sculptors, painters, fine artists, project managers, estimators, superintendents and craftspeople are ready to collaborate with our clients throughout the entirety of a project, solve problems big and small and bring their vision to life.

#WorldClassCraftsmanship

Name: Alben Engenharia - Construtora e Gerenciamento de Obras
Description:
A Alben Engenharia é uma empresa LTDA do ramo da construção civil, especializada em obras residenciais de alto padrão atuando em toda Região Metropolitana de Campinas. 
Somos Engenheiros Civis apaixonados pela profissão, formados pela PUC-Campinas, com uma equipe de qualidade com o principal objetivo: trazer comodidade, segurança e tranquilidade para a sua obra.
Contate-nos para maiores informações e orçamentos sem compromisso.

Name: Crete United
Description:
Crete United is an energy efficiency company that uses our Mechanical, Electrical and Plumbing (MEP) expertise to improve communities. With a partner network of more than 40 companies and nearly 3,500 technicians, Crete United provides customized MEP solutions with a laser focus on energy efficiency.

Crete United is a unified network of local mechanical, electrical and plumbing (MEP) and Building Automation companies spanning the U.S. You can work with just one of our partners or we can bring multiple services together so that you can experience a fully integrated, energy efficient solution for every aspect of your building’s health.

Across the nation, our self-performing teams create energy efficient solutions that advance your sustainability goals while improving your bottom line.

Name: Guarnieri Engenharia
Description:
A Guarnieri Engenharia nasceu da experiência em gerenciamento de grandes obras industriais e comerciais. Com o tempo, evoluiu para se tornar uma referência na execução de projetos industriais, logísticos, de infraestrutura e obras especiais em todo o território nacional.

Atuamos com foco na eficiência, cumprimento de prazos e atenção aos detalhes. Esses valores nos acompanham desde o início. Incorporamos as tecnologias mais modernas da construção civil, como BIM, Tilt-Up e engenharia de valor, aplicadas com rigor técnico por uma equipe multidisciplinar altamente qualificada.
Com sedes em Recife e São Paulo, nossa estrutura nos permite conduzir obras em todas as regiões do país, com excelência operacional e gestão inteligente de cada fase do projeto.

Oferecemos diferentes modalidades de contratação, entre elas, o Turn-Key, Design-Build, PMG e BTS, que garantem previsibilidade financeira, adaptabilidade e segurança para cada tipo de cliente e necessidade.

Mais do que executar obras, entregamos valor de forma consistente, com precisão, responsabilidade e um compromisso permanente com a qualidade.

Name: Integra Testing Services, LLC
Description: Integra Testing Services is a leading provider of HVAC (TAB) certified testing, adjusting, and balancing. Integra has quickly become one of the largest TAB firms in the country and also offers an array of complementary testing services such as air exchange and pressure testing for joint commissioning accreditation, 797/800 pharmacy certification, cleanroom certification, fume hood certification, duct leakage testing, air barrier testing, commissioning, and other critical testing services for the built environment. Integra was formed in 2021 through the merger of Neudorfer Engineers, Fulton & Associates and International Test and Balance and is headquartered in Mentor, OH.

Name: LCI - Le Consultant Ingénierie
Description:
Le Consultant Ingénierie « LCI » est un bureau d’étude tunisien spécialisé dans le secteur des infrastructures de transport, le bâtiment, l’aménagement du territoire et l’urbanisme. Il intervient pour des clients du secteur public et privé, dans l’ensemble du territoire tunisien et à l’international.

Le Consultant Ingénierie a été fondé en 1994 par un groupement d’ingénieur expérimenté ayant une large expérience dans les études des projets et la maîtrise d’œuvre.

La qualité technique et le sérieux des professionnels actifs au sein du bureau d’étude ont été et continue d’être le moteur d’évolution et de développement de la société.

Le Consultant Ingénierie compte sur une équipe soudée et qualifiée pour répondre aux besoins des clients de la manière la plus efficace.Le Consultant Ingénierie « LCI » est un bureau d’étude tunisien spécialisé dans le secteur des infrastructures de transport, le bâtiment, l’aménagement du territoire et l’urbanisme. Il intervient pour des clients du secteur public et privé, dans l’ensemble du territoire tunisien et à l’international.

Name: Melink Corporation
Description:
We are a global provider of energy efficiency solutions for commercial buildings with five business offerings: HVAC Testing, Adjusting & Balancing, Intelli-Hood Kitchen Ventilation Controls, Building Commissioning, HVAC Monitoring, and custom business solutions for operation efficiency. For over 35 years, we’ve been helping companies save energy, increase profits, and make the world a more sustainable place. Our corporate headquarters is LEED Platinum and Net-Zero Energy, and our vehicle fleet consists of all hybrid and electric cars.

We envision clean energy transforming the world by improving our global economy, security and environment – for ourselves, our children and future generations.

Name: Canoco Group
Description:

Name: Contractors Direct
Description:
Contractors Direct is the regions first online platform that connects ‘verified contractors’ with business and home owners. It streamlines and simplifies the selection process of relevant and qualified  fit out contractors for commercial and residential renovation projects.

The platform fills a gap in the market for free access to certified contractors for businesses that don't know which contractors are credible or capable of carrying out their project on time and within budget. Businesses and home owners can connect with qualified contractors through the platform and take advantage of the decades of industry experience the project professionals on hand are able to provide. Further more Contractors Direct has an exclusive finance product that allows businesses that meet the criteria to pay for their project over 2 years.

In addition to project financing, Contractors Direct offers many other value-added services to support business owners including comprehensive contents insurance and project management support. Exclusive partnerships with key players in the property, finance, digital marketing, and insurance industries enable Contractors Direct to generate anywhere up to 1,000 leads per month for the benefit of its qualified contractors. 

The contractor portal currently has over 100 qualified contractors including multinational, regional, and local operators who are benefiting from the opportunities generated through the platform. The company is based in the UAE and serves the GCC region.

Name: Almacis srl
Description:
L'Almacis trae origine dall'impresa Marramiero che, a partire dagli anni '50, ha avviato la realizzazione di reti e di impianti acquedottistici, di irrigazione e fognari, oltre alla tradizionale attività nel settore dell'edilizia civile ed industriale in Abruzzo ed in Italia Centro/Meridionale. Negli anni '70 l'impresa avvia con successo il settore delle reti e impianti metano, acquisendo la gestione di oltre 40 concessioni. Negli anni '80, Almacis è nata con l'obiettivo di ristrutturare l'attività nel settore del metano e per rafforzare la presenza nel settore degli impianti speciali e nelle attività del settore energetico, della cogenerazione e della depurazione.

Solving Generation

La nostra Vision è diventare leader nell'offrire soluzioni innovative e sostenibili per l'impiantistica energetica, le costruzioni e le infrastrutture. Per realizzare questa visione, investiamo in ricerca, tecnologia e risorse umane, affrontando ciò che altri non fanno o facendolo in modo più efficiente e sostenibile garantendo ai clienti soluzioni competitive a livello internazionale.
I nostri valori sono fondamentali:
•	Valorizzazione delle Persone: Promuoviamo la formazione continua e il lavoro di squadra.
•	Orientamento ai Risultati: Puntiamo a elevati standard di efficienza, rispettando i reali bisogni dei nostri partners.
•	Eticità e Sostenibilità: Stiamo sviluppando la nostra strategia orientata a guidare l’azienda in base ai pillar della sostenibilità ambientale, sociale e di governance.
•	Innovazione: Accogliamo le sfide del cambiamento come opportunità di crescita.
•	Collaborazione: Consideriamo tutti come partner, non semplici dipendenti, clienti o fornitori.

Description:
Jesteśmy firmą dostarczającą nowoczesne rozwiązania i projekty szkoleniowe w obszarach Counter tercorism consulting, VIP Protection oraz usługi transportu VIP.
Specjalizujemy się w realizacji szkoleń dla firm sektora zbrojeniowego, lotniczego, oraz firm produkcji i sprzedaży technologii podwójnego zastosowania, wymagających certyfikatów poświadczenia bezpieczeństwa o najwyższych klauzulach tajności.
Posiadamy własny dział transportu VIP, koordynatorów z wieloletnim doświadczeniem oraz ekskluzywne limuzyny, SUV-y i vany obsługiwane przez profesjonalnych kierowców z wieloletnim doświadczeniem posługujących się językami obcymi.
Do dyspozycji naszych klientów jest nasz zespół ochrony osobistej VIP, bazujący na byłych operatorach najlepszych jednostek specjalnych w Polsce.
Jesteśmy jedna z niewielu Polskich firm posiadającą kod NCAGE i zarejestrowaną jako dostawca usług i towarów dla Baz NATO - prowadzonej przez Agencję Wsparcia i Zamówień NATO ( NSPA – NATO Support and Procurement Agency) oraz dostawca dla Agencji Logistyki Departamentu Obrony Stanów Zjednoczonych (DLA - Defense Logistics Agency)

Opracowujemy odpowiednio zdefiniowane scenariusze i programy szkoleniowe, prowadzimy zamknięte warsztaty i szkolenia strzeleckie oraz programy z zakresu taktyki i działań specjalnych. W naszych realizacjach zapewniamy bezpieczne i ciekawe obiekty do ćwiczeń, wymaganą infrastrukturę a jeżeli wymaga tego projekt dużą zróżnicowaną grupę statystów. 
Podczas naszych szkoleń szczególny nacisk kładziemy na profesjonalizm, standard przekazywanej wiedzy oraz wysoki poziom bezpieczeństwa podczas naszych szkoleń.

Usługi transportu i transferów i ochrony VIP dedykujemy ambasadom, agencjom rządowym i politykom. Współpracujemy z prestiżowymi firmami handlingowymi oraz prestiżowymi hotelami.

Name: VVS Centret Skjern Aps
Description:
Ved VVS Centret Skjern møder du din lokale VVS'er og autoriserede installatør. Vi har uddannelsen, ekspertisen - og ikke mindst: erfaringer fra arbejde på en lang række projekter. Vi kender de særlige krav, der er til installationer og arbejde under forskellige forhold, så vi kan sikre den rigtige løsning hver gang. Vi kører også gerne ud og beser et projekt, inden du får et kvalificeret tilbud på opgaven.

Vi giver gerne uforpligtende tilbud på arbejde for private husstande, boligforeninger, institutioner og virksomheder.

Det hele startede som et smedefirma i 1900 - og i alle årene har det været godt håndværk og evnen til at tilpasse os nye udfordringer, nye arbejdsmetoder og nye produkter, der har været bærende.

I 1947 overtog Ingvard Hansen forretningen, der siden har udviklet sig fra at være landsmedie til at blive en moderne VVS-forretning - fra 1970 med næste generation, Tommy Hansen, som indehaver. Herefter blev det Michael Østergård og Michael Mortensens tur til at stå i spidsen for virksomheden.

VVS Centret Skjern A/S har tradition for godt håndværk. Meget er sket - men det har ikke ændret sig.

Name: Yorkshire Soundproofing
Description:
Understanding how soundproofing works can be a bit of a minefield but we are happy to explain how the dB scale works and what it means to you.

We can supply and fit a wide range of systems and have had hands-on experience with 100+ products so we have a deep understanding of what products to use where and when.

Services we offer:

-Wall Soundproofing

The systems we recommend range from fully independent stud frames, isolation clip systems and direct-to-wall soundproof composite boards. We will look to fit the right system to your needs.

-Floor Soundproofing

We offer fully floating floor systems with cradles or isolation mounts and/or can retrofit soundproofing underlays which don't always require lifting floorboards

-Ceiling Soundproofing

Reducing impact sound like footsteps is a common issue so we use top-of-the-range isolation mounts, vibration dampening and high-density mineral wool to reduce the sound. This can be done with or without removing the existing ceiling

-Office soundproofing

You may have issues with meeting rooms, lightweight partitions or open-plan office noise and we can help. If you can reduce distraction or improve speech clarity you can also increase your sales and/or customer service.

-Absorption to reduce echo

Are you having issues with echo in an office or open-plan kitchen? we can evaluate your space and even calculate the rt60 of the room if needed!

-Part-E Conversions

If you are converting a building into flats, then you will need to pass Part-E regulations. We know how to do this in the most efficient way to achieve the highest performance, for the lowest price and without losing the space of an independent frame.

Thank you for taking the time to look at our profile. Please contact us for a FREE quote or advice.

Name: Murer og Entreprenør Martin Pedersen Aps
Description:
Hej, jeg er Martin Pedersen, en erfaren murermester med en passion for kvalitetsbyggeri og renoveringsprojekter. Jeg har været en del af byggebranchen siden 2004, hvor jeg fulgte i min fars fodspor som murermester.
I 2008 overtog jeg stolt min fars virksomhed og omdøbte den til det nuværende navn, Murermester MP. Gennem årene har jeg opbygget en solid erfaring inden for underentreprenøropgaver på større bygge- og renoveringsprojekter.
Vi tilbyder blandt andet tilbygninger, indvendige renoveringer, facadeisolering og alt i flise- og klinkearbejde. Der er mange ting, du kan få os til, hvis vi står for dit byggeprojekt. Men at lave en nem lappeløsning, der ikke holder i længden, er ikke på vores liste.
Min virksomhed, Murermester MP, har et stærkt fokus på at betjene kunder inden for boligselskaber og større foreninger. Vi er dedikerede til at opretholde vedligeholdelseskontrakter og gennemføre omfattende ombygningsprojekter med omhu og professionalisme.
Vi er imødekommende og ganske omgængelige. Vi er en god håndfuld murere og lidt til, der for de flestes vedkommende har været i firmaet i en årrække. Vi kan løfte både større og mindre opgaver inden for faget, og vi gør det med stor omhyggelighed og grundighed.
For at sikre vores kunder bedst muligt er vi medlem af Byg Garanti, så du er sikret, at kvaliteten af vores arbejde er i orden. Vi holder til i Roskilde tæt på København, men vi kører ud til alle kunder på hele Sjælland. Vi glæder os til at høre fra dig!

Name: Omnino   I   Energioptimerad ventilation
Description:
Vi hjälper fastighetsägare att skapa friskare inomhusklimat, sänka sina driftkostnader och lämna ett mindre klimatavtryck. 

Vi energioptimerar och energirenoverar ventilationssystem i ﬂerbostadshus, kontor, skolor, sjukhus och omsorgsenheter genom att täta, rensa och läckagemäta. 

TÄT VENTILATION MED AEROSEAL
Vi erbjuder tätning med Aeroseal – en prisbelönt teknik från USA som hittar och tätar luftläckage utan ingrepp i fastigheten. Med ett tätt system kan ni dra ner på ﬂäktarna och få bättre värmeväxling. Ni får ett system som drar mindre energi helt enkelt.

VAD KOSTAR LUFTLÄCKAGET DIG?
Alla ventilationssystem läcker mer eller mindre. Äldre system kan läcka tusentals liter om dagen. Det blir riktigt dyrt i onödiga energikostnader.

Med en läckagemätning tar vi reda på hur många liter luft ventilationssystem läcker i minuten. Är läckaget stort kan vi täta det. 

GODKÄND OVK MED RENSNING AV VENTILATION
Om ventilationssystemet är tilltäppt eller smutsigt så måste fläktarna jobba på högvarv. Detta drar kostsamt mycket energi. Luften riskerar att inte nå ut dit den ska vilket kan leda till underkänd OVK.

Name: Hi-Tech Weld Overlay Group, LLC
Description:
Hi-Tech Weld Overlay Group is an industrial welding contractor specializing in field and shop applied weld overlays for the petroleum refining, petrochemical, chemical processing, pulp & paper, power utilities, and related industries.  Our automated applied weld overlays provide corrosion resistance and/or base metal restoration for process vessels and boiler water-walls.   

Hi-Tech Weld Overlay also provides other ASME code related weld repairs to process vessels, such as removal and reinstallation of nozzles, tray rings, and miscellaneous internals/attachments.  Support services can also be performed by Hi-Tech, which includes abrasive blasting, base metal repairs, carbon arc gouging, lining removals, NDE (VT, PT, UT Thickness), and PMI verifications.  Hi-Tech specializes in rapid mobilization to quickly and safely repair your plant equipment during planned and unplanned outages, ensuring that plant downtime is minimized.  

Hi-Tech began in 1985, as a specialty refractory contractor previously known as Hi-Tech Refractory Services—based in Houston, Texas.  Since that time, under private ownership of the Reintjes family, Hi-Tech has created a distinctive tradition of specialized services for industrial facilities.  In 2006, Hi-Tech Refractory Services changed names to Hi-Tech Industrial Services, to more clearly represent a new, wider range of industrial services being offered—including Automated Weld Overlays.   In 2015, the Weld Overlay Group was split off and became a stand-alone company known as Hi-Tech Weld Overlay Group, LLC.; while still owned by the Reintjes family.   Hi-Tech’s experience in petroleum refining, petrochemical, chemical processing, pulp & paper, power utilities, and related industries has earned a reputation known for excellence.  The Hi-Tech organization continues to offer our customers the “full service” approach to all of our customer’s specialty requirements.

Name: Arq.ria Engenharia | Gerenciamento de Projetos
Description:
A Arq.ria nasce com um posicionamento claro: atuar onde as decisões realmente impactam o resultado dos empreendimentos imobiliários.

Trabalhamos com coordenação, gerenciamento e otimização de projetos, apoiando construtoras, incorporadoras e investidores desde as etapas iniciais, quando ainda é possível influenciar custo, risco, prazo e margem de forma significativa. Acreditamos que projeto não é apenas entrega técnica, mas uma ferramenta estratégica de decisão.

Nossa atuação vai além da compatibilização tradicional. Aplicamos design review focado em viabilidade, otimização técnica orientada à execução, coordenação integrada entre disciplinas e uso do BIM de forma prática, conectando projeto, orçamento e obra. O BIM, para nós, não é fim, é meio. Ele entra como suporte real para decisões de orçamento, planejamento e produção.

O grande diferencial da Arq.ria está na visão sistêmica do empreendimento. Enxergamos o projeto como parte do negócio, entendendo as restrições de obra, os impactos no custo e as consequências das decisões tomadas ainda no papel. É por isso que nosso método gera mais previsibilidade, menos retrabalho e maior controle ao longo de todo o processo.

Atuamos tanto na coordenação completa, aplicando o método de ponta a ponta, quanto em serviços específicos. Ainda assim, é na atuação integrada que o maior valor é gerado, pois as decisões passam a ser coerentes, alinhadas e orientadas a resultado.

A Arq.ria existe para apoiar decisões melhores, reduzir riscos e transformar projeto em vantagem competitiva dentro do empreendimento.

Name: NORISK Master
Description:
NORISK – Erasmus Mundus Joint Master in Risk Assessment and Management of Civil Infrastructures

NORISK is an International Erasmus Mundus Joint Master dedicated to advanced risk assessment and management of civil and critical infrastructures. After its first edition in 2024/2025, the programme now advances toward its third edition in 2026/2027.

This one-year (60 ECTS) multidisciplinary Master prepares professionals to address the challenges of modern infrastructures — from transport and energy to water, communications, health, defence, finance and security — integrating risk analysis, monitoring, digitalization, resilience and sustainability.

Students study in two partner universities (earning a joint degree), with coursework in one location and the dissertation in another. The programme is fully taught in English.

NORISK equips graduates with the skills to develop innovative, reliable and sustainable solutions for the assessment and management of civil and critical infrastructures.

Vi er kendt for at være et professionelt installatørfirma med stor viden på en række centrale felter. Vi har snart 20års erfaring, som du får direkte adgang til.

Vore spidskompetencer ligger indenfor overvågning (TVO), kommunikation, bolignetværk, brand- og tyverisikring (ABA) samt stærkstrømsinstallationer.

Om det er en større eller mindre opgave, der skal udføres, løser vi den med samme professionelle tilgang.

Vi benytter udelukkende produkter af bedste kvalitet og kravet er højt til vores leverandør både kvalitets- og miljømæssigt. Det sikrer, at vi altid leverer det bedste produkt og service hver gang.

Vores arbejde bliver udført efter en kvalitets- og miljøsikring, som er baseret på ISO 9001, samt regler jævnfør Sikkerhedsstyrelsens forskrifter.

Vi har en flad organisationsstruktur, og du møder høj motivation hos vores medarbejdere og ikke mindst stor fleksibilitet i forhold til den opgave, du skal have løst.

Hvorfor vælge make:net a/s?

Når du vælger make:net a/s får du det gode håndværk - hver gang.
Vi er stolte af at være berygtet som en værdsat samarbejdspartner og er hos kunderne kendt som en autoriseret elinstallatør med høj faglig ekspertise.

Vi strækker os langt for at udføre enhver tænkelig opgave. En absolut top prioritet er, at rådgive dig, så du altid får den mest fordelagtige løsning.
Både her og nu, men også fremadrettet.

Vi vedligeholder og forbedrer som en selvfølge vores store viden på fagområdet via efteruddannelse, så du altid kan regne med opdateret information og rådgivning med stor indsigt og overblik.

Et særkende for os er både at fastholde og tiltrække de bedste medarbejdere inden for vores felt. Det kommer både vores samarbejdspartnere og kunder til gavn.

Vi har ytbehandlat mer än 130 nybyggnationer under de senaste 20 åren och utfört tusentals fartygsreparationer.

Som en erfaren tjänsteleverantör för olje- och gasindustrin är vi unikt positionerade för att stödja branschens ständigt föränderliga krav. Våra processer, verktyg och kapacitet är anpassad för att möta branschens unika behov.

Vår erfarenhet inkluderar applicering av skyddande beläggningar i konventionella industriella miljöer såväl som i specialmiljöer för kunder som är koncentrerade till kraft-, kemikalie-, petrokemikalie-, läkemedels-, metaller och mineraler, raffinering, massa och papper, livsmedelsbearbetning och andra tunga industrier. Vårt mål är att utföra samtliga arbeten med hög kvalitet, kostnadseffektivt och med säkerheten som första prioritet.
Företaget är en auktoriserad applikator för stålmålare i Sverige i fält och verkstad samt certifierade enligt ISO 9001, ISO 14001 och ISO 45001

Vi är certifierade att utföra beläggning med Jotachar och Chartek mot kolväte bränder och uppfyller auktorisationens krav på diplommålare och frosio inspektörer.

Name: Safeguard Solutions
Description:
Safeguard Solutions is a pioneering start-up specializing in cutting-edge perimeter security solutions for a wide range of industries. We are dedicated to providing robust, reliable, and technologically advanced systems to ensure the utmost safety and protection of critical assets.

At Safeguard Solutions, we understand the significance of securing valuable assets from potential threats. Our team possesses extensive expertise in designing, implementing, and maintaining state-of-the-art perimeter security solutions tailored to the unique needs of various industries.

Safeguard Solutions takes pride in its commitment to quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction. We collaborate closely with our clients throughout the entire project lifecycle. 
 
Our standard statement of perimeter security services will include: 
 
• Provide new fence and gates, or maintain, replace, and expand existing. 
• Retrofitting existing fence and gates, or full replacement with anti-climb, anti-cut panels.
• Non-conductive fence and gate replacement which requires no grounding.
• School perimeter security options.
• Provide faster, more efficient gate openers and traffic arms.
• Interior wire mesh partitions, including fully enclosed driver cages.
• Turnstiles, single and tandem with ADA compliant doors.
• Weapons and threat detection equipment utilizing AI technology.
• Permanent and retractable bollards, including vehicle crash wedges.
• Perimeter intrusion detection systems with drone technology.
• Ballistic panels installed on or near existing fence and around equipment.

At Safeguard Solutions, we are taking perimeter security to the next level. Choose Safeguard Solutions as a partner and experience peace of mind knowing that your critical assets are fortified by cutting-edge technology and expert guidance. Contact us today to discover how our innovative perimeter security solutions can safeguard your operations and protect your valuable assets.

Name: Compagnie Delacommune & Dumont
Description:
La compagnie Delacommune & Dumont est une structure qui a peu d’équivalents. 
Au cours de ses 200 ans d’existence, notre groupe s’est étoffé pour devenir un acteur global de la construction et de la maintenance des bâtiments, dans le secteur du Génie Climatique. 
Nous sommes aujourd’hui constitués d’une holding et de 7 filiales autonomes, aux talents et spécificités complémentaires. 

Nous nous adressons aux promoteurs immobiliers, bailleurs sociaux, syndicats de copropriété, administrateurs de bien... pour répondre à leurs besoins en construction (logements neufs, isolation, réhabilitation) ou en maintenance (plomberie et robinetterie, chaufferie et climatisation). 

L’analyse de notre environnement et l’anticipation des obstacles éventuels sont au cœur de notre ADN. 
Depuis plus d’un an, le marché de la construction de logements neufs subit une crise importante. Nous avons donc renforcé notre expertise en matière de réhabilitation des bâtiments existants, notamment par la formation de nos chefs de chantiers actuellement spécialisés dans le neuf.  
Nous diversifions également notre pôle construction vers le secteur tertiaire : hôpitaux, écoles, pensionnats, co-livings... et le secteur industriel. Nous ouvrons nos projets de chantiers au-delà de l’Ile-de-France. 

Dans un contexte de transition écologique et énergétique, au cœur de toutes les préoccupations, nous cherchons sans cesse à nous adapter pour répondre aux attentes d’un marché en évolution. Nous avons par exemple investi dans une entreprise qui s’adresse au marché des centrales photovoltaïques et nous engageons dans la construction bois, avec un de nos partenaires. 

Nos évolutions sont le reflet des enjeux de la société d’aujourd’hui et de demain. Des enjeux auxquels nous voulons apporter des réponses.

Name: ERT ENDÜSTRİ MÜHENDİSLİK SAN. VE TİC. AŞ.
Description:
ERT ENDÜSTRİ MÜHENDİSLİK AŞ, 2021 yılında başta endüstriyel tesisler olmak üzere Endüstriyel İskele Montaj ve Demontajı, İzolasyon İmalat ve Montaj, Kumlama ve Boyama, Boru ve Ekipman Montaj,  İnşaat ve Tadilat, Her Türlü Çelik Konstrüksiyon İşleri dahilinde birçok alanda hizmet vermeye başlamıştır.
           ERT ENDÜSTRİ MÜHENDİSLİK AŞ, kaliteli ve güvenilir çözüm ortaklığı ilkesini hedef edinmiştir. Sürekli değişen ve gelişen dünya koşullarına ayak uydurabilmek adına nitelikli personel istihdamına önem veren firmamız; uzman, dinamik ve genç kadrosu ile komple çözümler sunabilen çözüm ortağı olmayı ana hedefi olarak belirlemiştir. Gerçekleştirdiği tüm projelerde Ticari İtibarı, Maddi İtibarın üzerinde tutan ve yürüttüğü projelerde prensip olarak daima güvenli ve kaliteli hizmet vermeyi hedefleyen, emin ve sağlam adımlarla ilerleyen, mevcut duruma hızlıca uyum sağlayan, profesyonel çözüm ve öneriler sunabilen bir yapı oluşturmuştur.
           Kalite Yönetim Sistemi, tüm çalışanların da desteğiyle misyonumuza ve vizyonumuza uygun olarak sürekli geliştirilmektedir.
"İşçi Sağlığı ve Güvenliği" ve "Çevre" ile ilgili gereksinimler ve gelişmeler takip edilerek, kurulan sistemler bu doğrultularda sürekli geliştirilmekte ve uygulamalar başarılı bir şekilde yürütülmektedir.
Firmamız; 
      Yaptığımız işler için uyguladığımız sistemleri, “bu işi daha iyi nasıl yapabilirim” şeklinde düşünerek sürekli geliştirmek, 
      Dünya teknolojisindeki gelişmeleri takip ederek; sürekli eğitimlerle her kademedeki personelin niteliklerini arttırarak, Kalite Yönetim Sistemimizi iyileştirmek, İşçi Sağlığı ve Güvenliği ile Çevre konularında tüm personelin bilinçlenmesine yönelik eğitimler gerçekleştirerek, uygun donanımların kullanılmasını sağlamak,
İlkelerine sadık kalarak tüm personelini sürekli bilinçlendirmektedir.

Bringing Buildings to Life. Since 1996.

Synett s.r.o. je stabilní a technologicky orientovaná společnost, která se specializuje na komplexní služby v oblasti měření a regulace (MaR), slaboproudu a silnoproudu. Svým klientům poskytuje profesionální řešení od návrhu přes instalaci až po servis technologií, které zajišťují efektivní, bezpečný a úsporný provoz budov i průmyslových celků.
Společnost dlouhodobě staví na kvalitním technickém know-how, moderních postupech a individuálním přístupu ke každému projektu. Synett se podílí na realizaci rozsáhlých systémů řízení budov, inteligentních instalací i automatizace. Zajišťuje kompletní dodávky systémů měření a regulace, elektroinstalací a technologických celků, včetně integrace s nadřazenými řídicími systémy.
Firma působí napříč Českou republikou. Pobočky má v Břeclavi, Brně, Vyškově a Praze, což jí umožňuje být klientům flexibilně nablízku. Tým Synettu tvoří zkušení specialisté, kteří dbají na odbornou kvalitu, bezpečnost práce i spolehlivost dodávek.
Synett se zároveň zaměřuje na systematický rozvoj lidského kapitálu, moderní firemní kulturu a aktivní spolupráci s odbornými institucemi. Důraz na profesionalitu, zodpovědnost a inovace činí ze společnosti Synett s.r.o. silného partnera pro projekty v oblasti měření a regulace, automatizace budov a technické infrastruktury.

Name: HVAC R&D Podcast
Description:
Welcome to HVAC R&D
Where the Trades Talk Back.

Founded on the idea that Research & Development isn’t just for products—it’s for people too. HVAC R&D is a podcast and platform dedicated to building a better, more connected community of HVAC professionals and fellow skilled career tradespeople by learning from the past, embracing the present, and preparing for the future.

Join host Rhydon and the ever-growing #TradeCrew as they crack open a cold one and dive into real conversations about HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical, business, mental health, and life in the trades. Whether you’re a field tech, a contractor, a rep, or a curious listener who just loves the industry, there’s a seat at the table for you.

With over 30 years in the field—from contractor to distributor to manufacturer rep—Rhydon brings insight, wit, and the occasional Crawlspace Confession to every episode, with one goal: To remind us that collaboration beats competition, and that every tradesperson has a story worth sharing.

So tune in, laugh a little, learn a lot—and remember: We’re all doing a little R&D out here.

Name: Alkana
Description:
Depuis 2017, Alkana accompagne les entreprises confrontées aux enjeux de verticalité et de sécurité au travail. Spécialisée dans les travaux en hauteur et en profondeur, notre entreprise est basée à Saint-Maurice (VS), avec une antenne au Mont-sur-Lausanne (VD).

Notre force: une offre intégrée, articulée autour de quatre pôles complémentaires, pour garantir une approche globale, cohérente et réactive.

 Formation
Nos formations, dispensées dans nos propres infrastructures ou directement sur site, allient expertise métier, pédagogie active et ancrage réglementaire. Nous formons chaque année des centaines de professionnel.le.s afin de les sensibiliser à la Sécurité au travail.

 Équipements de protection
Nous sélectionnons, vendons, contrôlons et louons des équipements de protection individuelle (EPI) adaptés aux réalités du terrain. Confort, durabilité, conformité et conseils personnalisés: notre showroom est pensé comme un espace d’échange autant que de solutions.

 Travaux & solutions
Nos équipes interviennent sur cordes pour des missions en milieux naturels, urbains ou industriels. Chaque projet est mené dans le respect strict des normes de sécurité et de qualité par nos cordistes. Ces derniers sont tous certifiés niveaux I, II et III (ASGM, IRATA ou autres associations reconnues).

 Bureau d’étude STPS
Notre service de consulting accompagne les entreprises dans la conception de solutions de sécurité sur mesure: concepts de sécurisation, gestion de projets, évaluation des risques ou élaboration de procédures.

Indépendante, certifiée ISO et labellisée Valais Excellence, Alkana défend une approche engagée, technique et humaine de la sécurité au travail.

Name: Menuiserie Goullard
Description:
La menuiserie Goullard : l’art de sublimer le bois depuis 1907.

Basée à Rambouillet depuis plus d'un siècle, la menuiserie Goullard incarne l’expertise, la passion et un savoir-faire reconnu autour du bois.

Nous sommes fiers de faire vivre une tradition familiale où chaque projet est réalisé avec la même exigence. Nos réalisations allient techniques bien rôdées et finitions modernes. Nous sublimons le bois pour donner vie à vos idées.

Pourquoi nous choisir ?

→ Un savoir-faire centenaire : nos artisans perpétuent des techniques uniques et maîtrisées, transmises de génération en génération. Cet héritage est notre force. Il nous permet d’offrir des créations de qualité, à la hauteur des exigences de nos clients.

→ Une expertise pour tous vos projets : Qu’il s’agisse d’ouvrages pour des bâtiments publics, d’aménagements pour des entreprises ou de réalisations personnalisées pour des particuliers, la menuiserie Goullard s’engage à répondre à vos besoins dans les moindres détails.

→ Une équipe passionnée et engagée : nous sommes fiers de travailler le bois, un matériau naturel, sain et renouvelable qui brille par ses nombreuses vertus. Il porte notre renommée et nourrit notre engagement pour la qualité.

Rejoindre notre équipe, c'est 1. intégrer une maison où l’artisanat est une valeur forte, 2. partager une passion pour le bois, et 3. travailler dans un cadre où tradition et innovation se rencontrent chaque jour. Name: RotoCo (Roto-Rooter California)
Description:
RotoCo is building the best plumbing team in the country. We’re not trying to do it all—we’re focused on doing one thing with excellence. Plumbing isn’t a bolt-on service or a side hustle. It’s who we are. It’s what we’ve mastered. And it’s what we’ve done day in and day out since 1935.

As part of the Roto-Rooter network, we bring nearly a century of national trust into communities across California, from San Diego to Sacramento. But we’re not a platform or a patchwork. Each RotoCo branch is locally led and professionally run, backed by a culture that values precision, pride, and purpose.

We don’t need gimmicks or noise. Our customers call us when they want it done right. And that only happens when we hire the right people, train them well, and give them room to grow. That’s why we invest in our team—because we’re not just building a company, we’re building careers.

If you’re looking for a place where craftsmanship matters, where training and leadership are real, and where your work has impact, you’ll find it here.

RotoCo. Plumbing is all we do. Plumbing is all we know. And we’re just getting started.

Name: Grävsugen i Sverige AB
Description:
Grävsugen är den ultimata schaktmaskinen när det kommer till schaktning i stadsmiljöer, där det antingen är för trångt att jobba med en grävmaskin eller där det är känsligt att gräva p.g.a. korsande kabelstråk eller liknande. Med hjälp av grävsugen så slipper man risken att gräva sönder kablar och ledningar i marken, som t.ex. fiber-och elkablar eller vatten- och gasledningar.  Här kan man spara mycket tid och pengar p.g.a. stillestånd  eller onödiga reparationer.

 

Grävsugen är också perfekt att använda för mindre schaktgropar, vid friläggning av t.ex. vattenventiler, brandposter, elskåp, trafiksignaler etc., eller där man vill undvika stora och kostsamma återställningar i trottoarer eller asfalterade ytor. Vid mindre gropar ersätter ofta grävsugen helt och hållet både grävmaskin samt schaktbil.



Grävsugen kan även vara det perfekta hjälpmedlet för sista ”finliret” i groparna, där anläggarna vanligtvis får slita med spade och skyffel. Detta är alltså det skonsamma, effektiva samt säkra sättet att schakta på!

Name: Wren
Description:
Wren provide work at height services for construction, rail, building maintenance, and stadiums. We specialise in the rope access, mobile elevated platforms (cherry pickers), podiums and towers. 

Our typical work includes:

- Invasive inspection (fire safety)
- Building health checks
- Devegetation (Rail, buildings, etc)
- Window cleaning and repair
- Steam cleaning
- Brickwork and pointing
- Mastic
- Lead works
- Cladding and glazing
- Passive safety (Eyebolts, guardrails, etc)

What is work at height?

Work at height means work in any place where, if precautions were not taken, a person could fall a distance liable to cause personal injury. You are working at height if you could fall from an edge, through an opening, or through a fragile surface.

Work at height measures, like specialised rope access methods, can help get the job done quickly and safely, often limiting the requirement for elaborate site preparation.

Why Wren?

Wren set about building a work at height service to challenge the best in the industry. With experience in mountaineering, engineering, operations, and IT, we are perfectly suited and committed to delivering professional, high quality results.

To understand more, request a site visit and we'll walk you through your options. Call 0203 93 77 99 or visit wrenworks.co.uk to leave a message or request a call back.

A SPRAT-registered and ISNetworld-approved company, we’re committed to industry best practices and the highest standards of safety and compliance.

Our team works in sectors like hydro, wind, infrastructure, and environmental monitoring—providing solutions for bridges, dams, buildings, and remote sites where traditional access methods aren't practical. From concrete inspection and structural assessments to instrumentation installs and façade repairs, we help clients get the job done at height, safely and professionally.

We also operate the GeoArc Training Centre in Burlington, Ontario where we offer:

A LOVELY PLACE FOR A PERFECT WORKDAY

SAMMANHANG FÖR UTVECKLING
Till oss söker sig människor som vill arbeta i ett hälsosamt och meningsfullt sammanhang med närhet till inre och yttre utveckling. Vår uppgift är att skapa förutsättningar för detta sammanhang.  

SHARING AND CARING 
Vi tror på delningsekonomi både vad det gäller resurser och kompetens. I våra gemensamma nätverk hittar vi vägar för att dela kunskap och resurser mellan varandra. Vi tänker helhet och att alla behövs. Vi vill varandra väl och kulturen vi vill skapa bygger på tillit och allas möjligheter. Vår uppgift är att skapa sammanhang för att uppnå detta tillstånd.  

WORK LIFE BALANCE 
Vi som  startat verksamheten i Betongfabriken drivs av en gemensam övertygelse om att vi människor vill hitta nya sätt att arbeta på för att skapa förutsättningar för välmående människor och en livskraftig planet. 

Med rätt sammanhang för arbetsuppgiften, naturliga pauser i frisk luft och i rörelse för klar syn på prioritering och inbokad tid för reflektion - då tror vi att det skapas utrymme för utveckling och en meningsfull tillvaro.

Välkommen att dela erfarenheter i Betongfabriken på Wenngarn - testa oss gärna på våra FREE-SEATING-FRIDAYS den sista fredagen varje månad!

At Rug Couture, we create handcrafted rugs and carpets designed for professionals who demand precision, quality, and service. Established in 2006, we understand that the right rug is never just a finishing touch — it’s a statement piece that anchors a space and elevates the overall design.

We specialise in producing bespoke rugs and carpets to order, giving design professionals complete freedom of size, colour, shape, and design. Whether it’s a subtle tonal piece to balance a scheme or a bold statement rug that becomes the focal point, our process ensures your vision is realised without compromise.

What sets us apart is not only the breadth of choice, but also our ability to deliver at scale with guaranteed lead times. For interior designers, architects, and trade professionals, this means fewer delays, more certainty, and the confidence that every detail will be executed to the highest standard.

We work closely with clients across residential, commercial, and hospitality projects, providing a trusted partnership from concept to delivery. Our team combines traditional craftsmanship with modern technology, producing rugs that are durable, easy to maintain, and always tailored to the project requirements.

Alongside Rug Couture, we also operate The Natural Rug Store (www.naturalrugstore.co.uk), the UK’s leading specialist in custom natural fibre rugs, offering Coir, Jute, Seagrass, Sisal, Sisool, and Wool with a wide selection of borders. Together, our brands provide one of the most comprehensive offerings in the market for professionals sourcing high-quality, made-to-order rugs.

Name: Pooltime.se - Toth Invest Solutions AB
Description:
Pooltime är en privatägd aktör på svenska poolmarknaden. Vi har varit verksamma inom poolbranschen sedan 2007 och har arbetat med distributionsverksamhet, tillverkning och service och har långtgående kunskaper och kompetens som vi gärna delar med oss av till våra kunder.

På Pooltime har vi endast valt ut leverantörer som håller en hög kvalité och erbjuder bra support för att du som kund inte ska bli besviken av att produkten inte håller rätt kvalité. Våra leverantörer finns i Spanien, Tjeckien, Ungern, Tyskland, Belgien, det vill säga länder som har en längre poolsäsong än vad vi har i Sverige och därmed har bredare sortiment. Poolbranschen utvecklats mycket sedan 2007, från att endast ha installerat cirkulationspump och filter till att under 2020 kunna installera helautomatiserade system med klor, saltklorinator eller aktiv syre. Dessa system har funnits i våra grannländer i många år men det är först nu på senare tid som man även i Sverige har börjat efterfråga denna typ av moderna lösningar.

Vi har valt ut vårt sortiment för att du som kund ska få möjlighet att hitta rätt lösning för just dina behov. Vårt fokus ligger på två poolkonstruktioner: PP Pool som kommer som en hel balja där materialet är miljövänligt och installationen är snabb och Thermopool där poolen kommer i delar och kunden får själv bygga ihop poolen. Inom pooltak har vi valt tre olika leverantörer som representerar budget, mellan och premiumsegmentet. Våra pooltak finns i ultralågt utförande (från endast 38cm i höjd) upp till höga pooltak (med upp till 215cm i höjd).

Description:
SOIGNÉ est le premier care-taker all-inclusive des travaux de caractère et d'exception, pour le résidentiel comme pour l'hôtellerie ou les espaces commerciaux.
Nous sommes la conciergerie des réalisations haut-de-gamme, de la conception originale à la concrétisation du projet. Ceci en dénichant et coordonnant les meilleurs talents (designers, architectes, artisans d'art, entreprises spécialisées…) soigneusement sélectionnés.


Manifesto : 

*** SOIGNÉ, ou s’engager pleinement dans la mission qui nous est confiée : travaux de caractère et d’exception. 
Avec SOIGNÉ, il s’agit d’offrir la rareté et l’exclusivité, seuls apanages du vrai luxe. SOIGNÉ met en lumière la personnalité du commanditaire en sollicitant des artisans maîtres en leur art.

*** SOIGNÉ, ou prendre soin des personnes qui nous font confiance. 
Avec SOIGNÉ, il s’agit de mettre en place une gestion de projet impeccable et innovante qui ne laisse rien au hasard, afin que le client se sente en sécurité, ne retienne que le meilleur de ses travaux et en soit fier.

*** SOIGNÉ, ou prendre soin des personnes avec qui nous travaillons. 
Avec SOIGNÉ, il s’agit de mettre en valeur le savoir-faire, la créativité, les habiletés exceptionnels de chaque contributeur du projet. Dénicher des talents et les révéler au monde, telle est notre ambition : tapissier, ébéniste, peintre, doreur, designer, ingénieur… chacun a un rôle à jouer et chacun mérite lumière et juste valorisation.

*** SOIGNÉ, ou prendre soin, aussi, de la planète. 
Avec SOIGNÉ, il s’agit d’introduire dans chaque projet une conscience écologique et d’innover pour faire toujours mieux sans jamais briser le rêve et la féérie qu’offrent la magnificence et le raffinement.

Name: Prime Surfaces
Description:
Prime Surfaces is an active countertop and tile contractor established on 2018, however our experience in the stone and large format porcelain slab business goes back to 2012, when Leo and Renata founded Stone Center Inc as a distributor and importer of natural stone, quartz, quartzite, soapstone, Vetrazzo and Large Format Porcelain Slabs/Sintered stone. 

Leo and Renata started Prime Surfaces seeing a market opportunity to have good quality installers for large format porcelain slabs / Sintered Stone. Being a Neolith distributor since 2015 as Stone Center, and actively working on sales of Large Format Porcelain Slabs and Sintered Stone, they learned early that a beautiful product would only look amazing with a successful and quality installation. With years of learning the challenges and training fabricators & installers, they decided to open Prime Surfaces to make sure they not only could sell the slabs, but also successfully install the specified projects. In 2020 Neolith bought out Stone Center’s operation and they went to work solely as contractors consistently completing more than 150 projects every year. Most of our projects are, but not limited to Fireplace, Floors, Bathroom and Kitchen Renovation.

Prime Surfaces is specialized in fabrication and installation of: 
Countertop:
Quartzite, Marble, Granite, Soapstone, Onyx, Large format porcelain slab, Sintered stone, Ultra compact surface and Recycled glass

Floors and Tile:
Large format tile, Porcelain, Ceramic, Marble, Pavers, Slate, Travertine and Terrazzo tile.

Description:
Vi startade företaget 2005 med inriktning på att utföra entreprenader i eller i farlig närhet av spår. Vi förser företag med kompetens för att kunna utföra arbeten i eller i farlig närhet av spårområdet. Vi tillhanda håller allt från att delta som konsulter/projektledare i förberedande skede till att tillhandahålla utbildad säkerhetspersonal, Vi kan även ta hand om de administrativa delarna som krävs iför att ta fram alla tillstånd som krävs.  Vi har även dialog och deltar i möten som krävs med Trafikverket, kommunala trafikkontor och drift entreprenörer. Vi utbildar även i de kurser som krävs för att få utföra aktiviteter i Trafikverkets spårområden. Vi utför även delar eller hela entreprenader i farlig närhet av spåranläggningar.

Vi är certifierade enligt Sveriges Byggindustriers ledningssystem POVEL (Processorienterad verksamhetsledning baserat på ISO 9001 kvalitet ISO 14001 miljö samt AFS 2001:1 arbetsmiljö).

Name: Christies Complete Services
Description:
Smart improvements to your Colorado home continue to be one of the single best investments an American family can make. The Consumer Affairs Department of The Financial Planning Association says a remodeling investment is smarter and easier than buying and selling a home in today’s market. It’s rare that moving proves to be a good financial, or emotional, choice.

Today’s Colorado homeowners can add affordable luxuries and space, enjoying their home for many more years, then reaping the benefits at sale time.

Projects such as a bathroom addition, kitchen remodel, or master suite recoup much of their cost in the first year. Remodeling Magazine’s 2006 Cost vs. Value report has a Colorado basement remodel averaging a first year recoup at 86 percent. Two-thirds of homeowners planning a remodel and surveyed by Owens Corning saw it not as a cost, but as an investment—enhanced living space today is money in the bank tomorrow. More than 90 percent of those surveyed felt that they had received as much or more value than they had expected from their investment.

Whether considering a whole house renovation, a new kitchen or bath, a finished basement remodel or an addition, you can trust your home to the experienced professionals at Christie’s Complete Services. Owned by Steve and Diane Christie, who know what's important to the people of Colorado: quality, honesty and value.

We believe that every job is as important. We don't take shortcuts: each customer receives the same high quality craftsmanship and service. We believe that every customer is our most important customer.

Take a look at our portfolio, read what our past clients have to say, then give us a call. Let us show you how we can help improve and increase your investment in your home, help the environment with green technology, and enjoy it for long into your retirement years by using aging-in-place principles of design.

Montage et Démontage : Nos techniciens qualifiés assurent un service de montage et de démontage efficace, en respectant strictement les normes de sécurité pour garantir la protection de tous les intervenants sur le chantier.

I rollen som ”miljöintegratör” bidrar vi till att länka ihop olika aktörer i nya innovativa lösningar och skapa förutsättningar för en branschöverskridande samverkan på regional nivå. Genom att se helheten genererar Econova ömsesidig affärsnytta och miljötjänster för samhället i stort.
