Name: TradeX One
Description:
Tradexone.com's founder was inspired by the idea that financial trading shouldn't be limited to just a few people - we wanted everyone to have access. We've done away with barriers and created an inclusive platform where skilled traders can operate on a level playing field with smaller traders and investors.

Tradexone.com hopes to change the face of trading forever, empowering anyone invested in market trends - regardless of experience or skill level - to engage with what's happening around them regardless of location or background.

Our vision is that one day everyone would be able to invest and trade for themselves. So for this vision to be a reality, we knew we needed to create a platform that made it easy and enjoyable for people to do so. Our three strategic enablers were cutting-edge technology, education and pricing which is fair, transparent and accessible.

A free and extensive education system is not only at the heart of our business
It's at the heart of our community! We began by sourcing a team who believes in investing in individuals, helping those who want to learn. From offering up an engaging platform that can be used from anywhere to hosting Free Webinars and Tutorials on Investmate.com – we are making learning about investing simple for everyone. It doesn’t matter if you have experience or prior knowledge - with the right training, anybody can begin to trade!

Harnessing AI-powered technology to deliver a tailored experience
Using proprietary machine learning technology, we are able to provide our customers with valuable investment tools and resources that will allow individuals to make better financial decisions when it comes time to turn a profit. Our AI program is able to collate data points relevant during pivotal sections of a person's decision-making process and calibrate analytical accounts in correspondence with personal situations regarding things such as employment status or market trends.

Name: La Compagnie des Forestiers
Description:
Créée en 1986, la Compagnie des Forestiers est une PME de 45 salariés située à Lambesc (13), intervenant sur l’ensemble du bassin méditerranéen. Nous sommes spécialisés dans les domaines suivants :
- la prévention des risques naturels (feux de forêt, inondations et crues, tempêtes, sécheresse et canicules) et la restauration des sites dégradés,
- la préservation de la ressource en eau (collecte, stockage, filtration naturelle pour réutilisation) et dans la création, l’amélioration ou la restauration de zone humide,
- la préservation de la biodiversité (mesures d’accompagnement, gestion des espèces envahissantes, par exemple...),
- la gestion du patrimoine arboré, de la forêt, de l’eau, des milieux aquatiques et naturels (entretien, aménagement, restauration),
- et dans la promotion de ces enjeux environnementaux par la création de sentiers pédagogiques, d’observatoires, de cheminements, pour protéger, découvrir et comprendre la nature qui nous entoure.

Name: Anese Srl
Description:
Anese company started its activities in the agricultural sector, gradually expanding its expertise in irrigation, flood management, earthworks, and the removal of lithoid materials. The experience gained over time, combined with a high level of operational precision, has enabled the company to expand into key sectors such as road construction, urban planning, aqueducts, and sewage management, with a particular focus on pipeline installation using both traditional methods and advanced No-Dig technologies.
Today, Anese company stands as a leading reference for specialized projects in both private and public sectors, also providing prompt support to Civil Protection in case of emergencies. The company is highly skilled in No-Dig technologies, with proven expertise in Horizontal Directional Drilling (HDD), a trenchless solution with low environmental impact. This innovative method allows the execution of underground works without open trench excavation, minimizing disruption, reducing intervention times, and limiting the impact on the surrounding environment.
Anese company  is also specialized in soil and riverbank protection, environmental restoration, and drainage systems for both agriculture and industry, contributing to land conservation and optimizing soil productivity. The company also carries out traditional pipeline installation for aqueducts and sewage systems, integrating technological solutions to enhance every phase of the process.
The use of advanced technologies for soil stabilization and land recycling enables applications in road, railway, and airport infrastructure. Thanks to a highly skilled team and an approach centered on innovation and sustainability, Anese company remains a trusted partner for complex projects, delivering state of the art solutions across all areas of operation.

Description:
DEK je skupina společností, které se zabývají dodávkami materiálů a služeb pro stavebnictví. Naše strategie je důsledně orientovaná na prospěch zákazníků. Kromě konkurenčních cen a dodacích podmínek je založena také na vysoké odbornosti a poradenském servisu při dodávkách stavebních materiálů. Správnost této myšlenky se nám každoročně potvrzuje nárůstem našeho obratu i počtu spokojených zákazníků.

Díky naší strategii a soustavným investicím do rozvoje jsme s obratem 36,5 mld. Kč největším dodavatelem v České republice a předním dodavatelem materiálů pro střechy, fasády a izolace ve Slovenské republice. V současné době provozujeme více než 141 prodejních skladů a zaměstnáváme 4477 zaměstnanců.

Společnost DEK a.s. je mateřská firma skupiny DEK, která ovládá všechny dceřiné společnosti. Její jednotlivé části zabezpečují pro dceřiné společnosti servisní činnosti ekonomické, IT, personální, marketingové či provozní povahy.

Name: Tollis
Description:
Reconnu comme l’un des plus complets de France, l’Atelier Tollis intervient dans la restauration d’art et la décoration d’intérieurs. Ses valeurs, son savoir-faire et sa sensibilité artistique, lui valent d’être appelé aussi bien par une clientèle privée haut de gamme que par des établissements de prestige ou des musées nationaux.

RESTAURATIONS HISTORIQUES
Qu’il s’agisse d’édifices architecturaux, de statuaire, d’ornements sculptés ou de décors, ses compagnons ont une parfaite maîtrise des matières : pierre, métal, stuc, staff, gypserie, décors peint, mosaïque, et des techniques : sculpture, dorure, moulage, expertises et conservations préventives…

RESTAURATIONS CONTEMPORAINES
Son approche scientifique et technique vaut également à l’Atelier Tollis d’être apprécié en tant qu’expert en restauration d’œuvres contemporaines.
Il maîtrise les multiples matériaux et supports modernes de l’art du XXème siècle : des bétons aux matières composites, en passant par les métaux et la céramique…

CRÉATIONS  CONTEMPORAINES
Entre tradition et modernité, l’Atelier maîtrise les langages classiques de l’ornement et met son savoir faire au service de la création contemporaine et de la décoration d’intérieurs dans des lieux de prestige : hôtels de luxe, résidences privées, musées, bureaux…
En partenariat avec des architectes d’intérieur et des décorateurs, Tollis participe aussi aux études de conception avant de réaliser un projet.

Description:
Proactive Hazmat & Environmental is a trusted hazardous materials abatement contractor based in Langley, BC—serving communities across British Columbia and Western Canada since 2010 with safe, compliant, and reliable asbestos, lead, and mold removal services. We proudly hold an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau and are committed to maintaining the highest standards of health, safety, and environmental responsibility.

We work closely with a wide range of clients including restoration contractors, healthcare facilities, municipalities, school districts, consulting groups, and property management firms. Our experienced team specializes in everything from small-scale removals to high-risk environments—including infection prevention and control hoarding within active healthcare facilities.

As a WorkSafeBC Licensed Asbestos Abatement Contractor and long-time COR-certified company, we operate with full compliance, professional integrity, and a focus on supporting safe progress on every job site.

We are also proud to be in a Joint Venture with Redpath Environmental, an Indigenously owned waste removal company. This partnership reflects our ongoing commitment to building long-term, respectful relationships with Indigenous businesses and communities across the province.

Our goal is simple: to create safer spaces while supporting the people and partnerships that make British Columbia stronger.

Name: Cornel's Plumbing, Heating & Air
Description:
About Cornel’s Plumbing Heating & Air Conditioning
Our founder, Cornel Morariu, has more than 40 years of experience in the plumbing industry. When he began this journey in his homeland of Romania, the only vehicle he had to carry all of his tools, pipes and fittings was a bicycle.

Today, Cornel’s Plumbing, Heating & Air has more than 35 employees and offers full-service residential plumbing, heating and air. We believe in getting the job done right the first time and providing our customers with 100% satisfaction. If a customer is not completely happy for whatever reason, we will do everything within our power to make it right.

Name: Bowerbird Energy
Description:
Bowerbird Energy is a Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business (SDVOSB) delivering innovative energy and sustainability solutions to federal agencies and large corporations. Specializing in the critical infrastructure sector, we provide tailored strategies to drive sustainability, efficiency, and resilience.

Our mission is to empower clients with expertise in energy management and sustainability, fostering stakeholder collaboration, robust master planning, and seamless strategy execution to meet ambitious energy and decarbonization goals.

ASK US ABOUT:
Green Incentives:
Tax deductions like 179D & 45L, utility energy efficiency rebates, Demand Response, C-PACE financing, and USDA REAP grants.

Energy Services:
Expertise in ESPC/UESC contracting, EnergyStar scoring, LEED accreditation, and compliance with regulations like ISO 50001/14001, NY LL97 & LL88, and DC 24-176. We also offer benchmarking, reporting, and ASHRAE-level audits to ensure performance optimization.

Our Experience
We’ve partnered with the USAF, VA, USDA, NAVFAC, and NATO, leveraging our proven track record to deliver measurable results.

Our Services
Design/Build Construction
Energy Management & M.E.P. Contracting
ASHRAE Energy Audits & Sustainability Planning
Sub/Metering, Measurement & Verification
LED Lighting Retrofits & HVAC Retro-Commissioning
At Bowerbird Energy, we’re committed to advancing energy resilience and sustainability across sectors. Whether it’s navigating green incentives or implementing tailored energy solutions, we deliver value and long-term impact for every client.

Name: Häv och Gräv i Östergötland AB
Description:
Ett ungt och friskt företag med bred kunskap inom mark - och anläggning, stora resurser och ett glatt humör. 

Vi åtar oss dem flesta markjobben, stort som smått. Under de senare åren har vi utfört mycket VA-arbeten med både självfallsledningar och tryckledningar, samt grundläggnings- och finplaneringsentreprenader. Östergötland, Sörmland och Stockholm är vårt verksamhetsområde. 

Häv & Gräv HB startades 2002 av bröderna Karl-Johan och David Andersson, vårt huvudkontor med verkstad ligger i Norrköping. År 2006 bildade vi om bolaget till aktiebolag, Häv & Gräv i Östergötland AB. Idag är vi ca 100 personer sysselsatta i bolaget som projektledning, administration, mättekniker, markarbetare, maskinförare och verkstadspersonal. Omsättningen för 2022 uppgick till 274 miljoner SEK. 

Vi har dokumenterad kvalitets- och miljöledningssystem som uppfyller ISO 9001:2008 och ISO 14001:2004, samt gällande lagar och föreskrifter.

#HighnessVentures #Innovation #Excellence #Growth

Name: NEW GROUP ENGENHARIA E MONTAGENS INDUSTRIAIS
Description:
A New Group Engenharia e Montagens Industriais é parte integrante da Holding Empresarial  controlada pela NewGroup Investments, consolidando sua posição como uma referência no setor industrial. Dentro desta  Holding , a New Group Engenharia e Montagens atua como especialista em soluções integradas e multidisciplinares.
Inserida em um conglomerado de empresas sob a chancela da Holding  NewGroup, a New Group Engenharia e Montagens Industriais  compartilha valores de excelência operacional, compromisso com a qualidade e atendimento às demandas específicas do setor industrial. Além da New Group Engenharia e Montagens, a Holding também abriga a New Eletric, uma empresa dedicada à instalação, montagem e manutenção elétrica e Instrumentação industrial. Essa diversificação de atuação dentro do grupo permite oferecer uma gama completa de serviços.
A nossa Holding de Engenharia é especializada em soluções Multidisciplinares que abrange montagem e manutenção eletromecânica industrial, atendendo a indústrias em todo o Brasil e América do Sul. Com uma abordagem que abrange desde a fase de implantação até a manutenção contínua, destacamo-nos pela nossa expertise em projetos que impulsionam a eficiência e a inovação. Operando como parceiros estratégicos, comprometemo-nos em oferecer soluções personalizadas e sustentáveis, contribuindo para o desenvolvimento contínuo das indústrias e estabelecendo parcerias duradouras baseadas na excelência e no compromisso com o sucesso mútuo.
Os princípios de segurança, saúde e meio ambiente são fundamentais em todas as nossas operações. Empregamos padrões rigorosos para superar as expectativas dos nossos clientes.
Ao escolher a New Group Engenharia e Montagens Industriais, você não apenas obtém soluções multidisciplinares de alta qualidade, mas também se beneficia de uma rede integrada de empresas comprometidas com a excelência e a diversificação de serviços no panorama industrial.

Name: Imdad Energy Contracting “IMDADCO”
Description:
Along with our partners in the Utility PV Development Team, we present solutions and experience in all facets of multi megawatt solar power installation development from securing optimum sites and entitlements to interconnection, operations and maintenance. 

We also provide complete turnkey solutions for concept to commissioning of small solar PV power plant for any capacity for export to grid and off-grid sites, also for roof top installations. These solutions will include design engineering, procurement, construction and commissioning, and also operation & maintenance.

We provide Strategic, Commercial, Technical and Legal and Policy recommendations.

1.  Strategic recommendations: we work with clients in three major areas: GCC market entry, selecting partners, diversifications for GCC existing entities wishing to enter solar market. 

2.  Commercial recommendations:  we help clients to understand the economics of the complete solar value chain from manufacturing to building and operating plants.

3.  Technical recommendations: iEnergy provides technical services to clients through its partners.
 
4. Legal and policy recommendations: iEnergy gives recommendations on the GCC solar market. We track the policy changes day by day, to provide valuable advices to our clients.

Our current Projects:
1) Solar Water Pumping
2) Roof Top Program
3) Solar Panels Yield measurement  Stations
4) Data Collection for Clients

Imdad Hiring Program:
Imdad energy is hiring now, please submit your CV via our web site: WWW.Imdadenergy.com  our HR Department will communicate with you. WE are seeking to fill the following positions: civil Engineer, Mechanical engineer, Architectural Engineer, Autocad Technician, Surveyors. Priority will be given to 10+ yrs expense, working in Engineering Offices, knowledge about Saudi market, and business Ethics.

Name: Roby Services
Description:
Roby Services, your one-stop source for all your electrical, handyman, heating and cooling and plumbing needs. With our signature customer service, extraordinary know-how, and attention to detail, you can trust Roby Services to handle your entire home “to-do” list while you do something more fun!

Roby Services is a member of the @Roby Family of Companies. The Roby Family of Companies has grown into the largest comprehensive construction company in the Carolinas since its first business launched in 1950.

Roby Electric – Specializing in residential and commercial electrical contracting, Roby Electric has been serving the Charlotte area since 1998. Responsible, professional, and affordable, we bring the power to the people, making all the right connections for your home or business.

Roby Heating & Cooling – Home comfort begins and ends with air control. Rely on our Roby Heating & Cooling professionals to maintain, repair, and, if necessary, replace your system so you can truly breathe easy.

Roby Plumbing – As a full-service plumber, Roby Plumbing’s technicians are certified, licensed, and insured. We can successfully fulfill any plumbing need, from repairs and maintenance to complete system installations. Formerly, W.H. Hobbs Plumbing (established in Charlotte in 1920), our technicians have been keeping Charlotte going and flowing for nearly a century.

Name: Inácio Bento, S.A.
Description:
Fabricante de estores interiores, exteriores,  decorativos, motorização e domótica, redes mosquiteiras, portões e pérgolas.

A Inácio Bento, S.A. nasceu da vontade de criar, ver crescer e deixar às gerações futuras um legado assente nos princípios básicos inerentes à empresa: empreendedorismo, dedicação, esforço e responsabilidade social.
Graças ao espírito empreendedor e tenacidade dos seus fundadores, a empresa tem, desde a sua criação em 1983, vindo a crescer cumprindo assim um objectivo primordial: o desenvolvimento de uma organização sólida, sustentável e reconhecida no mercado pelos seus pares e parceiros de negócio.

O foco principal da empresa centra-se na qualidade dos serviços prestados pois, só desta forma, é possível contribuir para o sucesso dos seus clientes e estabelecer com eles uma relação de confiança e interajuda que a todos beneficia. É para eles que se trabalha. É por eles que se dá o melhor.


Projeto Indústria 4.0 – Inácio Bento, S.A.

No âmbito da nossa estratégia de transformação digital e de modernização industrial, estamos entusiasmados em anunciar o lançamento do “Projeto Indústria 4.0 - Inácio Bento, S.A.”. Este investimento visa elevar o nosso nível de competitividade, eficiência e sustentabilidade, integrando novas tecnologias e processos digitais em todas as etapas da produção.

Name: Kraun Electric Inc.
Description:
Kraun Electric Inc. is the leading electrical contractor in the Niagara region in terms of size and service. With offices in St Catharines and Hamilton, our electricians work across southern Ontario, from London to Beaverton and most places in between.

We want to revolutionize how electrical contractors treat their customers, so we prioritize customer satisfaction above all else. Whether you call Kraun for the first time or have been a valued customer for years, we always strive for 100% customer service. 

Our focus on service extends through our four divisions. We have projects and service departments in both the ICI and residential settings. 

In construction, our decades of planning and project management experience guide our ability to maintain or push the pace of the project. You won't be waiting for us to finish your project. It's how we power the potential of our customers. Kraun Electric is managed by individuals with experience ranging from 15 to 40 years in the electrical trade.

Our residential division, Kraun Home Electric, uses a refined combination of professionalism, skill, and customer service to create connections that last. These connections have garnered several hundred five-star reviews and helped Kraun Home Electric steadily grow in the last few years.

To work at our highest potential, we regularly upskill our employees to enhance and expand their abilities. We also pride ourselves on our established apprenticeship program.

Kraun is eager to grow and contribute to your next project or electrical needs. Please feel free to reach out in any way you'd like. We'd be happy to make your acquaintance and work together.

Name: Horizontal Directional Drilling Association (HDDA)
Description:
The HDDA is a trade organization that strives to promote horizontal directional drilling for the utility and pipeline industry.

The overarching goal is to educate Public and Governmental agencies of the Economical and Environmental benefits of Horizontal drilling, as well as HDD limitations. As a group we strive to be non-bias towards the Industry segments represented, or member political views.

Our membership is open to all HDD industry professionals. Each member holding equal status.

Name: Martelli Termoidraulica S.r.l.
Description:
La ditta Martelli Termoidraulica S.r.l. opera nel settore termoidraulico ed energetico dal 1973.
L’esperienza maturata in tutti questi anni, gli standard di alto livello e la qualità dei servizi offerti, ci hanno portato a diventare un punto di riferimento per clienti privati e enti pubblici.
Le competenze tecniche acquisite in più di trent’anni di esperienza sul campo, insieme a frequenti corsi di aggiornamento del personale, ci consentono di mettere a disposizione del cliente una vasta gamma di servizi.
La ditta Martelli Termoidraulica S.r.l. è organizzata ed aggiornata, progetta la soluzione migliore con l’aiuto dei migliori progettisti di Livorno e provincia e garantisce impianti a norma di legge.
Si occupa di qualsiasi impianto quali l’installazione di impianti solari per la produzione di acqua calda domestica e industriale, impianti termici con caldaie autonome e centralizzate, impianti di condizionamento con split-system con portata variabile, installazione di gruppi frigoriferi, deumidificazione ed aspirazione, reti idriche di
fornitura, scarico, sollevamento, ricircolo e depurazione di acqua, impianti antincendio e di irrigazione per aree verdi di qualsiasi tipo.

Nous sommes une entreprise internationale de droit Congolais, fondée en 2016 par M. At Tulsa Pool Boys, we specialize in pool leak detection and repair for both commercial and residential properties. Our team of skilled technicians is equipped with the latest tools and technology to locate leaks in underground plumbing, skimmers, returns, and more. By conducting thorough pressure tests and utilizing our expertise, we can pinpoint the exact source of the leak and provide efficient solutions.

We understand the importance of timely repairs to prevent further damage and costly repairs in the future. Whether it's a minor crack or a major plumbing issue, our experienced professionals will handle the repair with precision and skill. From skimmer replacements to concrete finishing, we have the knowledge and resources to address a wide range of pool repair needs.

At Tulsa Pool Boys, we pride ourselves on delivering top-notch customer service. We strive to exceed your expectations by providing accurate assessments, transparent pricing, and prompt service. Our goal is not only to fix your pool leak but also to ensure your complete satisfaction throughout the process.

Don't let a pool leak disrupt your swimming season. Contact Tulsa Pool Boys today for reliable pool leak detection and repair services. Visit our website or give us a call to schedule an appointment. Trust our expertise to keep your pool in optimal condition, allowing you to enjoy a leak-free and worry-free swimming experience.

Fra en Kaskadeløsning af Luft / Vand varmepumpe på Elefanthuset i Knuthenborg, til en luft /luft varmepumpe i det mindre sommerhus i Karrebæksminde, spænder vi bredt og er glade for at kunne tilbyde vores ekspertise. Vi går meget op i solidt kvalitetshåndværk, samtidig med fleksibel og kundevenlig betjening. Det skal nemlig være nemt og behageligt at være kunde hos os, og det er vigtigt, at du føler dig tryg.

Her udover er vi OK-partner og kører olie-, gas- og varmepumpe-service hos mere end 3.500 kunder. Vores ambition er at kunne tilbyde solidt kvalitetshåndværk, samtidig med fleksibel og kundevenlig betjening.

Vores medlemskab af TEKNIQ Arbejdsgiverne er din garanti for håndværk af god kvalitet. Det sikrer, at vi foretager kvalitetskontrol på det arbejde, vi udfører, og derfor kan du føle dig helt tryg når du overlader dine opgaver til os.

Sørby VVS & El-Service sætter en stor ære i, at arbejdet altid afleveres til rette tid, til aftalte pris og med kvaliteten i top.

Description:

Herman – Cor & Riea’s son – joined the newly founded company in 1966. At that time, the young company kept busy doing service work and completing small residential jobs in Red Deer, Lacombe, Sylvan Lake, and surrounding areas.

The company hired its first employee in 1968, and by 1975 had grown to include 65 employees.

Over the years, Bruin’s has continued to expand & diversify. Herman Bruin took on the role of President in 1988 when Cor retired. The company continues to lead and innovate in plumbing, gas fitting and HVAC (Heating Ventilation and Air Conditioning) trades providing service, renovation and construction services from the smallest of residential jobs to multi-million dollar projects.

Name: PROTorch
Description:
About PROTorch Inc.
PROTorch Inc. is a national leader in heavy industrial torch cutting, specializing in scrap metal processing, industrial dismantling, and precision torch operations for high-risk, high-volume environments.

We serve large corporate scrapyards, demolition contractors, energy companies, and government agencies—including projects involving wind turbines, power plants, railcars, marine structures, refineries, mechanical rooms, and Department of Defense (DoD) assets.

Our team of Torch Operator Engineers completes a rigorous 12-month apprenticeship that includes licensing, safety testing, and hands-on certification in high-performance metal cutting. Their speed, precision, and safety performance are unmatched in the industry.

Every PROTorch crew is led by a certified Site Supervisor trained in emergency response, cryogenic gas safety, fire watch, and field reporting. We guarantee consistent compliance, efficiency, and communication from start to finish.

Whether you need to dismantle outdated infrastructure or prepare high-volume material for mill specs, PROTorch delivers scalable, safe, and production-driven results.

Name: Terranova
Description:
Na Terranova, estamos transformando o mercado funerário brasileiro. Nossa causa é clara: criar um novo paradigma para o luto, onde respeito, acolhimento e inovação se unem para oferecer espaços dignos e humanizados. 

Lutamos contra as limitações de um setor historicamente negligenciado, superando burocracias, padrões ultrapassados e falta de cuidado com as famílias e com o meio ambiente. Nosso propósito é maior do que apenas construir cemitérios. Queremos transformar a maneira como o Brasil lida com a memória e o luto, criando espaços que celebram a vida e deixam um legado duradouro para as gerações futuras. 

Por que existimos? Para transformar a forma como o Brasil lida com o luto, rompendo padrões antigos e criando um legado de respeito, acolhimento e modernidade.

Como fazemos isso? Através de um ecossistema de negócios funerários, utilizando tecnologias inovadoras e processos humanizados que proporcionam uma nova experiência de luto.

O que entregamos? Franquias de cemitérios, memoriais, crematórios e planos de benefícios que combinam excelência operacional com propósito social.

Somos a marca que lidera essa revolução. Com 
mais de uma década de experiência e dezenas de projetos realizados em todas as regiões do país, a Terranova é sinônimo de autoridade e transformação. Convidamos você a fazer parte dessa mudança!

Name: Smart Tech Contracting, LLC
Description:
Smart Tech Contracting is a master systems integrator that pairs deep design expertise with turnkey execution. From concept to commissioning, we deliver advanced BAS, PLC, and SCADA systems for hyperscale data centers, enterprise campuses, and edge facilities across the U.S.

What We Do

• Design & Engineering: Controls and electrical design packages aligned with hyperscale owner standards, codes, and fast-paced schedules.
• Turnkey Implementation:  Factory-built or field-installed systems delivered under one contract, minimizing interface risk and accelerating time-to-power.
• Graphical Standards: High-efficiency UI/UX and data-center-ready graphics for multi-GW portfolios.
• Central Plant Optimization (CPO):  Adaptive controls and proven logic that reduce PUE and boost mechanical resilience.
• Enterprise Monitoring & Analytics:  Platform-neutral dashboards, FDD, alarming, and data ingestion tailored to SLA-driven environments.

Our Philosophy

We deliver right-sized, platform-agnostic solutions. Whether a 200 MW campus or a single-tenant edge site, our integrated architectures are built for performance, resiliency, and future scale. We thrive in complex environments, first-of-kind integrations, and high-urgency rollouts.

Why STC

• Nationwide hyperscale track record
• Deep fluency in leading controls, DCIM & integration platforms
• ISO-driven processes, rigorous QA/QC, and zero-incident safety culture
• Transparent communication and hands-on support from concept to service
• Value-driven delivery with lower total cost of ownership

Name: DJ Mace
Description:
DJ Mace and Son (Electrical Contractors) Limited was started in 1977 by David Mace after working for Callas Sons & May within Reading for 20 years. The business grew slowly building a close and loyal customer base, some of whom the company still work with today.

In 1982 the company became members of the Nation Inspection Council for Electrical Installation Engineers (NICEIC) holding 'Approved Contractor' status, a position we still hold today.

In 1985 David's son, Philip, joined as an apprentice and completed a full 5 year apprenticeship becoming a fully qualified Electrician. Philip worked in the company until 1991 when a downturn in the industry dictated that he find work elsewhere.

In 2001 Philip re-joined the business having gained a wealth of experience working for a larger company in sales and management. From this point on the company steadily grew and in 2003 David Mace decided to retire from the management of the company and Philip took over.

In January 2011, David’s daughter, Wendi, joined to run the office and has introduced systems to streamline the processes and improve efficiency and clarity within the company.  Wendi draws on over 30 years of administrative and management experience to assist and advise Philip in the running of the company.

In 2011 we employed Darren Buckland as Contracts Manager to head up the commercial element of our business and look after the day to day running of the site teams. Darren has over 30 years experience as an electrician working on commercial projects.

As we have steadily grown the business working with some high profile clients, we now have 3 team leaders, a number of directly employed electricians, apprentices and a select group of direct sub-contractors which we work with on larger projects.

If you would like to get in touch, then please contact us.

Many thanks,
Philip Mace & Wendi Stimpson
DJ Mace & Son (Electrical Contractors) Limited

Phone: 0118 988 8860

Fourniture de pièces d’usures et services de maintenance industrielle.

 Fournir des solutions de soudure de qualité supérieure, adaptées aux exigences spécifiques de chaque projet.

 Réparation et Reconditionnement : Nous excellerons dans la fourniture de services de réparation et de reconditionnement pour une variété d'outils industriels.
 Conseil et Expertise : Nos clients bénéficient de notre expertise pour optimiser l'utilisation et la maintenance de leurs équipements.
 Solutions Sur Mesure : Nous adaptons nos services pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chaque projet, garantissant ainsi des résultats optimaux.

Pourquoi Naval Industries ?

 Une expertise reconnue et une expérience approfondie dans le domaine de la soudure spécialisée.
 Une approche axée sur le client, garantissant des solutions personnalisées et efficaces.
 Un engagement envers l'innovation et l'utilisation des technologies de pointe.

Visitez notre site web navalindustrie.fr ou contactez-nous : 06.51.02.32.88/contact@navalindustrie.fr

Name: VRF of South Carolina
Description:
Welcome to VRF of South Carolina, your trusted partner in VRF/VRV solutions. With a singular focus on VRF/VRV projects, we stand as a beacon of excellence in the HVAC industry. Our commitment lies in delivering unparalleled expertise and unwavering dedication to all aspects of VRF systems.

Our Specialization

At VRF of South Carolina, VRF/VRV is not just a service, it's our passion. We specialize in a comprehensive range of services that cater to the diverse needs of our clients:

VRF/VRV Project Installations: We are well-versed in the intricacies of VRF/VRV project installations across a spectrum of brands including Daikin, Trane, LG, Samsung, and more. Our meticulous approach ensures that every installation is executed flawlessly, meeting the highest industry standards.

Factory Startups: As industry experts, we extend our expertise to fellow HVAC contractors by providing factory startups for new VRF systems. Our knowledge and experience become your advantage, guaranteeing a smooth and efficient system initialization.

Predictive & Preventive Maintenance Programs: Proactive care is the cornerstone of longevity. Our predictive and preventive maintenance programs are tailored to keep your VRF systems operating at peak performance. We believe in staying ahead of potential issues to save you time, money, and operational disruption.

Forensic Troubleshooting: Problematic VRF systems need a diagnostic touch that goes beyond the surface. Our skilled team excels in forensic troubleshooting, delving deep into existing VRF systems to unearth issues, provide solutions, and restore optimal functionality.

Emergency Repairs and Service Calls: HVAC emergencies can strike at any time. With our swift response and comprehensive expertise, we ensure that your VRF/VRV systems regain operation quickly, minimizing downtime and discomfort.

Name: PHCC TEXAS
Description:
Plumbing-Heating-Cooling-Contractors Association of Texas

PHCC Texas is your Resource for Leadership, Networking, Advocacy, Texas Preferred Service Providers, and Education. PHCC Texas proudly provides Texas State Board of Plumbing Examiners approved plumbing continuing education and HVAC continuing education, plus training in Medical Gas, Residential and Commercial Code, OSHA, Lead Paint Certification, Fire Sprinkler Installation, and Backflow Prevention Tester.  We also offer test prep training for the Master Test, the Journeyman Tradesman Test and a revolutionary Plumbing Apprenticeship Training Program. Our instructors are qualified, experienced, and professional.  Year round classes are generously discounted for all PHCC members and their employees.

 We are driven by the needs of our members to add value by: Being the primary legislative and regulatory watchdog and advocate for the plumbing, heating and cooling industry in Texas; delivering quality education events and opportunities including pre-licensing preparatory courses and state-mandated continuing education programs; developing and subscribing to the highest level of ethical standards and other measures of excellence for our customers satisfaction; providing information dissemination through a variety of forms including networking, mentoring and collaborative contractor problem solving; and creating cooperative discount product and service opportunities to assist our members in remaining competitive.

We take great pride in our reputation as not only a leading provider of plumbing continuing education and HVAC continuing education but also as a strong advocate working on behalf of the plumbing, heating and cooling industry.  It is only through the support of our membership that we are able to stay at the forefront of our industry, offering first-rate service to our members.

Name: POWER FCA Sagl
Description:
POWER FCA Sagl opera nella distribuzione materiali per impianti energetici da Fonti Rinnovabili e realizzazione chiavi in mano, collaudo e ottenimento incentivi di Impianti per l'indipendenza e l'efficienza energetica, sia ad uso residenziale che industriale: Fotovoltaico, Accumulatori di Energia Elettrica, Wallbox (Ricarica Veicoli Elettrici) e Pompe di Calore per Riscaldamento, Climatizzazione e produzione Acqua Calda Sanitaria. 

POWER FCA Sagl, gestisce l'intero processo di realizzazione di impianti energetici da fonti rinnovabili, residenziali e grandi impianti "chiavi in mano" garantendo la massima qualità in tutte le fasi: dallo studio di fattibilità, alla progettazione, dalla scelta dei componenti, alla direzione lavori e all'installazione, dal finanziamento all'assicurazione, dalla gestione dell'iter burocratico, all'avvio in esercizio dell'impianto, fino all'ottenimento degli incentivi in essere. 

POWER FCA Sagl è sinonimo di professionalità, capace di rispondere in maniera efficace e completa alle diverse esigenze del mercato. L'azienda si avvale di personale specializzato ed è capace di venire incontro ad ogni esigenza, realizzando soluzioni totalmente personalizzate, scegliendo i materiali più appropriati e la tecnologia più idonea in base al luogo, alla tipologia e alla dimensione dell'impianto, con l'obiettivo di massimizzare le prestazioni energetiche del sistema. L'alta qualità dei prodotti e dei servizi proposti è garantita dall'attenzione per il dettaglio, dalla fase progettuale alla installazione dell'impianto, fino alla gestione di tutto l'iter burocratico. 
POWER FCA ha organizzato la propria struttura creando le apposite Divisioni Specialistiche, elevando così a sistema la produzione di soluzioni su misura. - Divisione GRANDI IMPIANTI Per aziende, enti pubblici e investitori, disponiamo del settore Grandi Impianti, che opera nello sviluppo e realizzazione "chiavi in mano" di impianti fotovoltaici di grandi dimensioni, a terra e su copertura.

Name: MUD WORK
Description:
Velkommen til MUD WORK,

Vi er passionerede fortalere for ler og kalkpuds – de ældste byggematerialer, der trækker tråde tilbage til oldtiden. Disse materialer skaber ikke blot smukke rum med deres naturlige æstetik og taktile karakter, men også en omfavnende atmosfære, der taler til sanserne. Vores fokus på ler og kalk går ud over æstetikken; det handler om bæredygtighed for menneskers velbefindende i dagligdagen og et afgørende skridt i retning af den grønne omstilling inden for byggeri, design og arkitektur.

Desværre er disse fantastiske bio- og naturbaserede materialers utrolige egenskaber blevet overset i moderne tider til fordel for mindre sunde alternativer. Her træder MUD WORK ind i billedet. Vi er drevet af vores dybe lidenskab og kærlighed til ler og kalkpuds. Gennem vores ekspertise og erfaring inden for disse materialer har vi gjort det til vores mission at fremme deres brug og kendskab, og genindføre dem i moderne byggeri og arkitektur.

MUD WORK præsenterer et udvalg af markedets mest innovative og førsteklasses ler- og kalkprodukter. Vi er mere end blot en leverandør; vi er din partner. Vi støtter arkitekter, designere, bygherre og andre fagfolk med salg, rådgivning og udførelse.

I dybet af MUD WORK banker en lidenskab for tekstur. For os er tekstur ikke bare en ubetydelig detalje – det udgør sjælen i vores arbejde. Vi tror på, at tekstur ikke blot giver overflader liv, men også tilføjer en dybde og karakter, der rækker langt ud over det visuelle. Gennem vores dygtige anvendelse af forskellige teknikker formår vi at skabe en bred vifte af teksturer med passion.

Vores arbejde er meget mere end blot teknikker og materialer. Det er drevet af en passion for at inspirere. Vi tror på, at hvert eneste rum har en stemning at dele, en følelse at fremkalde og en historie at fortælle. Og i vores øjne er ler og kalk de fortællingsmæssige vidundere, der giver liv til disse rum.

Name: Lowery Fence & Patio
Description:
We Focus on and Exhibit Quality, Integrity and Communication.
These are not just Beliefs, They are genuinely Practiced.
They are Foundational and your very first interaction and business with us will bear-out this commitment.

Overall perceived VALUE of work performed is often a broad spectrum of price, quality, workmanship, responsiveness, punctuality, communication, follow up, reputation, dependability, consistency, customer review history, human interaction and respect. And, although we strongly strive and desire to be the low-price Leader, (and routinely We Are!) we key our work toward being your Best Value... We work hard to maintain the highest quality of materials, workmanship and business/client relationships, but also keep a keen sensitivity to Affordability.

The old adage that … "The Disappointment of Low Quality lingers Long After the happiness of a Low Price is forgotten.. " can often be relevant to those that believe “cheaper is always better”.

We strive to uphold Quality and Overall Value… Some, maybe not the most thoughtful of customers, want the Lowest Price... They're conditioned to believe this is their single objective... But this is only true when the delivered end-products and overall purchase experience are identical... Customers and clients know this intuitively, but sometimes fail to consider the whole picture.

We continuously try to Cultivate customer/client Trust and Balanced Expectations...

If a customer wants the Low Price, that's just fine, we can work together and find a way to deliver that objective, but Never compromise quality or reputation... This is universally true whether you are buying a beautiful, strong, new fence system or other types of purchases.

Our Customers often tell us that our sincere Responsiveness and clear Communication were important in selecting us here at Lowery Fence & Patio to do their job.. 

So call us today and let’s get started!

O Estúdio BIM é um Escritório de Engenharia, Tecnologia e Educação voltada ao segmento da Construção Civil, especificamente na área de BIM (Modelagem da Informação da Construção), uma nova metodologia que agrega confiabilidade e modernidade à informação.

Nascida e sediada em Pato Branco/PR, oferecemos prestação de serviços com foco no projeto e integração de empreendimentos, desde a sua concepção arquitetônica até as fases finais de construção e posterior manutenção da vida útil da edificação.

Nosso escritório é especializado na Modelagem de Empreendimentos em BIM, como também na criação de Objetos BIM para fabricantes, garantindo a competitividade no fornecimento de catálogos online para as ferramentas BIM mais populares do mercado, inclusive com classificações internacionais (OmniClass, Uniclass e NBS).

Através da pesquisa e desenvolvimento contínuos, desenvolvemos métodos de inovação para criar soluções práticas e acessíveis aos nossos parceiros.

Nossa missão é contribuir com o crescimento e modernização da Construção Civil, através da implementação e democratização do acesso à educação BIM, capacitando os atuais e futuros profissionais da Engenharia e Arquitetura.

Com know-how na metodologia BIM aplicado em grandes indústrias, como no setor de celulose, agronegócios, indústrias em geral e residenciais, ao longo de nossa história já atendemos empresas como Bracell, Bunge, VLI, Paques, BTP, entre outras multinacionais atuantes em território brasileiro, sempre com a máxima qualidade em nossas entregas digitais.

Name: Clear Choice Bath
Description:
Clear Choice Bath originated from Marble Works, Inc., which was founded in 2003 by Toby Tyler in his hometown of Carlisle, IA, a suburb of Des Moines, IA. Toby started in the home improvement industry in 1992 working as a finish carpenter and remodeling contractor. During this time he began fabricating custom countertops. Engineered composite vanity countertops was a product that he would buy from various vendors to put into many of his projects. Toby was unsatisfied with his vendor options in terms of quality, product offering, customization and lead times and he knew there needed to be a better option in the market place. This vision of a higher quality, full service product offering eventually gave birth to Marble Works, Inc and Clear Choice Bath.

In 2008, with a great team of sales, installation, office and production personnel in place, Toby began plans to expand the reach of Marble Works and Clear Choice Bath to Minneapolis, MN & Pensacola, FL in addition to Des Moines.  Now homeowners in Des Moines, Minneapolis, & Pensacola can find the premium quality bathroom products and service that Clear Choice Bath offers!

What began in a 2,000 sq. ft. building with 2 employees in Iowa has grown to occupy over 20,000 sq. ft. and employ people in 4 states. Clear Choice Bath prides itself in our manufacturing and providing premium bathroom remodeling products and service. We know our hundreds of valued customers over the years have appreciated being able to work with a reliable, experienced, and professional bathroom contractor who listens to your needs and vision, who makes sure that we deliver the highest quality renovations.

Name: Bundanoon Sandstone Quarry
Description:
WORLD-CLASS SANDSTONE

Bundanoon Sandstone brings you timeless beauty and longevity—thousands of years in the making.
Bundanoon Sandstone is a cornerstone of Australian sandstone history. Established in 1850, it was one of the nation’s earliest sandstone enterprises. Today, under the leadership of Mizuki and Troy Stratti, Bundanoon Sandstone Quarry continues to uphold its legacy while setting new benchmarks in sandstone extraction, craftsmanship, and supply. Together, they have developed and now operate the quarry, ensuring premium-quality Australian sandstone is available to projects both locally and internationally.
Discerning clients across Australia, the US, and Asia choose Bundanoon Sandstone for its:

    •    Ethically sourced sandstone – Mined, cut, and dressed on-site in Australia
    •    100% pure sandstone, skilfully calibrated for diverse building applications
    •    Broad product range, suitable for almost any built environment
    •    Exceptional stone processing, backed by decades of experience and rigorous quality management

At Bundanoon Sandstone, we combine traditional quarrying techniques with precision technology to extract only the highest quality sandstone. Our skilled team meticulously cut, shape, and dress each block to meet precise construction specifications, ensuring every project benefits from the durability, workability, and aesthetic appeal of genuine Australian sandstone.

With Mizuki and Troy Stratti at the helm, Bundanoon Sandstone Quarry has re-emerged as a leading force in the industry, securing its place as a trusted supplier for heritage restoration, premium architecture, and large-scale infrastructure projects. From historic restorations to contemporary designs, our sandstone continues to shape landscapes and structures that will endure for generations.
Bundanoon Sandstone: A legacy of excellence, built to last.

Owned by more than 4,400 Alutiiq Shareholders, Koniag’s social mission originated with our Alutiiq ancestors who have called our region home for thousands of years. Our values are a part of everything that we do—every engagement and investment decision is a reflection of our commitment to living our culture. When Koniag’s employees and customers thrive, the business is successful and offers educational scholarships, elder benefits, dividends, and other critical services for our Alutiiq Shareholders and their Descendants.

Name: AK GLOBAL
Description:
Tillgänglighet och säkerhet i framkant

AK GLOBAL är ett svenskt konsultföretag specialiserat på tillgänglighet, säkerhet och innovativa lösningar. Vi hjälper företag, organisationer och offentliga aktörer att skapa inkluderande miljöer där alla, oavsett funktionsvariation, kan delta på lika villkor.

Tillgänglighet och säkerhet – en strategisk investering

Tillgänglighet och säkerhet går hand i hand. Forskning visar att en välplanerad och tillgänglig miljö minskar olycksrisker och ökar tryggheten för alla användare. Dessutom är över 20% av Sveriges befolkning i behov av bättre anpassade miljöer. Att investera i tillgänglighet innebär därför inte bara laguppfyllelse – det stärker varumärket, förbättrar användarupplevelsen och skapar affärsmöjligheter.

Innovation driver oss framåt

Vi utvecklar framtidens lösningar genom att integrera den senaste forskningen och tekniken inom tillgänglighet och säkerhet. Vårt mål är att skapa miljöer som fungerar i verkligheten – inte bara på papper.

Våra tjänster
	•	Rådgivning & konsultation för byggherrar, arkitekter och fastighetsägare.
	•	Inventering & åtgärdsplanering för bättre tillgänglighet och säkerhet.
	•	Utbildningar & föreläsningar om lagstiftning och praktisk tillämpning.
	•	Innovativa produkter & lösningar för tillgänglighetsanpassning.

Med kontor i Ystad och samarbeten över hela Skandinavien skapar vi hållbara och framtidssäkra miljöer.

Om oss

AK GLOBAL leds av Andreas Olsson och Kristian Farkas, två experter med lång erfarenhet av tillgänglighet, säkerhet och innovation.

 Vill ni skapa en mer tillgänglig, säker och innovativ framtid?
 info@akglobal.se |  www.akglobal.se

Daarnaast ondersteunen we productiebedrijven met industrieel onderhoud, reparaties en revisiewerk. Zo voorkomen we stilstand en zorgen we dat installaties optimaal blijven presteren.

Bij Butech vinden vakmensen een technisch uitdagende omgeving met afwisseling, maatwerkprojecten en ruimte om te groeien.
Bij onze klanten staan we bekend als een nuchtere, betrouwbare en flexibele partner die meedenkt en kwaliteit levert.

RVS-constructies, machinebouw, onderhoud en CNC-verspaning, alles onder één dak.

Taahhüt çatısı altındaelektrik ve mekanik dalında endüstri tesisleri ve nitelikli binalarda uygulama ve proje anlamında doğru ve nitelikli kadro ile zamanında ve hataların minimize edildiği sistemi dizayn eder ve doğru ürünleri kullanın ve Ürün ihtiyaçlarınızda uzman ekibimiz en güvenilir markalı ürünleri, hızlı ve uygun maliyetlerle tedarik eder.

- Isıtma Soğutma ve Buhar Tesisatı

- Klima ve Havalandırma Tesisatı

- Yangın Tesisatları

- Basınçlı Hava ve Proses Tesisatları

- Temiz Soğuk ve Sıcak (Domestik) Su (Kullanım Suyu) Sistemi

HİZMETLER


Simge ENDÜSTRİ AŞ olarak deneyimli ekibimiz ile planlamaları ve organizasyonu becerileriyle ve müşteri memnuniyetini önemseyerek düşük maliyetlerle gerçekleştirebiliyoruz. Teknik deneyim ve disiplinleri bir araya getirerek, mühendislik, proje kontrolü, planlama, tedarik, risk yönetimi gibi tüm projenizin her alanında size destek oluyoruz. Projelerin başarılı bir şekilde teslim edilmesi, risklerin en aza indirilmesi, yatırım getirisinin üst düzeyde tutulması gibi tüm önemli konuları dikkatli planlama ile hizmet veriyoruz.


PROJE SÜRECİ

Projenin ihtiyaç, risk ve hedeflerinin belirlenmesi, mekanik ve elektrik tesisatın projelendirilmesi, doğru maliyetin hesaplanması, malzeme temini, montaj ve devreye alma, kontrol ve kapanış.

We are truly a company that never rests. You will always find a JHE person working for you at all times of the day, any day of the week. Our trading staff speaks English, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Indian, Mandarin, Cantonese and Indonesian/Malay dialects, which enables us to easily and effectively communicate with our global clientele.

Name: AV Coatings
Description:
Unlike our competitors AV Coatings evolved from a background in heavy engineering. This, coupled with our extensive knowledge of polyurea and polyurethane technology enables us to provide our services within the following sectors:
•	 Oil, gas & renewables –We design and manufacture surface and subsea buoyancy modules using rotational moulding and polyurethane foam.  Some of our clients include Trinity house, Tekmar, Supergrip, Swansea University and Sub Sea Energy Solutions.  

•	Industrial – Our bespoke wear and corrosion resistant coatings are used extensively in the mining, quarrying and other high wear environments. This includes hoppers, augers, storage vessels and pump casings to name a few. Some of our clients include LNG, FLSmidth, Van Oord, Aggregate Industries and Boskalis.

•	Defence – We have developed a number of novel uses for polyurea and polyurethanes for the DSTL. As part of an SME, we have successfully completed a number of Defence and Security Accelerator (DASA) projects for the open call for innovation. Some of these include COSK (Phase 1, 2 & 3), F-Gap (phase 1 & 2) and VAPs (phase 1).

•	Retail – We manufacture retail displays and changing room seating. Our clients include Primark, Studio XAG, Cardinal shop Fitting, Dula and Railston. 

•	Civils – We carry out geo-stabilisation and concrete jacking using polyurethane resins. Our specialist polyurea protective coatings are used to waterproof multi-story carparks, bridges, tunnels and primary/secondary containments. We can apply up to 900 sq.m. of polymer per day. Some of our clients include Sika, Restek UK, Highways England, Eurovia and Local Authorities.

Wilsons Company History:
In 1909, Wilsons started a coal company to supply fuel to the buildings they built, as well as others in the region. As the business focus changed from construction to fuel, the present name of Wilson Fuel Co. Limited was adopted. Wilsons was the only Nova Scotia coal company to make the transition from coal to oil while remaining independent of multinational oil companies. Name: National Emergency Generator Dealer Association - NEGDA
Description:
NEGDA is a regional trade association dedicated to supporting and empowering generator dealers in the Northeastern US. By providing networking opportunities, promoting knowledge exchange, and advocating for its members, NEGDA plays a crucial role in enhancing the professionalism and success of generator dealers in the region.

The primary mission of NEGDA is to elevate the standards and expertise of its members. By encouraging collaboration and interaction within a community of successful dealers, NEGDA creates a platform where valuable knowledge and insights can be shared. Through regular meetings, conferences, and events, members have the opportunity to forge meaningful relationships, learn from one another’s experiences, and stay up-to-date with the latest developments in the field.

We recognize that knowledge is power and we actively promote sharing industry-related information among our membership. By pooling our collective experiences, dealers stay informed about emerging trends, advancements, best practices, and other relevant topics. This knowledge-sharing approach ensures that dealers can continuously improve their business practices, enhance customer satisfaction, and remain competitive in the ever-evolving generator market.

In addition to networking and knowledge-sharing, we also represent a unified voice for generator dealers in the North/Northeastern US. NEGDA advocates for the interests and concerns of its members, both within the industry and in the wider business community. By amplifying the collective voice of dealers, NEGDA effectively addresses issues, promotes favorable business conditions, and fosters an environment that supports the growth and success of our members.

Name: Tolay Engineering & Construction
Description:
It is a common preference that various solutions should exist in diverse types of construction areas for needs in working and living areas that are needed in 21st. Century World. Construction of a residential project, business center or an industrial facility is not preferred alone. Most of the time, multi-purpose complex structures that meet various needs are designed. Each and every day, many structures are converted to complex structures that include living areas, shopping centers, social areas, swimming pools, sports, recreation, cultural areas, concert halls and sometimes small production areas. 
In line with these general tendencies, integrated structural solutions that are developed by the experts in work disciplines coming together to meet various needs that are considered in construction of structures. At this point, TOLAY Engineering and Construction brings together various business lines and disiplines in the sector within its organizations and departments and continues its operations based on its vision of generating integrated solutions at single point. In several decades, market needs turns on volatile, uncertain, complex and ambiguous.  
Construction works constitute only the second or even the third part of all these needs. The overall solution of the projects starts with the budget at the beginning, while the secondary solutions end with the demands, business plans and usually the last technical details. Budget creation, cash flow planning, business model and payment options solution actually constitute the most important point of a project. Since our company has developed so many businesses in this way in its 20-year working life, it has a lot of experience in this field.

Description:
Air Support Heating and Air is a veteran-owned and family-operated HVAC company. Founded by two brothers, Joe and Chayse, both with strong military backgrounds, we bring precision, dedication, and a unique sense of mission to the heating and air conditioning industry.

Our Story:
Joe, an experienced Osprey pilot, and Chayse, a former Marine Raider, embarked on a new mission: to provide unparalleled HVAC services while upholding the values of trust, integrity, and excellence that define the armed forces. Drawing on their military discipline and teamwork, they established Air Support Heating and Air as a symbol of reliability and dependability.

Why Choose Air Support:
Precision and Expertise: Just as Joe navigated the skies with precision, our team delivers expert knowledge and top-notch skills to every HVAC project. Whether it's installation, repair, or maintenance, we ensure the job is done right the first time.

Rapid Response: We understand the urgency of HVAC issues, which is why we prioritize quick response times and prompt service. Your comfort is our immediate concern.

Military-Grade Efficiency: Chayse's military background instilled discipline, translating into our efficient work ethic. We respect your time and budget, delivering results with the utmost efficiency.

Family Values: As a family-owned business, we treat our clients like family. We prioritize creating a comfortable and safe environment within your home.

Unbeatable Customer Service: We are dedicated to building lasting relationships. Our friendly team is always ready to address your questions, concerns, and maintenance needs.

Our Services:
HVAC Installation: Whether it's a new system or an upgrade, we provide precise installation services to maximize efficiency and comfort.
HVAC Repair: From minor fixes to major overhauls, we diagnose and repair HVAC systems quickly and effectively.
HVAC Maintenance: Comprehensive maintenance programs to keep your systems in top condition.

Name: CleanUP Facility Management
Description:
Clean Up Facility Management è un'azienda leader nel settore delle soluzioni multiservizi per le imprese, con anni di esperienza e un team di esperti pronti a soddisfare ogni esigenza. Offriamo una vasta gamma di servizi pensati per migliorare l'efficienza e la qualità degli spazi lavorativi, tra cui pulizia ordinaria e straordinaria, manutenzione impianti, RSPP, sanificazione e disinfestazione.

Il nostro approccio si distingue per la personalizzazione del servizio: analizziamo le necessità specifiche di ogni cliente, offrendo soluzioni su misura che garantiscono risultati ottimali. Utilizziamo tecnologie avanzate e prodotti ecologici, rispettando l'ambiente e la sicurezza degli spazi. Ogni intervento è realizzato con attenzione alla qualità, all'efficienza e alla puntualità.

Un valore aggiunto è la figura del nostro CEO, che ricopre anche il ruolo di RSPP (Responsabile del Servizio di Prevenzione e Protezione), garantendo il pieno rispetto delle normative di sicurezza sul lavoro e tutelando la salute e il benessere dei lavoratori. Questo impegno per la sicurezza e la qualità si riflette in ogni aspetto dei nostri servizi.

La soddisfazione del cliente è la nostra priorità. Ci impegniamo a mantenere elevati standard di servizio, con una costante disponibilità e un'attenzione particolare a ogni dettaglio. Grazie all’esperienza consolidata e alla capacità di adattarci alle diverse esigenze, Clean Up rappresenta il partner ideale per tutte le aziende che cercano soluzioni professionali, sicure ed efficienti per la gestione dei propri spazi.

Per maggiori informazioni, visita il sito www.cleanupfacility.it.

Description:
Founded in 2000, Prestige Power Washing works with owners & property managers to maintain the clean exterior of their properties. Starting our business in Greater St Louis Mo.

We are licensed, bonded, insured & in compliance with OSHA & EPA regulations.  We offer our exterior services to clean *parking garages *medical buildings *hotels *casinos *amusement parks *strip malls *storefronts *churches *arenas /stadiums *hospitals *office buildings *condos *airports *apartment complexes *restaurants *warehouse ramps *.

Whatever your need, we are here to help you protect your investment and the value of your real estate.

We use acid-free, biodegradable soaps to give effective, clean results while also protecting your property, the environment & our crews. Along with the safe soaps and concrete cleaners, we also use the proper technique of either soft-wash, low-pressure, high-pressure or heated applications. 

At sidewalk cafes, service stations & building entryways discarded gum appears as round black stains & is unsightly. Regular power washers cannot remove the gum but with our heated applications we can take care of that for you. Drive-Thru lanes & Parking Garages have oil & grease stains, along with other contaminants that give a garage a dull, dirty look. Let Prestige clean it up. Any concrete surface of sidewalks, driveways, patios, steps, poolside, boat & warehouse ramps look better clean. Under dumpsters there is a lot of debris & we can clean those pads for you. Our window washing is unrivaled. We clean the mold & mildew from your buildings or residence.

Your Image Is Our Business and Your Satisfaction Is Our Priority. Call 314-580-9274 or 561-797-9274

Name: Softwash Hawaii
Description:
Donovan’s previous career as a Flight Deck Director onboard the USS Enterprise, and 28 years as a Senior Consultant for Chevron USA provided real time experience in understanding the benefits that routine maintenance provides its owner(s), end users and general public. 

3 ways of maintaining properties and their assets:

1.	Keep clean & maintain. 
2.	Get to clean and maintain. 
3.	Do not maintain (or improperly maintain) and try to save when failing. 

The majority of requests we receive pertain to #3. 
NOTE: This is the most expensive way to maintain a property and its assets.

WHY:
1.	Failures never happen at a good time. 
2.	Communicates negatively to clients, investors and employers. 
3.	Usually requires extensive and time-consuming alternatives to restore the property or assets to a presentable manner. 
4.	Requires unplanned capital expense or investment to mitigate. 


How Softwash Hawaii Benefits our Clients:

•	Cost effectively clean Roof & Exterior Surfaces.
•	Improve property’s visual appearance.
•	Improve & maintaining site safety
•	Save money & time by reducing cleaning / maintenance intervals
•	Extend the lifespan of property assets (Roof, exterior coatings & surfaces, etc.)
•	Improve property values
•	Reduce Energy Costs
•	Reduce Allergens

And more. 

Oahu-based Softwash Hawaii is a Full-Service, Residential and Commercial, Roof & Exterior Surface Cleaning, Treatment and Maintenance service provider. 

Donovan and Softwash Hawaii’s #1 goal are to provide services and customer service/support that raise and set the bar higher than current expectations within industry. 

Our Softwash Hawaii process uses,
- environmentally friendly
- non-hazardous
- water based
- naturally biodegradable cleansing solutions

Which are specifically designed to,
- emulsify dirt and grime
- breakdown insect nests and webs
- eliminate & kill mold, mildew, algae and bacteria. 

All while sanitizing the surface(s) being cleaned, thus eliminating the problem at its roots.

Name: Welding Center
Description:
Siamo una giovane società che vanta più di 20 anni di esperienza nel campo della prefabbricazione e montaggio di strutture saldate. Disponiamo di un’area di 1500 mq, attrezzata per ogni attività di prefabbricazione. Impianti piping di ogni settore, caldareria, lattoneria, linee gas, carpenteria. Fabbricazione di elementi strutturali marcati CE in accordo ad UNI EN 1090-1:2012.
Disponiamo di varie figure di coordinamento saldatura fino al livello massimo richiamato dalla norma UNI EN ISO 14731, LIVELLO C ( Comprehensive) – conoscenze tecniche complete.
All’interno del nostro organico sono presenti figure professionali di coordinamento (IWE-International welding engineer, IWS-International welding specialist) ed ispezione (IWI-International welding inspector) certificate Istituto Italiano della Saldatura in accordo alle linee guida emesse dall’EWF (European Welding Federation) e dall’IIW (International Institute of Welding).
Svolgiamo corsi di formazione, sia teorici che pratici, su vari processi di saldatura ( tig - filo continuo - elettrodo ) e su varie leghe metalliche ( acciai al carbonio - acciai inossidabili - acciai resistenti allo scorrimento viscoso - leghe di nichel e leghe di alluminio ).
Attività di supporto tecnico per la stesura delle Welding Procedure Specification – WPS ossia le specifiche di procedimento di saldatura, il documento basilare per la costruzione di un manufatto saldato.
Affiancamento alle aziende nell’ottenimento di qualifiche di procedimento di saldatura WPQR – Welding Procedure Qualification Record in accordo agli standard UNI EN 15614, ASME IX, AWS.
Certificazione al fine del rilascio della Qualifica Saldatore o della qualifica per operatore di saldatura in conformità alle norme della serie UNI EN ISO 9606, UNI EN ISO 14732 ed ai codici ASME e AWS.
L'esperienza pratica maturata sul campo e quella teorica maturata attraverso anni di formazione   ci permettono di offrire servizi a 360° nel mondo della saldatura.

La competizione sul mercato è sempre più rilevante e i due imprenditori, nel 2016, attuano subito una strategia ampliandosi anche nel settore dell'installazione e dell'assistenza tecnica su impianti per il trattamento dell'aria e canne fumarie grazie anche alla collaborazione con il socio Giuseppe Lotito.
A seguito della fusione societaria di "Ferv di Fabio Di Michele" e "Meno21 di Sabino Colia" avvenuta nel 2022, la Società Startup Service s.r.l rappresenta un punto di riferimento per gli utenti finali in grado di rispondere a qualsiasi esigenza garantendo un servizio a 360° nel mondo dell'assistenza tecnica.

Name: Atmosphere HVAC Services
Description:
We aren’t here to sit in meetings or send you glossy brochures. At Atmosphere HVAC Services, we’re tradesmen, plain and simple. We know how a mechanical room is supposed to run, and we know how much it costs you when it doesn't.

We don’t employ "sales consultants." When you call us, you get a tech who knows his way around a manifold gauge and a wiring diagram. Whether it’s a 20-ton rooftop unit or a complex chiller plant, we show up, find the failure, and get the iron running again.

Our Way of Doing Business:

• Real Talk: If your system is junk, we’ll tell you. if it just needs a $50 part and some elbow grease, we’ll tell you that, too.
• No Hand-Holding: You’ve got a building to run. We don't need supervision. We get in, do the work, and get out so you can get back to business.
• Built to Last: We don't do "band-aid" fixes. If we put our name on a job, it’s done to code and built to take a beating.
• On Time or Don't Bother: Your time is money. We don't waste it.

Name: Fresh Family LLC
Description:
Fresh Family LLC is a minority women-owned business dedicated to delivering superior waste mitigation, encampment services, hazardous waste disposal, and comprehensive environmental solutions across the Pacific Northwest. With over 42 years of public works experience, our expertise spans a wide range of services that ensure safety, sustainability, and cleanliness in both public and private sectors.

Our notable projects include working with the City of Seattle on the Clean City Initiative, where we provide daily encampment clean-up and hazmat waste management services, ensuring the city remains clean and safe. We have also been awarded bids and Job Order Contracts (JOCs) with the University of Washington, where we offer extensive exterior cleaning, power washing, and hazardous waste removal services. Additionally, our partnership with WSDOT showcases our proficiency in handling contaminated soil excavation for the I-509 Gateway Expansion Project.

At Fresh Family LLC, we pride ourselves on our holistic approach to waste management and environmental services. Our team is OSHA certified, trained in hazmat handling and transport, and equipped with the latest technologies to manage even the most challenging projects. We offer a wide range of services, including building and interior demolition, concrete demolition, lead abatement, and environmental remediation. Our commitment to quality and safety is further demonstrated through our regular training programs, including USDOT and hazmat awareness training for all employees.

In addition to our public sector work, our services cater to the private commercial market. Our pressure washing and power cleaning services are designed to enhance commercial properties, offering solutions such as flatwork concrete cleaning, parking garage maintenance, and recurring service plans to ensure properties look their best year-round.

Desenvolvemos e executamos projetos elétricos completos, com foco na qualidade, segurança, eficiência e inovação, sempre alinhados às necessidades específicas de cada cliente e segmento.

 No setor residencial, realizamos instalações elétricas seguras e modernas, promovendo conforto e funcionalidade para o dia a dia.  

 No setor comercial, oferecemos soluções técnicas que garantem eficiência energética, continuidade operacional e adaptação às exigências de cada espaço. 
 
 Na área industrial, prestamos serviços de alta complexidade técnica, com rigor e conformidade, atuando em ambientes como unidades fabris, refinarias e infraestruturas de grande escala.
A nossa equipa é composta por profissionais experientes e certificados, capacitados para entregar projetos personalizados, respeitando os prazos, os orçamentos e as normas técnicas em vigor.

Com um compromisso assumido com a inovação e a sustentabilidade, a Aprimora LDA é o parceiro ideal para quem procura soluções elétricas fiáveis, eficientes e adaptadas a cada contexto.

Transformamos necessidades em soluções inteligentes. 
 Cuidamos do que conecta você ao futuro.

Name: Tofflon Italy
Description:
Company Profile 

Tofflon Science and Technology Group Co. Ltd. (Short for “Tofflon”, Stock Code: SZ 300171) was founded in 1993. It is a comprehensive pharmaceutical equipment supplier to provide process support, core equipments, integrated system and pharma engineering for the pharma and biotech industry in the world. Since its foundation, Tofflon has supplied more than 9000 equipments and systems for 2000 pharmaceutical companies across over 40 countries and regions in the world which have been widely applied in the fields of liquid and Lyo injectables, chemical API, bioengineering and pharma packaging.

Tofflon focuses on studying drug manufacture science and process equipment manufacture science, practices drug process knowledge integration with pharma equipment knowledge. Taking “Synergy Global Advanced Technologies” strategy, Tofflon builds comprehensive development institute in Shanghai headquarters, is building design houses and technical centers in USA, Europe and India, establishes joint ventures and technology collaboration with the technical partners from USA, Europe and Japan.

Tofflon dedicate itself to grow up to a total solution provider of pharmaceutical manufacturing systems and engineering for the global pharma and biotech industry to contribute to the maximum benefits and welfare of society, customers, stockholders, employees and their families.

To achieve this goal and enter the European market permanently, in 2019 Tofflon Italy was born. The aim is offering assistance and localized technical support to European customers.

There are two main Italian locations: the first is in Lombardy, in the province of Bergamo, and the second is in Piedmont, in the province of Novara.

Description:
MALER TIL ERHVERV I TOPKVALITET

Hos Aarhus Malerforretning ApS løser vi alle typer maleropgaver for erhverv – fra kontorer, klasseværelser og børnehaver til butikker og facader. Vi er erfarne specialister, der maler i alle former og farver og står klar med professionel rådgivning, så du får et resultat, der både lever op til dine behov og skaber værdi på lang sigt.

ERFAREN MALERFORRETNING

Med mange års erfaring er vi din sparringspartner, når vægge og rum skal have nyt liv. Skal farverne øge medarbejdernes produktivitet eller skabe ro og balance? Vi har svaret – og vi tilpasser altid arbejdet, så det forstyrrer jeres dagligdag mindst muligt.

FACADER, DER HOLDER

Facaden er virksomhedens ansigt udadtil. Når I vælger os til facaderenovering, får I et resultat med finish og kvalitet, der styrker både bygningens udtryk og jeres signalværdi til omverdenen.

FARVERÅDGIVNING

Farver er ikke bare farver – de påvirker stemninger, adfærd og signaler. Vi rådgiver både boligforeninger, butikker og virksomheder i at vælge farver, der skaber den ønskede effekt. Skal boligområdet føles mere trygt? Skal butiksfacaden tiltrække de rigtige kunder? Eller skal virksomhedens bygning udstråle seriøsitet og styrke? Vi guider jer til de rette valg.

INDENDØRS MALERARBEJDE & FRAFLYTNING

Vi klarer alt inden for indendørs malerarbejde – også i forbindelse med fraflytning. Vores princip er enkelt: fuld dækning, ensartet finish og en gennemgang sammen med dig, inden vi afslutter. Så er du altid sikker på et resultat, du kan være tilfreds med.

 Kontakt os på +45 40 40 78 45 og lad os tage en snak om jeres næste maleropgave.

Name: ProBuilt Wiring Solutions, LLC
Description:
ProBuilt Wiring Solutions, LLC is a Veteran Owned, founder-led telecommunications and low-voltage infrastructure contractor headquartered in Youngsville, North Carolina, serving carriers, prime contractors, builders, general contractors, and IT service providers throughout NC.

We execute outside plant (OSP) and inside plant (ISP) telecommunications work that supports the build, expansion, and maintenance of modern broadband and fiber networks. In parallel, we deliver compliant, power-limited low-voltage infrastructure for commercial, multi-family, and enterprise environments—designed to align with construction timelines and downstream IT system deployments.

Our core capabilities include fiber optic splicing and repair, coax and copper splicing, and aerial and underground telecommunications scopes. For builders, GCs, and IT partners, we provide structured data cabling (Cat5e/6/6A), broadband coax, Wi-Fi access points, PoE systems, CCTV (non-alarm), audio/video, IoT cabling, and low-voltage LED lighting—installed with disciplined execution, clear labeling, testing, documentation, and coordinated handoff.

ProBuilt Wiring is fully onboarded and actively performs work with major telecommunications firms while operating as a reliable infrastructure partner to construction and IT teams. We focus on delivering infrastructure-ready spaces that minimize rework, compress schedules, and eliminate downstream integration friction.

Our leadership team brings deep field expertise, cross-discipline coordination capability, and a mission-driven operating model rooted in military values of accountability, safety, and precision. We operate with a compliance-first mindset, executing all work within applicable regulatory and licensing frameworks, while remaining responsive, schedule-aware, and easy to work with.

At ProBuilt Wiring Solutions, we don’t just install systems—we deliver dependable infrastructure that enables networks, buildings, and businesses to perform from day one.

Name: Angers Loire Aérogommage
Description:
L'aérogommage est un procédé de traitement de surface dérivé de la technique de sablage. Cela consiste en la projection d'un abrasif naturel à l'aide d'air comprimé à basse pression en vue du décapage ou nettoyage de surface.

Quand de l'eau est ajoutée au mélange d'abrasif et d'air, on appelle cela de la « brumisation »; ne pas confondre avec l'hydrogommage qui correspond à la technique du sablage pour laquelle on utilise 80 % d'eau et 20 % de sable.

Cette technique est mieux adaptée que le sablage aux travaux de précision et à l'emploi dans des endroits difficilement accessibles. Grâce à l'emploi de basse pression et à un choix d'une large gamme d'abrasifs, elle est efficace sur tout support. L'utilisation d'abrasifs de très faibles granulométries permet le respect total de nombreux supports. En exemple, il est possible de décaper un vernis ou une peinture le long d'une vitrerie sans qu'il y ait le moindre impact sur le verre lorsque l'abrasif est adapté.
