Name: Premier Building Anchors
Description:
The impetus behind our venture stems from a noticeable gap in the market. Since the enactment of new OSHA regulations in 2017 pertaining to anchors and certified parapet walls, we've observed a growing demand for reliable, knowledgeable and timely anchor inspections and installation services. Notably in 2023, we experienced firsthand the challenges posed by existing anchor companies' inability to meet customer demands promptly.

In response to this market need, we have taken the initiative to establish a company dedicated to addressing these challenges head-on. Our aim is to offer comprehensive safety anchor installation services that adhere to the highest industry standards, ensuring client satisfaction and compliance with regulatory requirements.

Our services include:
-Complete professional engineering for site survey, layout, design and documentation of all types of anchorages.
-Load testing and 10 year certification.
-Complete installation of all anchorages, davit bases, etc.
-Turn-key solution for all cutting, patching and coordination of any material installations as required.

We assure top-notch quality through several key measures:
1) High-Quality Materials: We use premium-grade materials sourced from trusted suppliers and fabricators to ensure durability and reliability of our building anchors.
2) Stringent Manufacturing Standards: Our manufacturing processes adhere to strict quality control standards, ensuring that each anchor meets or exceeds industry specifications.
3) Thorough Testing: Before being released to the market, every Premier Building Anchor undergoes rigorous testing to verify its strength, performance, and reliability in various conditions.
4) Certifications and Compliance: Our anchors are designed and manufactured in compliance with industry standards and regulations, giving you peace of mind regarding their safety and effectiveness.
5) Customer Satisfactions Guarantee: We stand behind the quality of all our products and services.

Name: EN Tømrer ApS
Description:
EN Tømrer er din lokale tømrermester i Holbæk. Vi bestræber os på at imødekomme dine ønsker, fra første henvendelse, til sidste arbejdsdag.
Vi arbejder konstant på at forene pris og kvalitet – uden at gå på kompromis.
EN Tømrer tilbyder løsninger til både private- og erhvervskunder, på hele Sjælland. Står du og skal renovere, have nye vinduer, døre eller et helt tredje, giver vi dig gerne
et tilbud- helt uforpligtende. Lad os tage et kig på dit bygge- eller renoveringsprojekt.
Vi sikre en solid, sikker og professionel gennemførsel- til den rigtige pris.
Vi giver dig rådgivning om den bedste løsning for dit projekt og en ordentlig vejledning omkring materialer og muligheder. Når opgaven går i gang, tager vi os naturligvis også af koordineringen på tværs af alle faggrupper.
August 2019 satte vi os for at lave et moderne snedkeri som giver os nye muligheder, i vores værksted. Størstedelen af vores opgaver er inventar, og med en formatsav vi kan programmere, og en kantlimer som tryller forkanter på, kan vi nu producere skabe og reoler, i professionel kvalitet – hvor du bestemmer målene!
Ingen opgave er for stor, ingen er for lille hvad enten du er privat eller erhverv.
Et samarbejde med EN Tømrer betyder, at vi kommer med den fulde pakke. Vores erfarne svende og administration er klar med knowhow, ligesom EN Tømrer har eget værksted.

Name: R.I.W. Ornamental Metal, Inc.
Description:
R.I.W. Ornamental Metal, Inc. was founded in 2001 after husband and wife, Mr. Ilija Rokvic-Rocky and Mrs. Edina Rokvic, decided to combine their skills in business and metal work and start their own company. Rocky and Edina met in college where they both studied mechanical engineering.  Originally from Bosnia, they immigrated to the United States in 1997, where Edina started the family business by opening 1 man shop: R.I.W. Ornamental Metal. The company only grew from there. 


Now operating in Cincinnati/Northern Kentucky, Chicago, Boston, Indiana, and even China, their family business has brought unique vision of quality and style to the Decorative & Ornamental Metal Industry. Edina runs the business side of the company and Rocky runs the technical side. Together they have accomplished hundreds of beautiful projects that decorate the cities in which they reside.

Alu Glas Werk est une entreprise dynamique basée à
Luxembourg, spécialisée dans la mise à disposition d'équipes

- Murs-rideaux. Skylights. Montage des portes et fenêtres
- Systèmes d'ombrage
- Verre, Structures Métalliques

Tant que spécialiste des installations de murs-
rideaux, nous comprenons les défis et les exigences uniques qui accompagnent le travail sur des façades à grande échelle. Nos équipes expérimentées et qualifiées sont dotées des connaissances, de

Nos équipes disposent des habilitations nécessaires pour travailler en hauteur, conduire tous types d'engins spécifiques et suivent fréquemment des formations spécifiques sur les techniques d'installations.

Si vous recherchez un partenaire fiable et expérimenté pour l'installation de grands murs-rideaux de façade au Luxembourg, Alu Glas Werk est là pour dépasser vos attentes.
Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui!

Name: Ploutis Contracting
Description:
Ploutis Contracting is family owned & operated. For over 60 years, we have worked meticulously to develop reliable and professional methods to ensure guaranteed customer satisfaction.

Our fundamental principle is to provide our valued clients with the personal attention they deserve while focusing on delivering quality work in a timely and efficient manner and accepting nothing less than excellent results.

Our founder, Alex Ploutis, would say, "There is only one thing more important than Excellence- Maintaining it!"

As an immigrant from Greece, arriving in America with little more than the belief that regardless of where he was from, with hard work, he could succeed in this new land, and he did just that. 

After several years of working as a painter, in 1960, he decided to open his own painting company. With a strong work ethic, dedication, and determination, he made the Ploutis name into a reputable company in the industry. In 1972, he was awarded the contract for the United States Capital Rotunda painting in preparation for the 1976 bicentennial celebration.  
Alex continued to work in Ploutis Contracting with his daughter Stella and her husband Gus Koukides.  They worked with him right of out college until he retired in 2009.  Stella and Gus continue to work off Alex's legacy.

Our legacy is important to us, and our values have not wavered. Building relationships with our clients on trust and commitment to excellence continue to be the cornerstone of our success.

We are dedicated to providing superior customer service and delivering the highest quality results. That's why we have set the standard in the industry by consistently providing unparalleled contracting and painting services that our clients can count on.

We proudly support:
•   Electrical Consulting Engineers – providing detailed lighting designs, compliant specifications, and trusted technical support.
•   Electrical Contractors – offering dependable supply chains, responsive service, and a deep understanding of installation realities to suit all budgets.
•   Architects & Interior Designers – collaborating to bring creative visions to life through the thoughtful use of light, materials, and form.

At Linx Lighting, we believe that great lighting is more than illumination — it’s about atmosphere, comfort, and identity. Our extensive industry background allows us to bridge the gap between design intent and practical execution, ensuring every project is delivered with precision and purpose.

With experience spanning commercial developments, architectural landmarks, hospitality venues, and bespoke interiors, Linx Lighting aim is to build trusted partnerships across the industry — always with a focus on quality, integrity, and design excellence.

“Lighting that connects design, performance and supply."

Name: Industrial Flooring Contractors Ltd

Self-Levelling Epoxy Resin Flooring – Seamless surfaces for high-traffic commercial and industrial spaces.

Decorative Flake Epoxy Systems – Functional, attractive floors for retail or showroom spaces.

Polyurethane & Polyaspartic Coatings – Flexible, chemical-resistant finishes.

Cementitious Pump Screeds – Strong, level substrates for heavy-duty environments.

Resin Bound Driveways & Outdoor Surfaces – Customisable, decorative, hard-wearing designs.

Surface Preparation – Dust-free diamond grinding and shot blasting for optimal adhesion.

Demarcation & Safety Markings – Durable lines and symbols for safety and organisation.

Medical & Healthcare, Food & Pharmaceutical, Chemical & Manufacturing, Retail & Supermarkets, Industrial & Warehousing, Domestic gardens and driveways.

Tailored solutions, expert installation, durable and hygienic floors, UK-wide coverage, and up to 10-year warranties.

 or call 01922 322696.

Le Groupe COFUBAT, votre allié dans la concrétisation de vos projets.
Depuis 40 ans, le Groupe COFUBAT accompagne entreprises et collectivités dans leurs projets, de la construction à la réhabilitation/modernisation jusqu’à la maintenance.

Notre savoir-faire en construction, ingénierie et électricité, nous positionne en tant que partenaire de référence dans la région PACA principalement.

Dirigé par la famille CORBANI, notre groupe s'engage à travailler en étroite collaboration avec nos clients pour proposer des solutions clés en main.

NOS DOMAINES D’INTERVENTION EN CONSTRUCTION :
Gros œuvre : Construction, déconstruction
Second œuvre : Rénovation et modernisation
Travaux spécifiques : recyclage d’eau (dans centre de lavage), installation/extraction de cuves, dépollution…
Travaux de terrassement, dallage.

NOS DOMAINES D’INTERVENTION EN ÉLECTRICITE :
- CFO :
Installations électriques complètes ou partielles 
Eclairages > luminaires intérieurs/extérieurs et BAES
Câblage et pose d'armoires TGBT
Mise à l'image > Signalétique, panneaux lumineux, totems d'affichage
Passage tarif bleu au tarif jaune
Mise en conformité électrique

- Energies : Installation de réseaux et panneaux photovoltaïques.
Installation de bornes de recharge pour voitures électriques (IRVE).

NOS TRAVAUX DE MAINTENANCE TOUT CORPS D’ETAT :
Curative, préventive, palliative, corrective.
Dépannage électrique, plomberie et serrurerie

NOS INTERVENTIONS ONT LIEU HABITUELLEMENT DANS :
- Station de distribution pétrolière, de distribution de Gaz (GNV, GNC, GNL)
- Station de lavage
- Garage, concession et agence de location automobile
- Aérodrome, poste d'avitaillement

  ENGAGEMENT ET QUALITE :
Nos valeurs : implication, service, et sécurité, elles sont le fondement de tout ce que nous entreprenons. 
Nos certifications QSSE (MASE et QUALIBAT) témoignent de notre engagement au quotidien !

 Avec le Groupe COFUBAT Connecter l’avenir avec énergie et savoir faire
 04-42-03-09-58
 contact@cofubat.fr

Name: Benton Daylight Control Systems
Description:
### About Us

Benton Daylight Control Systems is at the forefront of integrating sustainable design practices within the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry. Our foundational mission is to innovate and implement comprehensive daylighting control solutions for world-class projects across various sectors. With a dedication to enhancing building sustainability, our expertise lies in custom designing and installing state-of-the-art daylight control systems that significantly reduce carbon emissions while improving occupant comfort.

**Our Vision:** To be the industry's leading provider of daylight control solutions, recognized for our commitment to sustainability, innovation, and excellence.

**Our Mission:** To support the AEC community by delivering expertly designed daylight control systems that contribute to the creation of energy-efficient, comfortable, and environmentally responsible buildings.

#### Our Services

We offer a wide range of services tailored to meet the unique needs of Developers, Architects, Designers, Engineers, Contractors, and Building Owners, including:

- Custom Design and Installation of Daylight Control Systems
- Sustainable Building Practices Consulting
- Project-specific Support and Guidance

#### Our Team

Led by CEO Jeff Broekhoven, our team comprises seasoned professionals with diverse expertise in architecture design, sustainable design consulting, and project management. Our in-house, OSHA-certified installation team ensures the highest standards of safety and quality in every project we undertake.

#### Our Commitment

At Benton Daylight Control Systems, we are committed to being a trusted partner and innovator in the AEC industry. We believe in creating sustainable, comfortable environments through advanced daylight control technologies. Our approach is rooted in collaboration, innovation, and a deep understanding of our clients' needs.

Name: Sejr's Tagdækning ApS
Description:
Sejr’s Tagdækning er beliggende i Ikast, men dækker tage med tagpap i hele landet. 
Vi er et ApS selskab med én chef, Ole Sejr (Indehaver).
Ole startede virksomheden i 2019, som et hobby selskab.
Der kom hurtigt fart på virksomheden og i 2020 ændrede Ole selskabet til et ApS selskab. 
Side da har der været fart over feltet og virksomheden er vokset med flere ansatte.

Grund stenene for firmaet - og alt arbejde vi udfører - er det gode håndværk.

Hos os får du professionel tagdækning med grundig vejledning, god kundeservice og en stor portion faglig stolthed.

Vi tager os af alt fra en stor listedækning til små reparations opgaver, samt service af tage.

حرير هي أول منصة رقمية B2B في السعودية متخصصة في التجميل، العناية الشخصية، العناية بالبشرة، مستلزمات الأسنان، والصحة العامة. نربط الموردين المحليين والدوليين بتجار التجزئة من خلال منصة موحدة تقدم التوريد، التخزين، الخدمات اللوجستية، الترويج، وتمثيل العلامات التجارية.

Founded in 1966 by Robert Benoure, Sr., Benoure Plumbing, Heating & Air Conditioning began as a local, family-run mechanical contractor serving the greater Burlington area. In June 2022, we expanded our capabilities with the addition of a custom sheet metal fabrication shop. This strategic investment has enhanced our ability to meet the diverse needs of our customers with precision and efficiency, enabling us to offer more comprehensive solutions, reduce turnaround times, and improve service flexibility.

In 2024, Benoure became 100% employee-owned, ushering in a new era for the company. Thanks to the support of Empowered Ventures, this transition ensures that every team member has a vested interest in our success, fueling our commitment to innovation and exceptional service.

At Benoure, we take great pride in our rich legacy of trust, reliability, and professionalism. As we look to the future, we remain dedicated to sustaining growth, delivering superior service, and supporting our employees, customers, and community.

Name: CRDN-NuYale
Description:
CRDN OF KENTUCKY, SOUTH INDIANA AND GREATER CINCINNATI

CRDN—the Certified Restoration Drycleaning Network—is an international leader in textile restoration, providing local service across America, Canada and the United Kingdom. We follow standardized processes for the inventory and restoration of garments and other fabric items affected by fire, smoke, water, mold or other contaminants. 

CRDN's textile experts work in conjunction with contractors and content cleaning specialists to provide a service that is seamless to homeowners and beneficial for insurance companies. On losses involving fire, smoke, water, mold or other contaminants, CRDN functions as an extension of the insurance company's response team to save time and satisfy customers. CRDN's professional services and procedures reduce severity and additional living expenses while improving customer satisfaction and helping adjusters close claims efficiently.

Advantages of CRDN

CRDN offers an efficient, effective and proven solution to insurance professionals seeking to reduce costs while closing claims quickly. 

Proven Results

Clothing, textiles and other fabric items comprise the fastest growing and largest segment of insurance claims. Offering a valuable alternative to replacement, we save more than 95% of the items we clean. Restoration costs an average of only 16% compared to replacement, a savings of 84%. 

Our Guarantee: If an item doesn't restore, it's free. In situations where the loss involves a commercial site or warehouse with a large quantity of goods, CRDN's restoration capabilities create a viable and valuable salvage ability option for insurers.

Mission Statement

Through a shared vision, CRDN is committed to respect and serve the needs of our team members, customers and community with the highest degree of quality, empathy and integrity in all aspects of our business.
 

We Move at the Speed of Claims

On-call 24/7, with "rush" service for immediate-needs items returned within 24-48 hours.
Quick processing of wet items (preventing dye migration and mold growth) for a better restoration success rate.
Expeditious removal of fabric items allows contractors and contents cleaning companies to begin as soon as possible.
Expertise

We are The Textile Experts, highly trained in the latest processes for restoring fabric items damaged by fire, smoke, water or exposure to mold and other contaminants. We are adept at handling a wide range of specialty items, including window treatments (blinds, drapes, sheers, custom cornice boards, etc.), shoes, purses, hats, belts, leathers, furs and pillows, as well as medical garments, uniforms, tapestries, vestments, linens and more. Additionally, we offer secure conveniently-located storage facilities, serving as the homeowner's "closet" until they are ready for their items to be delivered.

SUBMIT A CLAIM

Aliamos conhecimento técnico de campo com sólida fundamentação legal, atuando para resguardar os direitos das partes envolvidas nos contratos firmados com a Administração Pública.

Temos larga experiência em obras de infraestrutura viária e urbana, saneamento básico, edificações públicas e privadas, sistemas estruturais complexos e empreendimentos de médio e grande porte, oferecendo suporte completo nas seguintes áreas:

- Diagnóstico contratual estratégico considerando legislação e áreas técnicas
- Avaliação e gestão de riscos contratuais
- Análise e elaboração de pleitos e reequilíbrios econômico-financeiros
- Elaboração de memoriais gerenciais e pareceres jurídicos
- Defesa administrativa em auditorias e inquéritos
- Atuação judicial em todas as esferas, incluindo Tribunais Superiores
- Prevenção e resolução de conflitos contratuais
- Implantação de sistemas de conformidade técnico-contratual

A LexObras se diferencia por atuar de forma integrada entre a engenharia de campo e o ambiente jurídico-regulatório. Entendemos que a execução de um contrato de obra pública exige mais do que cumprir prazos e escopos: exige conformidade com a lei, domínio das decisões dos tribunais de contas, clareza documental e estratégia jurídica.

Name: Ehkam Trading And Contracting Company
Description:
قصتنا:
من مدينة المصطفى ﷺ كانت انطلاقتها، وإلى أرجاء المملكة عمّ توسعها، ونحو الريادة على مستوى الشرق الأوسط نصبت رؤيتها.
نبعت فكرة شركة إحكام من إنشاء فلل سكنية وبيعها، حيث نشأت عام ٢٠٠٦ كمؤسسة صغيرة تعمل في مجال المقاولات المعمارية، ومع حدوث الطفرة العمرانية الهائلة سلكت الشركة طريق الازدهار، فحملت على عاتقها تحقيق الكفاءة في كل ما يخص أعمال البنية التحتية، حتى أضحت اسمًا بارزًا وعلمًا متميزّا بين المنافسين.
 
رسالتنا:
منذ الوهلة الأولى وضعت الشركة خدمة الوطن وتطوير الحركة العمرانية نصب عينيها.
اتخذت الشركة شعار «نعمل بإحكام» ليُعبِّر عن مضمون اسمها، حيث تحرص على غرس أعلى درجات الكفاءة بين موظفيها لينعكس أثرها عيانًا على مشاريعها.
               
رؤيتنا:
تسعى الشركة إلى توفير فرص عمل متميزة لأبناء الوطن، وتسخير جهودها في تحقيق رؤية مملكتنا الحبيبة، لتخطو خطوات حثيثة حتى تحفر اسمها في مجال تألقها بين مصاف كبرى شركات الشرق الأوسط.
     
لماذا نحن؟
"إحكام" ليس مجرد اسم، بل هو مرآة إنجازاتنا القائمة على أساس صدق وأمانة التعامل، ودقة وجودة المخرجات والالتزام بالمواعيد.
تتمتع الشركة بمنظومة متكاملة، من معدات حديثة ودعم لوجيستي وكادر فني مؤهل. كل ذلك بإشراف نخبة متميزة من المهندسين ذوي الكفاءة.
ويظهر جليًّا أن السمعة الحسنة التي ظفرت بها الشركة من خدمة عملائها منذ ٢٠٠٦ كانت السبب وراء نجاحها واستدامتها طوال هذه الفترة متحديةً جميع العقبات، وهو ما يثبت خبرتها الواسعة في مجال خدماتها.

Name: UK Loft Boarding Ltd
Description:
Specialists in Professional Loft Transformation & Premium Home Storage Solutions
We are the experts in converting inaccessible, under-utilised, and often dreary loft spaces into safe, easily accessible, and exceptionally functional storage areas. Our mission is to help homeowners throughout our service areas dramatically increase their usable living space and property value without undertaking costly extensions.

The LOFT-E Advantage: Storage Without Compromise
What sets us apart is our commitment to quality, safety, and energy efficiency. We utilise the innovative, proprietary LOFT-E raised loft storage floor system. This unique method ensures a robust, level, and safe platform for storage while delivering critical thermal protection:

Insulation Protection: The LOFT-E system creates a raised floor above the existing ceiling joists. This is essential for preventing the compression of the loft insulation, which typically reduces its effectiveness and causes heat loss.

Energy Efficiency: By maintaining the integrity and depth of your insulation, we help ensure your home remains thermally efficient, potentially leading to lower heating bills.

Safe Access: We professionally install secure loft hatches, ladders, and lighting, making your newly converted storage space safe, bright, and genuinely easy to access and use.

Reclaim Your Space, Protect Your Property
Forget compromising your insulation or risking unsafe access. We provide bespoke, high-quality installations designed to seamlessly integrate with your existing property structure. Reclaim your wasted space and secure your belongings with a premium storage solution.

Find your local experts today: Serving customers across dedicated branch areas throughout the UK.

Name: Endurance Service B.V.
Description:
Ontwerp, realisatie, onderhoud
Endurance Service B.V. is gespecialiseerd in het verbouwen en onderhouden van laboratoria. Het hele traject: van ontwerp tot onderhoud. De wensen en behoeften van de gebruikers zijn het uitgangspunt.  
Of het nu gaat om bouwkundige zaken, laboratoriumtafels, medische gassen, zuurkasten, elektrische installaties of klimaatbeheersing. Jij hebt als opdrachtgever één aanspreekpunt. We zijn pas klaar als alles naar tevredenheid werkt. Geen zorgen tijdens de klus, geen verrassingen achteraf.
Hiermee onderscheiden we ons in Nederland, wij zijn de enige met deze kennis en ervaring. Wij weten hoe in een laboratorium wordt gewerkt, wij kennen de valkuilen. Adviseren, meedenken, helpen, het is voor ons vanzelfsprekend. 
Jouw partner in onderhoud
Met onze kennis en ervaring zijn we ook de ideale partner voor het onderhoud van jouw laboratoriumgebouw en alle installaties. Je wilt niet dat je laboratorium stilvalt omdat de perslucht uitvalt, de waterpomp niet werkt of de koelinstallatie het begeeft. Analisten en laboranten moeten hun werk kunnen doen. Altijd.
Wij houden je technische installaties op orde, kennen de wet- en regelgeving voor laboratoria, maar zorgen ook dat ons onderhoud jouw werk niet in de weg zit. En als onderhoud toch tot overlast leidt, stemmen we dit goed af en beperken we dit tot een minimum. In onze onderhoudscontracten nemen we alles op, van brandmeldcentrales tot persluchtinstallaties en van liften tot luchtbehandeling.
Eerlijke prijs, perfect resultaat
Wil je inschrijven op de laagste prijs en neem je daarbij de nodige irritatie en frustratie op de koop toe? Dan raden we je aan naar een ander te gaan.Betaal je liever een eerlijke prijs, maar verwacht je dan ook een perfect resultaat? Dan werken we graag met jou samen.

Name: PureVu Window Cleaning
Description:
PureVu Window Cleaning is your Pure Water window washing service. We use a proprietary filtration system to remove all particles and minerals from our cleaning water. Our cleaning process can keep your windows clean for up to for up to 3 months longer than traditional window washing methods because we do not leave a sticky soap residue to attract more dirt. We include everything in our no surprise pricing, so you will not have to worry about any surprises or extra charges, even if you accurately use our online quoting and booking system and price the job yourself.

Your satisfaction is our only priority, and we want every job to be a 5-star experience for you from start to finish. If at any point in the process, you do not feel like we are delivering 5-star service, let us know and we will make it right. Even if Mother Nature decides to ruin our work and rains on your newly clean windows in the first 96 hours (4 full days), we will come and make them spotless again, no questions asked and no problem.

Some window cleaning companies charge extra to clean screens or different parts of the window, not us. We will remove and wet wash the screens, clean inside and out using our Exclusive PureVu filtered water cleaning process, clean cobwebs from around the inside and outside of the window, clean the window seals, and vacuum the sill and track to remove debris, dead bugs etc. Your windows will be cleaned using our 100% chemical free process and dry to a streak and spot free finish with no residue to attract new dirt. We guarantee you will love our service, or you do not pay. We are good for you, good for your landscaping, good for the environment.

You Chose PureVu Window Cleaning, now you can relax, sit back and just enjoy the view.

We offer risk assessments, installation and maintenance, and annual checks with certification to conform with current British legislation. Our expertise in height safety is a huge factor in the safe installation of any lightning protection system.

Although it is not a legal requirement for lightning protection to be installed according to RC35 'protection of buildings against lightning strikes', the electricity at work regs 1989 do apply to most businesses throughout the UK and within these regulations it states that all LPS should be tested in accordance with the relevant British standard.

Here at Pulse we offer installation and Maintenance to make sure that your building stays on the right side of compliance and safety. for any enquiry please feel free to message directly or use the email to contact us: admin@pulselightningprotection.co.uk or call 0333 335 6836

At Sunflower Building Solutions, we are committed to transforming the construction landscape through innovative, eco-friendly technologies. This streamlined process eliminates multiple steps—including framing, insulating, and sheathing—significantly reducing labor requirements.

Experience 55% faster build times compared to traditional methods, with structures that are fire, water, hurricane, and tornado proof and higher insulation ratings.

Through strategic collaborations, we also offer a comprehensive suite of solutions, including cold-formed steel, structural and miscellaneous steel, StormCure waterproofing solutions with a 25-year warranty, green roof ecosystems, and smart coatings that are impact, fade, and vapor resistant. Our eco-friendly and flexible systems can save up to 40% in utility costs and provide a 50% faster installation compared to traditional stucco.

In addition to our innovative products, we provide access to experienced architects and engineering professionals, as well as a skilled installation crew. Our solutions also include water recycling and solar options, further enhancing the sustainability of your projects.
By combining cutting-edge materials and technologies, we deliver higher quality construction, reduced timelines, and substantial cost savings—all while working towards decarbonizing the construction industry.

Description:
PT. Sultan Cahaya Berkah adalah perusahaan kontraktor pertambangan yang menyediakan layanan terpadu dalam pembangunan infrastruktur tambang, pengupasan tanah, operasi pertambangan, eksplorasi & geoteknik, serta perawatan dan perbaikan alat/mesin pertambangan. Kami berkomitmen untuk memberikan solusi yang efisien, aman, dan berkelanjutan guna mendukung operasional pertambangan yang optimal.

Dengan tim profesional berpengalaman dan peralatan modern, kami memastikan setiap proyek dikerjakan dengan standar tinggi, baik dari segi produktivitas, keselamatan kerja, maupun kepatuhan terhadap regulasi lingkungan.

Kami melayani berbagai perusahaan tambang di Indonesia dengan fokus pada kualitas, ketepatan waktu, dan efisiensi operasional, serta terus berinovasi untuk menghadirkan layanan terbaik bagi industri pertambangan.

 Layanan Kami:
 Konstruksi & Infrastruktur Tambang – Pembangunan jalan hauling, akses tambang, dan fasilitas pendukung untuk meningkatkan efisiensi transportasi dan operasional.
 Pengupasan Tanah, Eksplorasi & Geoteknik – Pengelolaan material, analisis geoteknik, stabilitas lereng, serta reklamasi pasca-tambang untuk memastikan keberlanjutan lingkungan.
 Perawatan & Perbaikan Alat/Mesin Pertambangan – Layanan pemeliharaan berkala, inspeksi, perbaikan alat berat dan mesin pertambangan guna memaksimalkan performa dan umur operasional.

 Mengapa Memilih Kami?
 Profesional & Berpengalaman – Tim ahli dengan rekam jejak sukses di industri pertambangan.
 Komitmen Keselamatan – Standar K3 yang ketat untuk memastikan keamanan di setiap proyek.
 Efisiensi & Keandalan – Optimalisasi sumber daya untuk hasil terbaik bagi klien.
 Keberlanjutan & Kepatuhan – Menerapkan praktik kerja ramah lingkungan dan sesuai regulasi.

 Kami percaya bahwa keberlanjutan adalah kunci masa depan industri pertambangan. Oleh karena itu, kami menerapkan praktik kerja yang bertanggung jawab dan berorientasi pada efisiensi serta pelestarian lingkungan.

Name: TERRA DI TUTTI srl
Description: Terra di Tutti è un laboratorio permanente di produzione artigianale ed artistica in cui gli ospiti delle strutture di accoglienza sono inseriti insieme a persone del territorio nella creazione di idee, storie ed oggetti. Terra di tutti è un fazzoletto di pianeta nomade e transitorio, una comunità in movimento non virtuale ma reale. In questo spazio vige la nostra legge. La nostra legge è che non c’è legge ma ognuno si regola attraverso la giustizia universale. Il suo essere transitorio condiziona i nostri oggetti, oggetti e non cose. Le cose non sono del resto del mondo, noi le raccogliamo e le carichiamo del nostro pensiero trasformandole in oggetti. Ecco la differenza. Una sedia non è solo una sedia ma porta pensieri e storie necessità e desideri da raccontare e condividere. Si adattano al non luogo trasformandosi secondo i bisogni. Sono leggeri e funzionali soprattutto se ne vanno da dove sono venuti senza lasciare traccia per essere giusti con quel fazzoletto di pianeta che ci ha ospitati.

Name: Blanchard Caulking and Coating
Description:
We offer waterproofing services to the commercial construction industry, including Multifamily, Mix-Use, Office, Hotels, Industrial, Education, and Healthcare in the Southeast. 

Our priority is to keep water from intruding into your building. Our application of high-quality sealants, deck coatings, and wall coatings is crucial to ensuring a watertight barrier. The coating industry has come a long way, with various elastomeric and high-build acrylic coatings to choose from. Polyurethane and silicone sealants also ensure that water does not find a way around window perimeters, sliding glass doors, or any other opening that could allow water to enter your condominium. We will work with you to ensure water cannot penetrate your building exterior.

Blanchard also waterproofs elevated balcony decks, walkways, courtyards, and veranda decks. Proper application methods are the most critical aspect of applying a horizontal waterproofing membrane. The commercial-grade waterproofing materials we recommend are proven in the industry – attention to proper preparation methods and following material specifications is the key to a successful job. Blanchard Caulking and Coating stand behind every application with an industry-standard labor and material warranty that gives our owners peace of mind.

Name: Clean Energy Electrical Group LTD.
Description:
We are Clean Energy Electrical Group Ltd., your trusted partner for comprehensive electrical solutions. With a reputation anchored on quality and commitment, we stand out in the sea of electrical services providers.
Taking shortcuts may occasionally be tempting, but when it comes to electrical work, it's an absolute no-go. Anytime you encounter an issue related to electricity, consulting a professional electrician isn't just recommended—it's imperative. Overlooking this crucial step can have lasting repercussions.

The dangers of faulty wiring are real and imminent. Think of it as a ticking time bomb. And if that doesn't underscore the importance of hiring a professional for your electrical needs, consider this, the world of wiring isn't as straightforward as you might think. It's not a mere "the light turns on, or it doesn't" situation. In reality, there's a complex, interrelated system in play. Even circuits that appear safe but are poorly designed can wreak havoc on your appliances and electronics. If this comes as a suprise, it's a clear sign you need to step back from any DIY attempts and seek expert guidance.

Clean Energy stands as a leading full-service electrical contracting firm, having served countless homes and businesses over the years. What sets us apart isn't just our unparalleled expertise and workmanship, but our unwavering dedication to customer satisfaction. Our ambition isn't solely to be the top electrical service provider in the Winnipeg, but to set the gold standard for reliability and efficiency.

For projects of all scales, we guarantee an unmatched level of attention and care. Reach out to us, detail your needs, and receive a free, no-obligation estimate. We pride ourselves on the accuracy of our quotations—what you agree upon is exactly what you'll pay, without any hidden surprises.

Description:
Zentel Tech was founded to allow great people to flourish by encouraging them to do what they know is right for the customer. Our company is a place where our people are encouraged to be creative, intuitive, and honorable.

The most talented people in our industry have struggled between doing what is right and enhancing the Company’s bottom line.  The unfortunate result of this chase to the bottom line is that we all (customers included) end up on the bottom.  We have found through our interaction with thousands of customers that the ability to diagnose and troubleshoot systems have been replaced by the mentality that “we need to get it done cheaper” or “it doesn’t matter if it works, they can pay us to fix it later.” We see this mentality as one that risks everything and serves none.

It is with our combined knowledge and culture, which inspires our truly skilled craftsmen to rise to the elite of the industry.  This is demonstrated in the fact that we can provide unique and cost effective solutions to our customers that exceed their expectations.

Zentel Tech’s culture encompasses the unique ability to look beyond the base of the problem and identify solutions that overcome any obstacles. The culture that we have cultivated has allowed our people to grow more than 50% per year, year after year. Our friends and customers turn to us for long lasting solutions. They know that our knowledge and support make our mechanics the most creative and resourceful in the industry.

Our Sustainable Soil Stabilization Products:
3S-100: Designed for environmentally sensitive areas, used for dust control, soil stabilizer that focuses on preserving ecosystems while stabilizing soil. It minimizes disturbance to plant and animal life, making it an ideal choice for projects that require ecological balance.

3S-200: Our flagship product is a cutting-edge soil stabilizer that improves soil strength, erosion resistance, and load- bearing capacity. It is derived from natural ingredients and provides long-lasting stabilization results, ensuring a durable and sustainable solution for various applications.

3S-300: Our third product is a bio-based soil binder that promotes soil stabilization using biopolymers. It offers a sustainable alternative to traditional chemical binders, ensuring soil integrity without compromising environmental sustainability.

Soil Stabilizer Paver: Soil Stabilization Paver used for Road pavement, 3S-300 and Soil Paver have strong chemical bonding for heavy traffic road construction especially desert road, petrol road for emergency access and temporary roads.

Weiters bieten wir ein Miet-Service vom einfachen Schallpegelmesser bis zum geeichten Präzisionsschallpegelmesser inkl. Zubehör und Software – mit Schwerpunkt Bauakustik – an. Unsere Produktpalette umfasst weiters Systemlösungen für Umwelt-/Industrielärm, Bau-/Raumakustik, Schallortung/-Lokalisierung, Schallprognoseberechnung, Materialprüfung, Arbeitsplatz- und Vibrationsmessungen, Geometrische Lasermesstechnik.

Brent Jerner opened the doors in December, 2004, and the company has seen steady growth in each of the ensuing years under Brent's ownership and management. APG’s primary focus has been sales, design, installation, maintenance and service of grid tied PhotoVoltaic (PV) systems for 0residential, agricultural, commercial, and industrial applications.

APG is also a full-service provider of :
• Off-grid/hybrid solar electricity generating systems, often incorporating backup generators and batteries.
• Off-grid water pumping systems.
• Solar thermal systems for industrial, commercial, and residential domestic hot water applications (in-floor radiant and  space heating, as well as pool and spa heating).
• Custom built structures including tracking systems, ground mounts, decorative yard structures, garages, shops, and steel or wood frame buildings to support solar equipment.

APG holds California State Contractors license #859901 B General, specialty C-10 (electrical), and C-46 (solar). Brent Jerner participates in the invitation-only California State License Board C-46 series of workshops to facilitate the re-writing of the State of California specialty solar license test.

APG has a very good working relationship with the various AHJs authorities having jurisdiction over local City & County Departments of Building and Safety.  APG has conducted several training seminars and presentations concerning code compliant solar electric generation installations for local building and safety inspectors.

Core Drilling – precise holes for plumbing, electrical, HVAC and engineering applications
Wall Sawing – fast and accurate cuts for doorways, windows, lift shafts and structural openings
Floor Sawing / Road Sawing – for slabs, driveways, and concrete or asphalt removal
Hand Sawing & Flush Cutting – ideal for confined areas and edge work
Ring Sawing & Chain Sawing – for deeper or reinforced concrete cutting
Robotic Demolition – remote-controlled, fume-free concrete removal with exceptional precision

Our team is fully insured, EBA compliant and CFMEU affiliated, ensuring all works are carried out to the highest safety and industry standards. We use advanced hydraulic and electric systems to minimise dust, noise and vibration while maximising productivity on-site.

Whether it’s a small residential job or a large commercial project, Kustom Cut delivers the right equipment, the right method, and the right results — every time.

150–300+ unit projects are our comfort zone.

Underground → rough-in → finishing → flushing → startup → turnover documentation.

4) Strong Site Leadership

Proven ability to deliver on tight timelines.

5) Documentation & Commissioning Focus

Proper flushing, chemical treatment, startup coordination, test forms.

We don’t disappear at the end — we finish properly.

6) Trusted by Major GCs & Developers

Repeat work because we deliver, not because we are cheapest.

Name: LAU Malerfirma

Kender du det når din håndværker proaktivt påminder dig om en forestående opgave, som personen skal udføre for dig? Det gør mine mine kunder - for jeg sætter en dyd i at agere, som det serviceorgan jeg skilter med at være. 

I tillæg til det, så sker det med en entusiasme, faglig korrekthed og ikke mindst med et humør som kun er de fleste forundt når fredag fyraften sætter ind. 

Interessen og passionen for det malerfaglige, slår rødder tilbage til forrige generation, hvor undertegnedes far i 1966 modtog svendebrevet. Jeg har ikke glemt de gamle dyder han lærte mig, som blandet med nye teknologier, gør at vi både kan fokusere på det pæne resultat, med kostbesparende arbejdsmetoder, samtidig med at vi møder alle i øjenhøjde med professionel vejledning eller bare til en sludder over en kop kaffe.

Specialer:
- fuldspartling
- opsætning af filt
- facademaling
- tapet
- flyttelejligheder
- nybyg
- maling af lofter, vægge og træværk

Vi er faste hus-malere hos Pension Danmark, Uddannelses- og forskningsministeriet, Det Danske Filminstitut, AAB samt en række entreprenører.

Er du nysgerrig på, om jeg kan hjælpe dig med dit projekt - eller har du behov for malerteknisk vejledning, så tøv ikke med at kontakte mig på lau@malerlau.dk eller tlf 60886350.

Livet skal leves og ses i farver - og jeg har farvekortet!

Name: 4INDUSTRY
Description:
Dlaczego warto wybrać 4INDUSTRY? Bo łączymy doświadczenie praktyczne z realnymi potrzebami zakładów produkcyjnych. Od ponad 15 lat przeprowadzamy bezpieczne i skuteczne relokacje maszyn oraz linii technologicznych – bez zbędnych przestojów i kompromisów jakościowych. 

Działasz z jednym partnerem, który bierze pełną odpowiedzialność za cały proces: od planowania, przez demontaż, transport i posadowienie, aż po podłączenie i uruchomienie instalacji. Bez koordynowania wielu podwykonawców i bez chaosu na hali.

Projektujemy, modernizujemy i serwisujemy infrastrukturę przemysłową: instalacje elektryczne NN/SN/Trafo, instalacje wody chłodzącej, sprężonego powietrza, systemy podawania tworzywa oraz szynoprzewody.

Description: Assembly Line è nata nel dicembre del 2003 in seguito alla richiesta sempre più crescente di molte aziende di poter usufruire di manodopera qualificata sotto forma di lavorazione esterna. Assembly line esegue, per conto terzi, operazioni di assemblaggio, imballaggio, test su banchi prova e qualsiasi tipo di lavorazione richiesta dal cliente, dai grandi quantitativi ai piccoli lotti. Assembly line offre al cliente la possibilità di avvalersi di linee di assemblaggio nel momento di effettivo bisogno permettendo al cliente di non accollarsi costi fissi di produzione. Assembly line è in grado di eseguire qualsiasi tipo di lavorazione, dal semplice imbustaggio di particolari al montaggio completo del prodotto finito, testato, imballato, fasciato e pronto per la spedizione. Personale altamente qualificato, una struttura flessibile e un grande spazio a disposizione permettono ad Assembly line di rispondere prontamente, efficacemente e qualitativamente a qualsiasi richiesta da parte del cliente, adeguandosi facilmente anche nei casi di variazione dei tempi di consegna. Grazie alla nostra professionalità e serietà Assembly line è il partner ideale per le aziende che, pur avendo alti e bassi lavorativi, vogliono mantenere elevato il livello qualitativo delle loro lavorazioni. Inoltre per ogni lavorazione, personale qualificato mette in atto una procedura dedicata al controllo qualitativo secondo gli standard ISO 9001. Ci possiamo anche occupare grazie a nostri terzisti affidati dello stampaggio dei particolari da assemblare occupandoci direttamente noi dell'emissione degli ordini con le relative richieste di consegna nei tempi corretti secondo l'organizzazione produttiva. Non poniamo limiti al nostro operato e siamo alla costante ricerca di nuove opportunità per far crescere la nostra azienda.

Name: Sioux Falls Concrete Lifting
Description:
With many years of concrete experience, Clint recognized the local need for quality concrete lifting, sought out the best products, and launched Sioux Falls Concrete Lifting as a complementary company to Clint Stencil Construction.

The structure is only as good as the foundation it’s built on. Regardless of how well built a structure may be, the ground beneath it often settles. Erosion, shifting soil, compaction, and many other environmental conditions contribute to this problem.

We use a polymer foam capable of lifting up to 14,000 per square foot, injected through small 3/8” holes drilled in the concrete surface. This foam is hydrophobic, temperature stable, and long lasting. The foam material injects in liquid form, spreads out 3-4 feet in every direction and then expands, filling any underground void and raising the concrete as it expands. Once the concrete has been lifted into place, the holes are patched so that you’ll hardly notice them.

Visi
Menjadi perusahaan konstruksi mekanikal yang terdepan dan unggul di tingkat nasional, dengan reputasi yang dibangun di atas pilar kualitas tinggi, ketepatan waktu, dan standar keamanan kerja kelas dunia.

Misi
• Keunggulan Layanan: Memberikan solusi teknis yang melampaui ekspektasi klien melalui penerapan standar kualitas premium secara konsisten.
• SDM Profesional: Membangun tim ahli yang memiliki integritas tinggi, profesionalisme, dan dedikasi terhadap pengembangan diri yang berkelanjutan.
• Inovasi Berkelanjutan: Terus bertransformasi secara adaptif dalam mengadopsi kemajuan teknologi dan nilai-nilai modernisasi industri.

Name: KAOS Services Group PTY LTD
Description:
KAOS Services Group helps commercial venues stay operational through proactive (and increasingly predictive) maintenance, fit-for-purpose equipment solutions, fast response support, and a strong hygiene/safety compliance focus.

We’re built for environments where downtime costs money, service, and reputation. Our purpose is simple: remove the stress from purchasing, maintenance and repairs—by reducing failures, preventing surprises, and keeping equipment performing consistently with minimal disruption.

**What you can expect**
• Proactive servicing designed to prevent breakdowns
• Clear communication and practical recommendations
• Support that prioritises uptime and safe operation
• Documentation aligned to hygiene, safety and compliance requirements

Based in Melbourne and servicing Victoria, with interstate support available by appointment.

**Ask about RunSure — our reliability program that uses servicing cadence, condition-based checks, and performance data to prevent failures before they disrupt service.**

**RunSure includes**
• Quarterly technician visits (or tighter where usage demands)
• Condition-based checks, deep cleans, calibration and sanitation temperature verification (where applicable)
• Pre-planned wear-part swaps before failure
• QR-coded assets for instant history and faster callouts
• Performance & Actions Reports with traffic-light priorities
• Operator micro-training, member pricing and priority booking windows

With over 28 years of experience in the industry, our team possesses extensive knowledge and expertise, allowing us to deliver sustainable hydraulically applied solutions tailored to our clients' unique needs.

SERVICES

Hydroseeding:
Our hydroseeding service utilizes a nutrient-rich mixture sprayed directly onto the soil, promoting rapid grass growth and creating robust ground cover. This method ensures effective germination and enhances erosion resistance, making it ideal for commercial projects.

Dust Control:
Our innovative dust control solutions are designed to significantly reduce airborne particles, enhancing environmental safety and cleanliness. This service primarily benefits construction sites, unpaved roads, and large open areas that generate dust.

Soil Solutions:
We offer advanced soil amendments that improve soil health, enhance water retention, and strengthen plant resilience. Our services are tailored to meet the challenges of Central Oregon's unique climate and soil conditions, ensuring optimal growth and sustainability.

APPLICATIONS:
Construction Sites: We provide solutions to prevent erosion following construction or earthmoving activities.
Mine Site Rehabilitation: Our services focus on restoring vegetation in areas affected by mining operations.
Erosion Control: Our expertise includes protecting slopes and other areas vulnerable to erosion.

We’re not just fixing leaks — we’re actively helping California and Nevada conserve water, reduce property damage, and make smarter, more responsible infrastructure decisions. 

At The Leak Authority:

- Every inspection is personally overseen by a seasoned expert.

- Pricing is transparent, with no corporate markups or surprises.

- We show up prepared, communicate clearly, and stand behind every job.

Whether it’s detection, repair, consultation, or utility locate, when precision matters, trust The Leak Authority.

For Customers: Enjoy a stunning kitchen transformation without the mess, delays, or hidden costs.

As an EatGatherLove franchise owner, you'll lead kitchen refacing projects—replacing doors, drawers, and countertops—while your skilled team handles the installations.

Why It Works:

In a $150B industry with 2 million kitchens renovated annually, our approach stands out with easy management, powerful marketing, and premium products—all backed by comprehensive support.

Interested in bringing EatGatherLove to your area? Contact us today to learn more about franchise opportunities.

Name: Gaardland
Description:
Gaardland

Hvor tillid og håndværk mødes
Ejendomsservice & håndværk i Aarhus og omegn, for virksomheder, boligforeninger, grund- og andels ejerforeninger samt institutioner

 Kvalitet, ordentlighed og respekt i alt, hvad vi gør

Hvem er Gaardland?
Hos Gaardland er vi mere end bare en leverandør af praktiske løsninger – vi er din pålidelige samarbejdspartner.
Uanset om du er boligejer, ejendomsadministrator, virksomhed, boligforening eller institution, skræddersyr vi vores ydelser til dine behov.
Vi bygger vores arbejde på ordentlighed, faglig stolthed og respekt for både mennesker og ejendomme. Tillid er ikke noget, vi tager for givet – det er noget, vi gør os fortjent til gennem gennemsigtighed, kvalitet og stabilt samarbejde.

Med Gaardland får du en partner, der tager ansvar og går op i at gøre tingene rigtigt – hver gang.

Henriks historie - Hvorfor startede jeg Gaardland?
Efter mere end 15 år i kundeservice har én ting altid stået klart for mig: Det handler om mennesker.
Jeg har oplevet, hvordan ægte service ikke kun handler om at løse opgaver, men om at skabe tillid – gennem nærvær, respekt og ordentlighed.
Med tiden voksede ønsket om at skabe noget eget. Et sted hvor kvalitet, håndværk og menneskelige værdier gik hånd i hånd. Hvor jeg kunne tage ansvar for både resultatet og relationen – uden at gå på kompromis med, hvordan tingene bliver gjort.
Det ønske blev til virkelighed med Gaardland.

Vores værdier
 Ordentlighed og ansvar i alt, vi gør
 Faglig stolthed – vi gør os umage
 Troværdighed og ærlige aftaler
 Respekt for både mennesker og ejendomme
 Kommunikation og gennemsigtighed fra start til slut

Hvad gør Gaardland anderledes?
Hos Gaardland gør vi os umage – hver gang. Vi tror på, at tillid skabes gennem klare aftaler, gennemsigtighed og ved altid at levere det, vi lover.
Vi overlader ikke noget til tilfældighederne. Vi går op i detaljerne, fordi vi ved, at det er der, kvaliteten bor.

Em um curto período, transformamos desafios em oportunidades, estabelecendo-nos como uma força impulsionadora na criação de ambientes excepcionais.

Nosso compromisso primordial é construir mais do que estruturas físicas; é construir confiança, parcerias duradouras e, acima de tudo, realizar os sonhos dos nossos clientes. Desde o início, abraçamos a visão de ser uma empresa que vai além das expectativas, proporcionando soluções construtivas que refletem qualidade, transparência e inovação.

Ao longo dos anos, acumulamos experiência em uma ampla gama de projetos, desde reformas residenciais e industriais até instalações elétricas, hidráulicas e urbanização. Cada empreendimento é tratado com dedicação, desde o conceito inicial até a entrega final, garantindo que cada cliente experimente a verdadeira essência da Nova Ordem ENGENHARIA.

Agradecemos a cada cliente que confiou em nossa expertise para concretizar seus projetos e contribuiu para o nosso crescimento contínuo. Estamos comprometidos em permanecer na vanguarda da inovação, abraçando desafios e evoluindo constantemente para atender e superar as expectativas do setor.

A Nova Ordem ENGENHARIA, fundada em 2018, é mais do que uma empresa de construção; é uma promessa de qualidade, confiança e realização de sonhos. Estamos empolgados com o futuro e ansiosos para continuar construindo legados duradouros para nossos clientes.

Name: Tradesflow
Description:
What makes Tradesflow different is that by identifying the critical moving parts for any service or maintenance trade, and only focusing on that, we have been able to simplify, automate, and streamline those processes so that your whole team can easily do what they need to do: Get. Stuff. Done.  


Tradesflow offers a completely scalable and customizable solution uniquely designed for the trades and home service industry, with very low barriers to adoption. We've made digital transformation more adoptable than ever for the small and micro teams that serve us, our homes, and our properties. 

Who is it for? The flexibility of Tradesflow for small and micro teams is proven in our range of users: Repair and Maintenance Companies, IT Networking, On-Site Equipment Inspection and Maintenance, Sub-Contractors, Personal Services, and the list goes on. 
If you need to go to your customers home, site, or other location in order to do or deliver your work, Tradesflow is for you. If you have struggled with other field management software and know you have to figure something out, Tradesflow is for you. If you are still on paper, excel, and/or basic Invoicing software, Tradesflow is for you.  Tradesflow will not replace your bookkeeping software, but will talk to it.

Tradesflow's Founder has always been a tradeswoman, working in and with many small trades over the years. She has an intrinsic understanding of the way business is done at that level, and the unique needs and expectations of this growing demographic. Tradesflow software was born of meeting those needs within her own Home and Building repair company, and experiencing tremendous results. The passion she has for her community has led to creating Tradesflow as it is today.

Fast forward to high school where I started my actual construction background with siding, roofing and paving for multiple summers. Eventually, this led me to move to Columbus and start my 10 years+ in the HVAC profession. It then shortly led me to product management at the Home Depot and eventually into the Home Inspection profession. 

I officially started my own contracting business and received my licenses through the state of Ohio. I did this to help diversify my business model and knowledge base to ALL of my customers, including some past inspection clients. I have grown to develop some amazing relationships including; specific honest real estate agents who really understand the aspect of quality and honest services to clients for long term investment; multiple investor who share the same belief as myself and want to provide a quality product while still making money; most importantly, past clients or homeowners who continue to use me multiple times. 

I tend to take more time setting out expectations and the reality of any construction project. From start to finish, I give my clients a base goal of time, materials and cost, etc. I let the client know that I am interviewing them as well as I encourage them to interview me!

Every client and project is different. I do not work for them; I work with them as they work with me. I work on every project or inspection in life as if it were my own family’s house. Therefore, I do not take on all and every job or service that is asked of me. There is plenty of work to go around in this world for all professions and I do not nor have never claimed to know everything that is ridiculous.
 
The bottom line is that I try to do a great job for a fair price.

Name: Jacked Up LLC WI
Description:
Jacked Up concrete leveling is an effective and affordable solution for fixing uneven concrete. We work with landlords and homeowners, commercial property owners, associations, and property management agencies throughout Southeast Wisconsin to provide reliable service and proven concrete raising and leveling solutions.

Polyurethane concrete raising, or polyjacking, is similar to mud jacking but uses a polyurethane foam instead of a cement slurry to raise and support sunken or unstable concrete. We insert polyurethane foam under the problem area where it expands to lift, stabilize, and provide support for the concrete above. 

This is the most modern method of concrete raising on the market today. It is less expensive than replacing concrete and only requires us to drill dime-sized holes in your existing concrete. Since we only drill a few small holes, the repaired area can bear weight the same day. There is no curing period.

Polyurethane can be used to address foundation problems and requires no curing time. Polyjacking provides additional advantages because as it expands, it compresses and stabilizes the surrounding soil resulting in a much more solid solution that won't shift or settle over time. There is no risk of the polyurethane cracking or fracturing, even with our Wisconsin temperature extremes. Polyjacking is even suitable for wet locations.

Notre équipe offre également un service de maintenance préventive et corrective, permettant de prolonger la durée de vie de vos installations et d'éviter les coûts élevés de réparations majeures. As we’ve built our company from the ground up, we’ve stayed committed to building trust with our clients, training our installers to the highest standards, and offering outstanding customer service. 

Commercial Applications:
Concrete coatings can add much value to businesses and commercial spaces, especially those with lots of foot traffic and activity or performing industrial-grade work. Safety is a prime feature of our polyurea and non-porous coatings. - Gyms
- Weight rooms
- Bathrooms
- Rec areas
- Hallways
- Schools
- Airport hangers
- Storage areas
- Hospitals
- Entryways

- Stairways

Residential Applications:
If you have a room or space in your home with a concrete floor or base, we can apply a coat. Coating provides spaces with smooth, easy-to-maintain surfaces. They also add protection from spills, shifting temperatures, and weather conditions. Choose our polyurea and non-porous coats to improve your concrete’s resilience and beauty. Name: PT Cipta Tehnik Abadi
Description:
PT. Cipta Tehnik Abadi was founded in 1975 by Mr. Soenjoto Thedjoisworo (Alm.) and began by providing machines, process equipment, steel pipes, and spare parts focused on the sugar industry. 

PT CTA has established good cooperation with the Benteler Brand, the best boiler pipe company made in Germany with British Standards (BS), European Standards (EN), and Japanese quality, as a Stockist for Benteler Boiler Pipes.

We currently store many frequently needed supplies for the sugar industry and other industries, including boiler pipes, black pipes, mechanical supplies, and steel in a 7,500 square meter warehouse in our 8 ha industrial complex. With over forty years of experience, we frequently upgrade our inventory to meet our customer base's increasingly diverse and complex needs. Our deep relationships with clients and business partners provide us with extensive local and international sourcing, technical expertise, and a wealth of knowledge.

Seeing the increasingly rapid development of the sugar industry, in our efforts to meet the needs of the sugar industry in the country, PT Cipta Tehnik Abadi (CTA) collaborated with the company Sutech (Sugar Technology), Thailand, to collaborate in establishing PT Indo Sutech Sejahtera. 

After being involved in the sugar industry for almost 40 years and being part of the development of the sugar industry in Indonesia, we are now starting to expand into other industrial sectors such as F&B, Palm Oil, Oil and Gas, and the chemical industry as a one-stop service provider. 

With reliable experts who have competence and experience of more than 40 years in the industrial sector, accompanied by our network and superior products, we strive to be a one-stop solution that is tailored and comprehensive and satisfies your company's industrial needs.

Name: A.I. Guidovie s.r.l.
Description:
Our Company
For over 50 years, our company based in Venice, Italy, has been dedicated to designing and manufacturing high-quality equipment crafted from anodized aluminum alloy. Our focus is on providing solutions for the storage and transportation of food products, with a particular emphasis on meat, within cold rooms and laboratories in malls, hypermarkets, hotels, butcher shops, and more.

Core Products
– Meat Rail Systems: These systems efficiently transport meat from the loading area to both cold rooms and working areas. Noteworthy is our innovative self-supporting system with internal sliding hooks, patented by our founder in the '70s. This groundbreaking design has positioned us as pioneers in security, revolutionizing our sector to the extent that we have become a reference point for our competitors.
– Meat Framings: Designed for meat storage, these provide a cost-effective and versatile alternative to optimize smaller cold rooms.
– High Modular Shelving for Cold Rooms: Our shelving solutions include a high-load capacity model reaching depths of 90 cm, supporting loads of up to 700 kg per shelf level.

Additional Products
– Fruit and Vegetable Display Units
– Rollers
– Trolleys

Product Strengths
– Made in Italy
– High-Quality Certified Materials
– Safety
– Customization
– Quick and Easy Installation
– Pleasant Aesthetics
– Durability

Our Dealers
We collaborate with various partners, including:
– Cold Room Producers
– Refrigeration Companies
– Shopfitters
– Designers working on turnkey projects
Their technical department is equipped to manage AutoCAD projects for large-scale distribution, perform measurements and installations, and provide ongoing assistance.

References
Our products have been chosen by international supermarket and hypermarket chains worldwide. For more details, please don't hesitate to contact us.

- Sprzedaż i instalacja wykładziny PVC,

- Sprzedaż i instalacja wykładzin dywanowych zarówno w rolce jak i w płytkach,

- Przygotowanie podłoża pod każdy rodzaj wykładziny,
- Wykonanie wylewki samopoziomującej,

- Sprzedaż i montaż wszelkiego rodzaju akcesoriów do wykładzin: listew wykończeniowych, progowych, itp.

Description:
Kelly & Company is a leading provider of mobile hospitality and logistical support solutions for disaster relief and recovery operations. With a focus on serving electric cooperatives, government agencies, and contractors, we specialize in ensuring that response teams have the resources they need to restore critical infrastructure in the aftermath of natural disasters.

Our full-service mobile units are designed to operate in challenging environments, offering a wide range of essential services, including:
-Mobile kitchens that serve hot, nutritious meals to keep crews energized during long and demanding shifts.
-Temporary housing to provide safe, comfortable accommodations near work sites, reducing downtime and ensuring workers stay rested.
-Laundry services to ensure clean, fresh clothing is always available for extended operations.
-Sanitation facilities, including clean, reliable restroom and shower units, to maintain health and hygiene on-site.
-Support equipment that includes credentialing, security, lighting, traffic control, logistics coordination, site planning, and proper grey and black water disposal.

At Kelly & Company, we take a proactive approach to disaster preparedness. We closely monitor weather developments, such as hurricanes and tropical storms, and pre-stage resources in strategic locations to enable rapid deployment as soon as the situation allows. Our team is committed to partnering with electric cooperatives and government contractors to ensure a seamless response when disaster strikes, helping crews focus on their vital tasks of restoring power and rebuilding communities.

With a reputation for reliability and efficiency, Kelly & Company provides scalable solutions tailored to meet the specific needs of each client, from small-scale teams to large, complex operations. Prepared, dependable, and ready to support those who keep the lights on and communities safe. 
Let’s work together to ensure you’re ready for the next challenge.

* Slow heat transfer into attic and out of your roof

 Posiadamy nowoczesny zakład produkcyjny i zaawansowane technologie, które umożliwiają realizację skomplikowanych projektów.

 Wspieramy klientów na etapie projektowania CAD/CAM oraz przygotowania projektów do produkcji.
 Obsługujemy firmy z różnych sektorów, takich jak meblarstwo, budownictwo, retail, gastronomia i reklama, oferując produkty takie jak fronty meblowe, panele dekoracyjne, elementy stolarskie i elewacje wentylowane.

As a premier provider of high-performance heating, ventilation, and air conditioning solutions, we bring unparalleled comfort and efficiency to both residential and light commercial spaces.

 Our approach is rooted in the belief that every home or office functions as a system.  This holistic perspective allows us to optimize the performance of your HVAC system, ensuring that all components work seamlessly together to deliver superior air quality, energy efficiency, and overall comfort. 

We focus on what we call the *Big Four* of a Home's Comfort System:


1. Equipment selection: We use state-of-the-art equipment to keep your home or office at its optimal comfort level, ensuring reliability and efficiency.

2. Ventilation and Humidity Control: We manage the ventilation and humidity levels in your home and office to create a healthier and more comfortable indoor environment.

3. Air Delivery and Balance: We optimize air delivery and balance throughout your home and office to ensure every room receives the right amount of conditioned air.

4. Air Sealing and Insulation: We ensure your structure is properly sealed to prevent air leaks, which enhances energy efficiency and maintains consistent indoor temperatures.

Name: SWAES - Sustainable Water And Energy Solutions
Description:
Sustainable Water and Energy Solutions (SWAES): Your Partner for Water Excellence
At SWAES, we empower businesses to transform water consumption into a strategic asset, driving significant cost savings and enhancing environmental impact across their building portfolios. We tackle inefficient water use with proven solutions.

Our passionate team offers a total, data-driven approach to water management, guiding clients on a long-term journey to water excellence. This comprehensive partnership helps you unlock your full water-saving potential.

How we achieve this:

Granular Data Insights: Our advanced Automatic Meter Readers (AMRs) capture water usage every 30 seconds, revealing inefficiencies and detecting hidden leaks. We find what's missed.
Tailored & High-Efficiency Solutions: We provide bespoke recommendations, from comprehensive audits for major organizations (Microsoft, NHS) to implementing innovative, touchless washroom and commercial kitchen solutions. Our electronic fixtures offer superior water saving, hygiene, and durability, backed by a 10-year guarantee.
Revolutionary HVAC Water Quality Monitoring: This continuous service prevents corrosion and congestion, potentially extending HVAC unit lifespan by up to 100% and generating significant operational energy savings (e.g., helping a hotel avoid a £3 million pipework replacement).
Optimized Design with Real-World Data: For new builds/refurbs, we use actual usage data to inform design, ensuring optimal fixture installation and saving space/money.
SWAES has evolved into a leading force, leveraging cutting-edge technology to revolutionize water management across the UK, EMEA, and globally. We proudly partner with diverse organizations—from charities and SMEs to major national and international corporates—helping them become champions of sustainable change.

Ready to transform your water consumption into a strategic asset for 2025 and beyond? Contact us at www.swaes.co.uk for a consultation.

Name: Rowerowy Ekspert

Jestem pasjonatem rowerów, który nie tylko naprawia, ale i dzieli się swoją miłością do dwóch kółek. Moja firma powstała z pragnienia dostarczenia profesjonalnego serwisu rowerowego oraz wartościowych porad DIY dla wszystkich entuzjastów rowerowych. Nasza Historia
Rowerowy Ekspert narodził się z indywidualnej pasji do rowerów i pragnienia dzielenia się wiedzą. Od pierwszego dnia skupiam się na świadczeniu wysokiej jakości usług serwisowych oraz tworzeniu inspirujących poradników DIY. Jestem tu, aby wspierać Cię w każdym problemie, niezależnie od poziomu doświadczenia.

Dlaczego Ja?
W Rowerowym Ekspercie wierzę, że każdy rowerzysta zasługuje na perfekcyjne doświadczenia na dwóch kółkach. Jestem tu po to, aby Cię wspierać, naprawiać i inspirować.

Misja Rowerowego Eksperta
Moją misją jest nie tylko zapewnić doskonały serwis rowerowy, ale również ułatwić każdemu rowerzyście samodzielne dbanie o swoje jednoślady. W Rowerowym Ekspercie stawiam na edukację, pasję i zaangażowanie. Dołącz do naszej społeczności kolarzy, gdzie rowerowe doświadczenia nabierają nowego wymiaru!

Wspólnie na Szlaku Sukcesu
W Rowerowym Ekspercie wierzymy w siłę wspólnoty rowerowej. Razem naprawiamy, eksplorujemy i inspirujemy. Dołącz do nas, a wspólnie pokonamy każdy szlak!

Name: Precision Blasting
Description:
Precision Blasting provides a mobile Wet and Dry Abrasive blasting service across Perth WA and surrounds. 
We specialise in onsite Vapour Blasting using the latest German built Torbo blasting  equipment to achieve results conventional Dry or Sandblasting couldn't achieve. 
Vapour blasting produces 95% less dust than dry blasting, it can be delicate enough to remove a label from a coke can or powerful enough to remove layers of paint or rust from steel. 
Vapour blasting is fast becoming the preferred method of abrasive blasting. By choosing the right abrasive media, pressures, water/abrasive mixtures we can prepare or restore all types of surfaces in all types of environments. 
Our services are in high demand in the marine industry in Perth with our past and present clients including SFM Marine, Rottenness Fast Ferry, Sealink Ferries, WA Water Police, Australian Defense Force, Austral Fisheries and many more.
Other non marine clients include The City of Wanneroo, Prime West Property Management, West to West, HD Building Group, DCL Contracting. 
We pride ourselves on Professionalism, Solution Solving, Fast and Efficient services, reliability and trustworthiness. 
Visit our social media pages and website to see all our current and past jobs.
We seriously care about your surfaces…………..

Name: Building Controls Maintenance Ltd
Description:
Building Controls Maintenance (BCM) is a specialist Heating Ventilation and Air Conditioning (HVAC) controls company based in Wales.

We provide control solutions for all types of new building, from design right through to end user training.

We also carry out control refurbishment work for systems that can not offer the up to date energy saving and monitoring options or are no longer viable to repair.

As energy costs rise and tax on carbon dioxide emissions increase, an efficient and reliable building control system or Building Energy Management System (BEMS) becomes more important. Reducing your energy consumption obviously saves you money and helps the environment. Money spent maintaining and refurbishing control systems can prove to be a wise investment.

We offer a complete range of maintenance solutions for Building Energy Management Systems (BEMS), Building Automation Systems (BAS) and stand-alone controllers like optimisers and compensators.

Some of our current clients include Ceredigion County Council, Hywel Dda Health Board, Prince Charles Hospital, The National Library of Wales, West Wales Hospital and Aberystwyth University; we also look after many schools, offices and public buildings.

With over 30 years experience in building control, be confident that BCM will offer you a cost effective expert solution to all of your building control maintenance and breakdown needs.

BCM offer an energy efficiency survey of your existing HVAC plant providing you with a report detailing your control systems ability to efficiently control and recommendations about existing electrical and mechanical plant. 

Meet The Team:

Mark Phelps - Director/BMS Engineer

Jo Phelps - Administrator

Ryan Phillips - Projects Manager

Description:
TECNUTENSIL è un'efficiente realtà commerciale che opera dal 1979 nell'ambito della distribuzione, rappresentando in modo completo i campi dell'utensileria meccanica, delle macchine utensili e delle forniture industriali professionali con i migliori marchi del settore.

La Sede centrale di TECNUTENSIL si trova a Carugate, nelle immediate vicinanze di Milano, facilmente raggiungibile dalla Tangenziale Est e dall'Autostrada Milano-Venezia.
Qui, su una superficie di oltre 1.500 mq, operano la Direzione e gli uffici amministrativi, quello commerciale, il punto vendita show room ed il magazzino principale.

Un altro importante punto distributivo è a Dalmine (BG): fondamentale per offrire un’adeguata offerta commerciale e la costante puntualità di servizio sul territorio, questo sito TECNUTENSIL si estende complessivamente su oltre 500 mq di magazzino espositivo, garantendo una completa disponibilità anche alla clientela dell’area di Bergamo.

Dal 2007, TECNUTENSIL ha inoltre acquisito la Società ALMAFER di Bareggio (MI), che vanta un'identica lunga esperienza commerciale e professionale nello stesso ambito di mercato, estendendo così il Gruppo TECNUTENSIL anche nell’area milanese di nord-ovest.
ALMAFER è una struttura completa ed altamente specializzata, con ufficio commerciale, amministrativo e magazzino autonomo di oltre 650 mq, il tutto ben integrato con le procedure e le modalità tecnico professionali di TECNUTENSIL per garantire sempre al Cliente un servizio omogeneo e ad alto valore aggiunto.

Nell’ottobre 2024 il Gruppo TECNUTENSIL è entrata a far parte del FEALTY GROUP, una realtà innovativa nel mondo dell'utensileria specializzata con un obiettivo chiaro: unire competenze, esperienze e risorse per diventare un punto di riferimento irrinunciabile per l'industria meccanica.

Name: LM Solutions Gerenciamento e Serviços

Com presença em todo o Brasil, nossa missão é transformar desafios em oportunidades, entregando resultados de excelência que contribuem para o sucesso de nossos clientes.

Inicialmente focados na gestão e no gerenciamento de projetos, percebemos a crescente demanda por mão de obra qualificada e a confiança dos nossos clientes em nossa expertise. Isso nos levou a expandir nossa atuação para a execução de serviços, o que reforça nosso compromisso em oferecer soluções completas. Com uma equipe altamente especializada nas áreas de mecânica, elétrica, civil e segurança do trabalho, garantimos que cada projeto seja executado com eficiência, qualidade e dentro das especificações técnicas.

Atuamos em diversos setores, incluindo papel e celulose, química e petroquímica, fertilizantes, agronegócio, obras civis e setor naval. Nosso portfólio de serviços abrange desde o planejamento estratégico, controle de qualidade e cronogramas, até a execução de instalações, montagens e construções. Guiados pelas melhores práticas do PMI, personalizamos nossas soluções conforme as necessidades específicas de cada cliente, assegurando entrega no prazo e com excelência.

A expansão da LM Solutions visa não só suprir a falta de mão de obra qualificada, mas também garantir a redução de riscos e retrabalho para nossos clientes. Nosso foco é a entrega de resultados alinhados às expectativas e necessidades de quem confia em nosso trabalho, sempre com compromisso com a segurança, inovação e sustentabilidade.

Estamos prontos para ser a principal referência no mercado brasileiro em soluções integradas, destacando-nos pela qualidade, inovação e resultados excepcionais em cada etapa do projeto.

Name: Adonai Trading & Contracting W.L.L
Description:
ADONAI is a dynamic and forward-thinking company built on a passion for excellence and innovation. Established with the vision of redefining industries, we focus on creating value-driven solutions that touch both lifestyles and living spaces. Though young as a brand, ADONAI stands on the strong foundation of an experienced team with years of expertise across diverse sectors.

At our core, we believe every project and product carries the potential to inspire. Whether transforming a home, upgrading a commercial property, or designing apparel that embodies identity and performance, we deliver with creativity, precision, and integrity. Our commitment lies in tailoring every solution to our clients’ unique needs while ensuring quality and reliability remain uncompromised.

To better serve our clients, ADONAI has evolved into two specialized brands:

Eterna by ADONAI – Timeless Renovations

Eterna is dedicated exclusively to the art of transforming residential and non-residential buildings. With a focus on bespoke design, functionality, and craftsmanship, Eterna goes beyond simple renovation to create spaces where people live, work, and thrive. From small-scale remodels to large-scale refurbishments, we bring fresh perspectives and meticulous attention to detail that reflect each client’s individuality and vision.

Box One by ADONAI – Style. Identity. Elegance.

Box One is a complete trading solution for sportswear, readymade clothing, and customized uniforms. More than just apparel, we provide identity solutions that blend comfort, durability, and design. Whether outfitting corporate teams, schools, or sports clubs, Box One ensures every product tells a story of unity, style, and confidence.

As we grow, ADONAI remains committed to excellence, client satisfaction, and building trusted, long-term partnerships. We are not just a company; we are a brand ecosystem committed to creating environments, products, and experiences that are timeless, innovative, and impactful..

Ældretjenesten bestræber sig på at hjælpe alle der har brug for ekstra hjælp til vedligeholdelse af hus, lejlighed, sommerhus eller have mv. Der er mange der ikke har en familie eller netværk tæt på der kan hjælpe, så derfor står vi klar i Ældretjenesten til at hjælpe dig.

Har du en person du gerne vil hjælpe, men har ikke tiden eller kompetencerne til det, så kan du give et gavekort til bl.a. rengøring, havehjælp eller håndværkeropgaver mv.
