Name: GBT GRUPPEN ApS
Description:
GBT-Gruppen ApS er en byggerådgiver- og projektledervirksomhed, som er specialiseret i at forbinde håndværkere og kunder i byggebranchen. 
Vores primære opgave er at agere som byggerådgivere for vores kunder, hvilket inkluderer at hjælpe med projektering, lokationsbesigtigelse og videofilming, af hvad vi observerer. 
Vi skriver udbudsbeskrivelser og præsenterer de konkrete tilbud til kunden på håndværkerens vegne, som håndværkeren kan byde ind på via vores platform.

Med vores unikke platform, har håndværkerne kun brug for at afsætte 3-5 minutter til at se videoen, læse hvad vi har observeret, læse udbuddet og se tilbuddet. Håndværkeren kan derefter indtaste sin estimeret pris, og vores platform vil automatisk generere en estimeret tilbudspris til kunden. 
Vores platform sikrer også, at alle tilbud er 100% ens og at derved bydes på lige vilkår.

Vi sørger også for, at al kommunikation mellem håndværkere og kunder går igennem GBT-Gruppen for at undgå underhåndsaftaler. 
Vi giver håndværkere mulighed for at tilmelde sig vores GBT-Gruppen gratis. 
Håndværkerne kan byde på projekter, vinde projekter helt gratis og uden omkostninger. 
Som håndværksvirksomhed har du mulighed for at tilvælge en pakke, der øger chancerne for at vinde projekter.

GBT-Gruppen er dedikeret til at gøre hele byggeprocessen så nem og gennemskuelig som muligt for både kunder og håndværkere. 
Vi arbejder kun med pålidelige og kvalificerede håndværkere for at sikre den højeste kvalitet i vores arbejde. 
Vi værdsætter vores samarbejdspartnere og kunder og er altid klar til at hjælpe med at realisere deres projekter på den nemmeste og mest effektive måde.

Description:

Name: Maxwell Fireplace
Description:
Maxwell Fireplace was founded by Maxwell Newhouse in 1985. Originally located on Marine Drive in North Vancouver, the company sold and installed residential gas fireplaces to homeowners in North and West Vancouver.

In 1993 Maxwell Newhouse retired and sold the company to Noel Cormack, a young employee with a clear vision for the company’s future. In the years that followed, Noel maintained the company’s reputation for service and quality. He became well-respected in the hearth industry for his honesty and integrity, each of which fostered the company’s organic growth and maintained its values. A relocation to our current site on Pemberton Avenue in North Vancouver allowed for a larger showroom, which today, is the largest fireplace showroom in the lower mainland. New product lines were introduced, and the company cemented itself as the leader in its industry.

Today, Maxwell Fireplace is no longer the small company it once was, although our values, integrity, and commitment to our customers, business partners, and the community are still the driving force behind everything we do. In 2021 we launched a new and significant strategic plan that included the re-design of our workforce, the recruitment of additional team members, the design and implementation of operational excellence, the introduction of new product lines and categories, a brand re-fresh, and a new website. With a reach that is far wider than before, attracting homeowners and contractors throughout the greater Vancouver area, the North Shore and Sea to Sky Corridor, Maxwell Fireplace has re-established itself as a leader in the hearth industry. And, with our updated modernized showroom featuring sophisticated and unique gas, wood-burning, and electric fireplaces, Maxwell Fireplace is where creativity and beautiful fireplaces come together to create FireSpaces that suit every customer’s lifestyle.

Name: Lindvig Gruppen

Lindvig Gruppen er skabt på en stolt vestjysk tradition for pålidelighed, godt håndværk og nære kunderelationer. Vi startede med en enkel idé: at være den pålidelige partner, kunderne altid kan regne med – uanset opgavens størrelse eller kompleksitet. Gennem ærlighed, dedikation og faglig stolthed har vi udvidet vores kompetencer og er i dag en betroet aktør i Vest- og Midtjylland.

Hos Lindvig Gruppen handler det om mere end teknik – det handler om mennesker. Vi arbejder hver dag for at leve op til vores løfte om kvalitet, effektivitet og tillid.

Når du vælger Lindvig Gruppen, får du én samlet samarbejdspartner, der tager ansvar fra start til slut. Vi møder kunderne, hvor de er, og vi er altid klar til at finde løsninger, der fungerer i praksis – uanset om du er privatkunde, virksomhed eller offentlig aktør.

Lindvig Gruppen er her for at blive, og vi ser frem til at fortsætte med at vokse i takt med vores kunders tillid. Sammen bygger vi en fremtid, hvor Lindvig Gruppen er synonym med kvalitet, pålidelighed og lokale løsninger.

Lindvig Gruppen – Vestjysk kvalitet og troværdighed, tæt på dig.

Name: SANIFIM
Description:
SANIFIM SRL dal 2010 è un punto di riferimento per la bonifica e sanificazione degli impianti aeraulici.
La qualità dell’aria negli ambienti chiusi e la conseguente esigenza di bonifica degli impianti aeraulici ha assunto sempre più importanza e valenza in diversi settori.
Se in passato le strutture che più ricercavano professionisti erano quelle Ospedaliere (per ovvie ragioni igenico – sanitarie) ora anche le aziende di produzione, centri commerciali, strutture pubbliche e private (case di riposo, case di cura ecc.) con grande concentrazione e flusso di persone al loro interno, hanno maturato il loro interesse e la consapevolezza dell’importanza della qualità dell’aria INDOOR (all’interno degli ambienti).
Le normative che tutelano e intendono prevenire problematiche inerenti alla salute nei luoghi pubblici sono molteplici e fanno riferimento in primis al “Testo unico sulla sicurezza“ (D.lgs 81 del 9 Aprile 2008) per quanto concerne gli aspetti giuridici nazionali ma in alcune regioni come la Liguria, la Lombardia ed il Trentino si è approfondito e definito più accuratamente le specifiche in materia, fissando con delle linee guida i percorsi fondamentali per la corretta progettazione, installazione e manutenzione degli impianti aeraulici.
L’Azienda SANIFIM nasce dall’esperienza del suo fondatore nel settore degli impianti di trattamento aria e della climatizzazione. Da chi progetta, costruisce e installa le apparecchiature di trattamento aria ed i suoi componenti (condotte ed accessori) viene la consapevolezza dell’importanza di una manutenzione accurata , soprattutto sotto il profilo igienico.
Avvalendosi di un gruppo di professionisti altamente qualificati e con specifica formazione, SANIFIM SRL effettua il monitoraggio e la taratura di impianti, elabora piani di manutenzione e valutazioni del rischio potenziale , evidenziando le priorità d’intervento con le modalità operative di bonifica.

Our primary focus is to work together with industry, employers, organizations, and individuals to realize their goals through training initiatives.
Our training programs support employees at all levels and allows them to become competent in their current positions, as well as developing them for future roles. Our aim is to become part of the fabric of every company we work with by becoming a truly integrated seamless partner.
NATF plays a vital role in the business community. It encourages employment growth by providing a positive training program. We work closely with our clients to identify and build sustainable skills based on training programs that results in effective and measurable outcomes. NATF measures the success of the training program not only through our clients’ satisfaction but also through national standards of competency.

NATF can offer many benefits to businesses and individuals. Most of our training programs can be placed in four different categories: Skills Assessment, Specialized Training, Adult Apprenticeship, and Youth Career Training . Companies and individuals can take advantage of one or all the many programs offered. For information on any of the programs, please contact National Apprenticeship Training Foundation at 870-246-0320 or contact us at Info@NATF.US

Name: Dakkapel Groningen
Description:
Dakkapel Groningen – Uw specialist in maatwerk dakkapellen

Bij Dakkapel Groningen bent u aan het juiste adres voor het plaatsen, renoveren en onderhouden van hoogwaardige dakkapellen in Groningen en omstreken. Wij combineren vakmanschap, moderne technieken en duurzame materialen om meer licht, ruimte en comfort in uw woning te creëren. Of het nu gaat om een klassiek model of een moderne uitvoering, elke dakkapel wordt volledig op maat gemaakt naar uw wensen en de stijl van uw huis.

Onze ervaren monteurs zorgen voor een vakkundige plaatsing binnen één dag, met minimale overlast en maximale precisie. Dankzij onze uitstekende isolatieoplossingen bespaart u bovendien energie en verhoogt u de waarde van uw woning. Wij leveren zowel kunststof als houten dakkapellen, met keuze uit diverse kleuren, kozijnen en afwerkingen.

Bij Dakkapel Groningen staat kwaliteit en klanttevredenheid centraal. Wij begeleiden u persoonlijk, van advies en ontwerp tot oplevering en nazorg. Vraag vandaag nog een vrijblijvende offerte aan en ontdek hoe eenvoudig het is om uw woning te transformeren met een dakkapel op maat.

Dankzij de efficiënte prefab-methode wordt een dakkapel vaak binnen één dag geplaatst, met minimale overlast voor de bewoner.

Daarnaast biedt het bedrijf aanvullende diensten zoals vergunningaanvraag, binnenafwerking, en onderhoud. Betrouwbaarheid, transparantie en klanttevredenheid staan centraal in de werkwijze van Dakkapel Apeldoorn. Of het nu gaat om een traditionele of moderne dakkapel, elke klant krijgt een op maat gemaakte oplossing die comfort, kwaliteit en esthetiek combineert.

Description: It's no secret that foam injection technology is a game-changer when it comes to repairing cracked, broken, or failing seawalls in South Florida. Name: SFWR Ltd
Description:
SFWR Ltd work in the steel frame and historic cast iron window industry and specialise in the refurbishment of all makes of steel framed and cast iron windows. Although we are a relatively new company our clients already include companies such as Morgan Sindall, MACE, Beard, Brymor and many others, because of our unique skill sets and knowledge,  We are one of the only companies in the UK who can offer in-situ refurbishments and all of our methods and finishes have been inspected and approved by Heritage England. 

From our factory in Sussex we offer an ex-situ service for clients with more severe window issues, and we can fabricate and replace any type of corroded section and welded repair. We can also fabricate and manufacture any type of replica historic steel window when the originals are beyond salvage and these have also been inspected and approved by Heritage England. Factory finishes include hot zinc spray or galvanized treatments and we powder coat finish and can spray finish when a different colour is required internally. 

We also restore all types of historic leaded lights, refurbish or replace lead cames, even cater for thicker glazing such as Norman slab glass. 

We offer the option of traditional putty finishes but we also cater for modern life and can turn existing steel or cast iron windows into energy efficient modern looking units. We do this by replacing putty with a powder coated square steel bar mechanically fixed to the frame to give a crisp modern sightline, and we use vacuum glass units that can have a U-value as low as 0.45, which is far better than triple glazing. Another bonus is vacuum units have an expected life span of fifty years. Many of our clients find this a far more aesthetically pleasing and more economical choice, retaining the original fabric and history of the building, rather than the new thicker frame option to house double glazing of a replica replacement window.

Description:
Realizace stavebně investičních projektů zahrnuje rozsáhlou a velmi složitou přípravu od výběru lokality, veřejnoprávního projednávání, projektové práce i optimální výběr zhotovitelů a odbornou kontrolu jejich dodávek a prací.
Inženýrské činnosti zajišťujeme kvalifikovaným týmem odborníků se zkušenostmi v oblasti přípravy a řízení staveb.

Zajišťujeme:
Analýzy investičních záměrů
Prozkoumávání lokalit
Veřejnoprávní projednávání projektů včetně stavebních a územních řízení
Studie a kompletní stavební projekty formou subdodávek
Detailní stavební rozpočty a předběžné finanční rozvahy
Organizování výběrových řízení, podpora investora při výběru zhotovitele
Technické dozory v rámci realizace staveb
Zajištění služeb bytových architektů
Komplexní řízení projektu
Technický audit projektu

Koordinace BOZP
(dle Zákona č. 309/2006 Sb.)

Zajišťujeme
Předání přehledu právních předpisů vztahujících se ke stavbě, informace o rizicích, která se mohou při realizaci stavby vyskytnout
Zpracování plánů BOZP a veškerých informací o bezpečnostních a zdravotních rizicích na staveništi
Informování všech dotčených zhotovitelů stavby o bezpečnostních a zdravotních rizicích, která vznikla na staveništi během postupu prací
Upozornění zhotovitele stavby na nedostatky v uplatňování požadavků na BOZP zjištěné na staveništi
Doporučení technických řešení nebo organizačních opatření, která jsou z hlediska zajištění bezpečného a zdraví neohrožujícího pracovního prostředí vhodná pro plánování jednotlivých prací
Koordinaci spolupráce zhotovitelů nebo osob jimi pověřených při přijímání opatření k zajištění BOZP.
Návrh termínů kontrolních dnů k dodržování plánu BOZP za účasti zhotovitelů nebo osob jimi pověřených a organizujeme jejich konání
Kontrolu, zda zhotovitelé dodržují plán BOZP, a projednáváme s nimi přijetí opatření a termíny k nápravě zjištěných nedostatků
Provedení zápisů o zjištěných nedostatcích v bezpečnosti a ochraně zdraví při práci na staveništi.

Name: IEC Northern Ohio
Description:
IEC Northern Ohio is a non-profit association representing independent electrical contractors in the greater Cleveland area. Established in 1964 as the Northern Ohio Electrical Contractors Association (NOECA), the organization became affiliated with the national Independent Electrical Contractors (IEC) network nearly three decades ago. This partnership has enhanced its ability to provide members with comprehensive educational programs, safety initiatives, and strong legislative advocacy.
We are committed to promoting responsible, independent, and dedicated electricians through:

Nationally Recognized Apprenticeship Programs: Our four-year, federally registered apprenticeship combines 144 hours of classroom instruction annually with 2,000 hours of on-the-job training, covering essential topics like electrical theory, safety (OSHA 10 & 30), and CPR. 
IEC Northern Ohio

Educational Opportunities: Members have access to free and discounted Continuing Education Units (CEUs), specialized training through manufacturer partnerships, and safety training. 
IEC Northern Ohio

Legislative Advocacy: We actively represent the interests of independent electrical contractors at local, state, and national levels, ensuring a favorable environment for merit-shop businesses.

Networking and Business Development: Our members benefit from networking opportunities, business services, and representation on key industry committees, including the National Electrical Code and NFPA Correlating Committee

At IEC Northern Ohio, we prioritize:

Safety and professionalism

Ethical conduct and integrity

Ongoing education and workforce development

Embracing innovation and technology

Continuous improvement and service expansion

We are dedicated to ensuring that the independent electrical contracting sector remains competitive and sustainable in the evolving marketplace.

Elke dakkapel wordt ontwikkeld met oog voor detail en voldoet aan de actuele bouw- en veiligheidseisen.

Dakkapel Almere staat bekend om zijn transparante werkwijze. Vooraf krijgt de klant een duidelijke offerte, technisch advies en een visuele impressie van het eindresultaat. Dankzij een efficiënt plaatsingsteam kan een dakkapel vaak binnen één dag worden gemonteerd, inclusief afwerking aan de binnenzijde. Hierdoor beperken zij de overlast tot een minimum.

Verder begeleidt het bedrijf het volledige traject, van vergunningaanvraag tot oplevering. Door het gebruik van kwaliteitsmaterialen en moderne productietechnieken garandeert Dakkapel Almere een lange levensduur, uitstekende isolatiewaarde en een strakke afwerking. Het resultaat is een duurzame uitbreiding van de leefruimte en een duidelijke meerwaarde voor de woning.

Name: Ideal Paint Solutions
Description:
While branding and aesthetics are obvious reasons to choose high-quality commercial painting for your business, there is much more at stake economically, environmentally and health-wise. 

Topping the list for many SMBs (small and mid-sized businesses) is durability. Demand for paint products that last longer, maintain a higher performance and keep their appearance over long spans of time with less need for maintenance is growing and likely will continue to do so, particularly in seasons of economic fluctuations. Key durability features are resistance to daily wear and tear, stains, dirt and mildew as well as enhanced washability. These factors are especially critical for high-traffic places such as schools, hospitals, hotels, gyms and industrial facilities, especially those with high-humidity spaces such as wet rooms, saunas and swimming pools. Such spaces are susceptible to mold growth which can cause paint to stain, peel and blister.

Meanwhile, the construction industry’s trend toward sustainable design is feeding a growth in projects that require LEED (Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design) certification. That's critical because paint and coatings can contribute to nearly a third (27 percent) of the points needed to achieve LEED v4 certification. Increased use of durable and low VOC paints and coatings serves to eliminate paint-related odors and create a healthier indoor environment, which not only protects the wellbeing of employees, customers and vendors who visit a place of business, but also helps companies keep in line with EPA (Environmental Protection Agency) regulations.

Fondata da Letícia de Mello, esperta in mobilità globale e relazioni interculturali, l’azienda prende forma a partire da un'esperienza diretta e concreta delle sfide che affrontano espatriati, dirigenti e famiglie nel trasferirsi e stabilirsi in un nuovo Paese.
Con sedi a Torino e Milano, LM Connecting è oggi un punto di riferimento nei servizi di Relocation e Global Mobility, offrendo un supporto personalizzato a privati e aziende che desiderano affrontare un cambiamento di vita o espandere la propria presenza professionale in Italia o all’estero.
La nostra missione è trasformare ogni transizione in un nuovo inizio: attraverso soluzioni su misura, affrontiamo la complessità burocratica, culturale e pratica di ogni spostamento, garantendo ai nostri clienti un percorso sereno, efficiente e ben strutturato.
I nostri servizi comprendono:
consulenza su visti, permessi di soggiorno e cittadinanza
supporto nelle pratiche burocratiche e amministrative
ricerca di alloggi e scuole
orientamento al sistema sanitario
apertura di conti bancari
assistenza fiscale e contabile
programmi di integrazione culturale e linguistica
Ogni percorso viene curato con attenzione, competenza e umanità, perché crediamo che il trasferimento non sia solo una questione logistica, ma un’esperienza profondamente personale. Per questo, lavoriamo con un team multidisciplinare altamente qualificato e con una rete di professionisti esperti, offrendo risposte tempestive, consulenza strategica e presenza costante.
Negli anni, LM Connecting ha accompagnato centinaia di persone e imprese nei loro progetti di mobilità, consolidando una reputazione fondata su affidabilità, trasparenza e attenzione reale alla persona.
In ogni servizio offerto, mettiamo al centro ciò che ci guida da sempre: accogliere, connettere e guidare ogni cliente nel suo percorso di cambiament

Name: EBE Construction
Description:
EBE construction est une entreprise marocaine, fondée en 2024 basée à Marrakech, spécialisée dans les travaux d’étanchéité sur l’ensemble du territoire national. Forte d’une équipe d’experts ayant une large expérience internationale, l’entreprise intervient sur des projets techniques et sensibles nécessitant une parfaite maîtrise des systèmes d’étanchéité.

Nous réalisons des travaux d’étanchéité sur des ouvrages d’art tels que les ponts routiers, ponts ferroviaires et viaducs, mais aussi sur des bâtiments résidentiels et industriels, des piscines, des bassins, des parkings ainsi que des murs enterrés.

EBE construction met en œuvre différents types de solutions selon les besoins du projet : étanchéité bitumineuse, systèmes SEL (Système d’Étanchéité Liquide) et SIL (Système d’Imperméabilisation Liquide), membranes PVC et EPDM. Nous nous engageons à fournir des prestations de haute qualité, dans le respect des normes techniques, environnementales et de sécurité, pour assurer la durabilité et la fiabilité de chaque ouvrage traité.

Name: Cowley_NZ
Description:
At Cowley, we’ve built a reputation on more than just technical know-how—we understand the land, and we understand the people who work it. From farm environmental plans and resource consents to civil, structural, and infrastructure design, we offer an end-to-end service that simplifies even the most complex projects. 
Our team brings boots-on-the-ground experience and strong relationships with councils, contractors, and landowners. Whether it’s a small repair or a major project, we treat every job like it matters—because it does.

Cowley delivers practical solutions that keep businesses, farms, and communities running smoothly. Our services include:

-Water Treatment Infrastructure: Design, installation, and servicing of water systems that meet New Zealand’s Drinking Water Quality Assurance Rules. 
-Electrical & Automation Systems: From domestic wiring to industrial automation, we deliver safe, compliant, and efficient solutions.
-Mechanical Installation: Structural and custom fabrication for rural, industrial, and commercial environments.
-Refrigeration: End-to-end support for cooling systems—from milk chillers to HVAC units.
-Pumping Systems: Supply, installation, and servicing of agricultural and industrial pump systems.
-Effluent & Water Systems: Design and upgrades for compliant, efficient effluent management and water reticulation.

Sectors We Serve
-Agriculture & Dairy: We support farmers with shed upgrades, milking systems, effluent management, and water infrastructure.
-Industrial & Commercial: From processing plants to automation projects, we deliver high-performance systems that meet industry standards.
-Municipal & Civil: We partner with councils to deliver infrastructure projects that meet compliance, timelines, and community expectations.

Our Capabilities
-End-to-End Delivery. 
-Multidisciplinary Expertise.
-24/7 Support.
-Regional Knowledge.

Trusted. Local. Proven. We’ve been here for decades, building trust and delivering results.

Name: Urban Laser Cutting
Description:
Urban Laser Cutting
adalah kontraktor proyek perusahaan jasa laser cutting dan jasa cnc router yang menyediakan layanan pembuatan custom interior dan eksterior menggunakan mesin laser cutting dan mesin CNC router. Kedua mesin ini memungkinkan perusahaan ini untuk memproduksi berbagai macam produk dengan tingkat presisi yang tinggi dan cepat. Mesin laser cutting digunakan untuk memotong material seperti acrylic, alumunium, plat besi galvanis, galvanil, galvalum, stainless steel dan logam tembaga dengan sangat akurat dan halus. Dengan teknologi laser yang canggih, hasil potongan yang dihasilkan sangat rapi dan tidak meninggalkan bekas pada material.

Sementara itu, mesin CNC router digunakan untuk membuat berbagai macam produk custom dengan cepat dan presisi yang tinggi. Mesin ini dapat mengukir, memotong, dan membuat bentuk berbagai macam material seperti akrilik, ACP, GRC, HMR, Kayu, MDF, WPC.
Urban Laser Cutting adalah sebuah kontraktor baja, kontraktor acp dan jasa laser cutting plat besi, yang menyediakan layanan potong plat untuk berbagai jenis material seperti alumunium, besi, galvanis, galvalnil, galvalum, kuningan, stainless steel, dan tembaga. Perusahaan ini menyediakan jasa potong plat metal dengan teknologi laser cutting yang canggih dan modern, sehingga dapat menghasilkan potongan plat yang akurat dan presisi.
Urban Laser Cutting kontraktor facade, kontraktor pagar, melayani kebutuhan pembuatan motif ornamen untuk jasa desain eksterior dan interior seperti canopy, facade, pagar, pintu, partisi, plafond, railing, teralis, wall panel, dan masih banyak lagi. Kontraktor proyek ini memiliki pengalaman dalam menangani proyek-proyek besar dan kecil di seluruh Indonesia, serta memiliki tenaga ahli yang berpengalaman di bidangnya.

Name: Optimal Inspection and Consulting
Description: At Optimal Inspection and Consulting (OIC) our primary business is boiler inspection, NDE and consulting services. As with any service-based business, both company name and reputation are defined solely by the experience, talent, and quality of staff. Our company is made up of primarily veteran boiler inspectors with a minimum of 5 years inspection knowledge. Not only are we the inspectors, but we are also the owners of the company… so rest assured, you will receive the best boiler inspection that our company has to offer. Are your boilers being forced offline due to unnecessary boiler tube failures even after they have been inspected by a "boiler inspection company"? If so, we can help to improve your boilers availability by identifying potential failures during scheduled maintenance overhauls and ensuring that the necessary repairs are made accordingly. In addition, during our inspection we can train a group of willing plant personnel to identify issues that we have found to be problematic throughout power plants in the U.S. Collectively we have performed over 800 boiler inspections and helped these utilities to achieve long term reliability, some of which have ran for years without a boiler tube failure. We are certain that our inspections will improve the reliability of your boiler and decrease the avoidable amount of time that your boiler is brought offline due to tube failures.

Name: Wiracocha Consultores y Especialistas S.A.C.
Description:
Wiracocha Consultores y Especialistas en Patrimonio, Arqueología, Arquitectura Y Gestión Cultural S.A.C. (R.U.C. 206077448) es una empresa especializada en la gestión de proyectos culturales y patrimoniales, así como en la consultoría en arqueología, arquitectura, patrimonio cultural, ciencias sociales y turismo en diferentes sectores como energía, minería e hidrocarburos, transporte, comunicaciones, construcción, saneamiento, educación, turismo y otros.

Nuestros servicios abarcan una amplia gama de temas, que incluyen la certificación de inexistencia de restos arqueológicos (CIRAS), planes de monitoreo arqueológico (PMAR) para obras civiles, estudios de diagnósticos arqueológicos, históricos y patrimoniales, proyectos de evaluación arqueológica (PEA) para autorización de obras y delimitación y saneamiento físico-legal de sitios arqueológicos, proyectos de rescate arqueológico (PRA) y la elaboración de expedientes y perfiles técnico en el marco del Sistema de Inversión Pública (Invierte.pe) para la Puesta en Valor de Monumentos Arqueológicos, históricos y recursos turísticos.

Además, ofrecemos servicios de gabinete y laboratorio para el tratamiento y análisis especializados de material arqueológico, así como la gestión de inventario de colecciones de bienes culturales muebles. También brindamos proyectos educativos sobre patrimonio, arqueología e historia, y llevamos a cabo el levantamiento de planos geodésicos, topográficos y arquitectónicos, así como la elaboración y ejecución de diagnósticos de impacto social en proyectos sociales.

Nos apasiona conectar el pasado con el futuro a través de la gestión del patrimonio cultural y el desarrollo sostenible, y trabajamos arduamente para brindar a nuestros clientes soluciones innovadoras y personalizadas para sus proyectos. Nuestro compromiso con la calidad y la excelencia nos distingue como líderes en el campo de la consultoría en patrimonio, arqueología, arquitectura y gestión cultural.

2.	Levantamento arquitetônico
o	Criamos ou atualizamos a planta baixa da construção existente.
o	Corrigimos distorções entre o que foi construído e o que foi aprovado.
3.	Regularização junto à prefeitura
o	Elaboramos e protocolamos todos os documentos técnicos exigidos para a legalização da obra.
o	Atuamos diretamente com o setor de aprovações da prefeitura até a liberação do alvará e/ou do habite-se.
4.	Emissão de RRT ou ART
o	Garantimos que a responsabilidade técnica esteja em dia com o CREA ou CAU.
o	Acompanhamos o processo com engenheiros ou arquitetos habilitados.
5.	Apoio em processos de financiamento ou venda
o	Com a obra regularizada, o empreendedor pode vender, transferir ou financiar o imóvel sem restrições.
o	Isso valoriza o patrimônio e evita riscos legais.
6.	Consultoria contínua
o	Orientamos sobre novas exigências legais, normas técnicas e boas práticas de construção e documentação.
o	Oferecemos suporte preventivo para evitar multas, embargos ou problemas futuros.

Name: Dakdekker Apeldoorn
Description:
Dakdekker Apeldoorn – Betrouwbare Dakservice in de Regio Apeldoorn

Dakdekker Apeldoorn is een ervaren en vakkundig dakdekkersbedrijf dat gespecialiseerd is in het onderhouden, repareren en vernieuwen van zowel platte als hellende daken. Met jarenlange ervaring in de dakbedekking biedt het team van Dakdekker Apeldoorn een breed scala aan diensten voor zowel particuliere als zakelijke klanten in de regio Apeldoorn en omstreken.

De diensten omvatten onder andere dakreparaties, dakinspecties, dakonderhoud, en volledige dakrenovaties. Daarnaast is het bedrijf gespecialiseerd in het verhelpen van daklekkages en het plaatsen van duurzame dakbedekking, waaronder bitumen, dakpannen en EPDM-rubber. Ook voor isolatie- en zinkwerkzaamheden kunnen klanten terecht bij Dakdekker Apeldoorn.

Kwaliteit, betrouwbaarheid en klanttevredenheid staan centraal in de werkwijze. Het bedrijf werkt uitsluitend met hoogwaardige materialen en gecertificeerde vakmensen, wat zorgt voor een duurzaam en waterdicht resultaat. Dakdekker Apeldoorn biedt bovendien een transparante werkwijze met duidelijke offertes en snelle service bij spoedklussen.

Of het nu gaat om een kleine reparatie of een compleet nieuw dak, Dakdekker Apeldoorn staat garant voor vakmanschap en service op maat – altijd met oog voor veiligheid en kwaliteit.

Name: Dakkapel Zwolle
Description:
Dakkapel Zwolle is een professioneel en betrouwbaar bedrijf dat volledig gespecialiseerd is in het ontwerpen en plaatsen van duurzame dakkapellen. Het bedrijf richt zich op het vergroten van wooncomfort door meer ruimte, daglicht en ventilatie te creëren in woningen binnen Zwolle en omgeving. Met vakmanschap, hoogwaardige materialen en moderne productietechnieken levert Dakkapel Zwolle maatwerk dat perfect aansluit bij de stijl van uw huis.

Klanten kunnen kiezen uit verschillende soorten dakkapellen, waaronder prefab, maatwerk, kunststof en houten uitvoeringen. Elke dakkapel wordt zorgvuldig ontworpen om zowel esthetisch als functioneel aan uw wensen te voldoen. Daarnaast staat energiezuinigheid centraal; de dakkapellen worden standaard voorzien van uitstekende isolatie, wat zorgt voor lagere energiekosten en een prettig binnenklimaat.

Dakkapel Zwolle verzorgt het volledige traject, van advies en ontwerp tot plaatsing en afwerking. Het team ondersteunt u bovendien bij vragen over vergunningen, zodat u precies weet waar u aan toe bent. Dankzij een efficiënt werkproces kan een dakkapel vaak binnen één dag worden geplaatst, met minimale overlast voor de bewoners.

Door persoonlijke service, transparante communicatie en kwaliteitsgericht werk biedt Dakkapel Zwolle een betrouwbare oplossing voor iedereen die zijn woning wil uitbreiden en verfraaien.

Name: Arte Energy
Description:
A Arte Energy nasceu em 2012 com uma proposta clara: ser referência em locação de equipamentos pesados e serviços especializados no setor de infraestrutura e construção civil. Nossa trajetória começou com a locação de geradores de energia, mas rapidamente expandimos nosso portfólio para incluir máquinas pesadas como escavadeiras hidráulicas, tratores de esteira, motoniveladoras, caminhões caçamba, plataformas elevatórias e manipuladores telescópicos.

Em mais de uma década de atuação, realizamos centenas de locações e dezenas de serviços especializados, incluindo terraplanagem, demolição, arruamento, drenagem e transporte de cargas. Nossos diferenciais são claros: manutenção própria com equipes prontas para atendimento ágil e eficiente, abastecimento facilitado dos equipamentos no local da obra, logística integrada para mobilização e desmobilização de equipamentos e capacidade técnica para personalização de máquinas conforme necessidades específicas.

Nosso compromisso com inovação tecnológica é refletido em sistemas próprios de gestão (ERP), garantindo eficiência operacional e atendimento personalizado. Além disso, valorizamos a sustentabilidade e a responsabilidade social, implementando práticas que reduzem o impacto ambiental das nossas operações e contribuem positivamente para a sociedade.

Com sede em Nova Iguaçu, nossa atuação cobre todo o estado do Rio de Janeiro, especialmente as regiões Metropolitana, Sul Fluminense, Serrana e Lagos. A Arte Energy é reconhecida pela solidez, parceria e transparência em todos os serviços prestados, consolidando-se como uma referência em equipamentos pesados e infraestrutura no estado.

Conte conosco para fornecer as melhores soluções para seu projeto. Arte Energy: movendo grandes projetos com excelência, honestidade e compromisso.

Name: SIT 45
Description:
La Société SIT 45 (SIT- Société d’Isolation Thermique) présente sur le Loiret depuis 2006 et reprise Fin 2016 par Fabien HOCHART, est spécialisée dans le calorifugeage de tous types d’équipements (Tuyauteries et accessoires, Gaines de ventilation, Echangeurs, Chaudières, Cuves, …) sur réseaux chauds et froids.

Nous proposons la fourniture et la pose de tous types d’isolants pour répondre à vos demandes et besoins.

Nous proposons également la fourniture et la pose de tous types de finitions sur isolants (Kraft alu, Enduits, PVC, Tôles Isoxal et Inox).

Pour plus de réactivité et dans la continuité de la maîtrise totale de nos interventions, nous fabriquons nous même, à la demande et sur mesure, tous les revêtements Isoxal et Inox.

Notre atelier est équipé de machines MABI nous permettant de réaliser une fabrication de qualité.

Nous sommes également à même de fournir et poser les cordons chauffants (Traçage électrique) ainsi que leurs accessoires (Hors raccordements électriques) pour la mise hors gel ou le maintien en température de vos réseaux.

En complément de nos prestations, nous fournissons et posons des matelas isolants sur vos équipements.

N’hésitez pas à nous consulter pour toute demande sur Orléans, mais aussi en Région Centre et Sud Paris, et plus ponctuellement hors région.

Notre force : Des travaux de qualité réalisés par nos techniciens qualifiés et expérimentés, dans le respect de nos engagements de coûts et délais.

Notre objectif : Vous accompagner au quotidien dans vos projets en tant que partenaire privilégié.

Description:
Founded and based in Northeast Ohio, Liberty Demolition & its associated companies provide a full-service lifecycle management of waste including demolition, recycling and reselling.  Our primary goal is to provide innovative and sustainable demolition services tailored to the unique needs of each project, delivered on-time and on-budget.  We service a 150-mile radius of our home base in Canton, Ohio.  

Liberty Companies offers a wide range of demolition services, including commercial, residential, and industrial demolition, as well as excavation and site preparation. We also provide debris removal and recycling services to ensure a clean and sustainable demolition process.

Beyond demolition, we're also a full service railroad contractor that can handle railroad work such as hauling stone and ties, derailment and landslide cleanup, moving rail equipment, hi-rail excavating and rotary dump services, as well as ditch line and right-of-way maintenance.   

Visit our website that includes all our services, in addition to our dumpster rentals and salvage warehouse (Buckeye Salvage), which is open to the public.

Name: Dryer Vent Wizard / XPR Sunset Inc., Los Angeles
Description:
Dryer Vent Wizard of Hollywood's goal is to make each home or business we service safer and more efficient with expert dryer vent inspection, cleaning, installation, and repair.
Dryer Vent Wizard provides professional dryer vent cleaning for residential and business properties in the Los Angeles area. When your dryer is functioning poorly, it is likely due to a clogged or debris-filled dryer vent line. Lint, debris, and other common sources of dryer vent clogs can not only affect the efficiency of your dryer, but they can also be a serious fire hazard.

Our dryer vent cleaning services remove the fire hazards from your dryer vent line and offer an array of other benefits related to your dryer’s performance. By restoring proper airflow throughout your dryer vent line, you can reduce drying time, increase energy efficiency, and decrease wear on clothing and the dryer itself.

Visual Inspection: Our service begins with a thorough visual inspection during which an experienced technician will assess your dryer vent system and recommend the services that will best solve your dryer vent issues.
Measurements: Airflow and back pressure measurements are taken in order to further assess the severity of the blockage and other problem sources.
Debris & Clog Removal: Lint, animal nests, stray socks or undergarments, and other items and materials that may clog your dryer vent are removed.
Line Sanitizing: Animal nests or other debris often found in vent lines can be a source of harmful bacteria, viruses, and fungi; where there is a potential for such contaminants, we will sanitize the affected areas of the vent line.
Booster Fan Cleaning: Dryer vent lines that are 35 feet or longer should have a booster fan installed, which should also be cleaned annually along with your dryer vent system as a whole.
Call (213) 695-1638 to schedule your Dryer Vent inspection, repair or installation!

Name: CircularXChange
Description:
Textile waste trading is fragmented, opaque, and relationship-driven - leading to lost value for both sellers and buyers.

CircularXchange is a B2B platform that enables transparent discovery and bidding for post-industrial textile waste. We help manufacturers efficiently list surplus materials while allowing recyclers and resellers to source consistent, quality waste at fair market prices.

We do not trade materials.
We do not set prices.
We do not take ownership of inventory.

Our role is to provide the infrastructure that improves price discovery, access, and efficiency across the textile waste supply chain.

Built for:
• Textile manufacturers
• Recyclers
• Waste aggregators & resellers

CircularXchange exists to reduce friction in material reuse - not through claims, but through better market mechanics.
